===== ./app/App.tsx =====
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { StatusBar } from "../components/StatusBar";
import { Sidebar, SidebarPage } from "../components/Sidebar";
import { EventFeed } from "../components/EventFeed";
import { Dashboard } from "../pages/Dashboard";
import { EventLog } from "../pages/EventLog";
import { SoundLibrary } from "../pages/SoundLibrary";
import { TTSSettings } from "../pages/TTSSettings";
import { OverlaySettings } from "../pages/OverlaySettings";
import { CommandSettings } from "../pages/CommandSettings";
import { BuildInfo } from "../pages/BuildInfo";
import { Connection } from "../pages/Connection";
import { ChatViewer } from "../pages/ChatViewer";
import { GiftViewer } from "../pages/GiftViewer";
import { GiftBrowser } from "../pages/GiftBrowser";
import { AppSettings } from "../pages/AppSettings";
import { TranslationOverlay } from "../pages/TranslationOverlay";
import { DbMeter } from "../pages/DbMeter";
import { TimerSettings } from "../pages/TimerSettings";
import { useDbMeter } from "../hooks/useDbMeter";
import { Integrations } from "../pages/Integrations";
import { LeagueCutoffs } from "../pages/LeagueCutoffs";
import { EventOverlay } from "../pages/EventOverlay";
import { Login } from "../pages/Login";
import { useEventStore } from "../stores/eventStore";
import { useAuthStore } from "../stores/authStore";
import { useLiveStore } from "../stores/liveStore";
import { useSoundPlayer } from "../hooks/useSoundPlayer";
import { useTTSEngine } from "../hooks/useTTSEngine";
import { useGiftImageStore } from "../stores/giftImageStore";
import type { TikkeEvent } from "@tikke/shared";
import type { Session, TikkeProfile } from "../../electron/services/supabase";
import type { TikLiveStatus } from "../stores/liveStore";
import type { UpdaterState } from "../../electron/services/updater";

function UpdateModal({ state, onDownload, onInstall, onDismiss }: {
  state: UpdaterState;
  onDownload: () => void;
  onInstall: () => void;
  onDismiss: () => void;
}): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div style={{
      position: "fixed", inset: 0, zIndex: 9999,
      background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.65)",
      display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
    }}>
      <div style={{
        width: 360,
        background: "var(--surface)",
        border: "1px solid var(--border)",
        borderRadius: 14,
        padding: "28px 28px 24px",
        display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 16,
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12 }}>
          <div style={{
            width: 40, height: 40, borderRadius: 10, flexShrink: 0,
            background: "linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, #0080ff 100%)",
            display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
            fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 900, color: "#000",
          }}>T</div>
          <div>
            <div style={{ fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 15 }}>
              {state.status === "checking" ? "업데이트 확인 중..." : "새 업데이트 가능"}
            </div>
            {state.version && state.status !== "checking" && (
              <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginTop: 2 }}>
                v{state.version}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {state.status === "checking" && (
          <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "var(--text-muted)", textAlign: "center" }}>
            서버에서 최신 버전을 확인하고 있습니다.
          </div>
        )}

        {state.status === "downloading" && (
          <div>
            <div style={{ height: 6, background: "var(--border)", borderRadius: 3, overflow: "hidden" }}>
              <div style={{
                height: "100%", borderRadius: 3,
                width: `${state.percent ?? 0}%`,
                background: "var(--primary)",
                transition: "width 0.3s",
              }} />
            </div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginTop: 6 }}>
              다운로드 중... {state.percent ?? 0}%
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {state.status === "error" && (
          <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--secondary)", padding: "8px 12px", background: "rgba(255,0,80,0.08)", borderRadius: 6 }}>
            오류: {state.error}
          </div>
        )}

        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, justifyContent: "flex-end" }}>
          {(state.status === "available" || state.status === "error") && (
            <button onClick={onDismiss} style={{
              padding: "8px 18px", borderRadius: 7,
              background: "transparent", border: "1px solid var(--border)",
              color: "var(--text-muted)", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600,
            }}>나중에</button>
          )}
          {state.status === "available" && (
            <button onClick={onDownload} style={{
              padding: "8px 20px", borderRadius: 7, border: "none",
              background: "var(--primary)", color: "#000",
              cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 700,
            }}>다운로드</button>
          )}
          {state.status === "downloaded" && (
            <button onClick={onInstall} style={{
              padding: "8px 20px", borderRadius: 7, border: "none",
              background: "#4ade80", color: "#000",
              cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 700,
            }}>재시작 후 설치</button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: {
    events?: { onEvent: (cb: (e: TikkeEvent) => void) => () => void };
    updater?: {
      onStatus: (cb: (s: UpdaterState) => void) => () => void;
      downloadUpdate: () => Promise<void>;
      installUpdate: () => Promise<void>;
    };
    auth?: {
      getSession: () => Promise<Session | null>;
      getProfile: (userId: string) => Promise<TikkeProfile | null>;
      signOut: () => Promise<void>;
      onSession: (cb: (s: Session | null) => void) => () => void;
    };
    live?: {
      getStatus: () => Promise<{ status: TikLiveStatus; username: string | null }>;
      onStatus: (cb: (payload: { status: TikLiveStatus; error?: string }) => void) => () => void;
    };
    settings?: {
      get: (key: string) => Promise<unknown>;
      set: (key: string, value: unknown) => Promise<void>;
    };
    overlay?: {
      send: (msg: unknown) => Promise<unknown>;
      getUrls: () => Promise<Record<string, string>>;
    };
  };
};

function Placeholder({ title }: { title: string }): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: 24, flex: 1 }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 8 }}>{title}</h1>
      <p style={{ color: "var(--text-muted)", fontSize: 13 }}>
        이 페이지는 다음 Phase에서 구현됩니다.
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}

export function App(): React.ReactElement {
  const [page, setPage] = useState<SidebarPage>("dashboard");
  const [hasUpdate, setHasUpdate] = useState(false);
  const [updaterState, setUpdaterState] = useState<UpdaterState | null>(null);
  const [updateDismissed, setUpdateDismissed] = useState(false);

  useSoundPlayer();
  useTTSEngine();
  useDbMeter();

  const mergeGiftImages = useGiftImageStore((s) => s.merge);
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as { tikke?: { live?: { onGiftImages?: (cb: (map: Record<number, string>) => void) => () => void } } }).tikke;
    return tikke?.live?.onGiftImages?.(mergeGiftImages);
  }, [mergeGiftImages]);

  const addEvent = useEventStore((s) => s.addEvent);
  const { session, profile, loading, setSession, setProfile, setLoading, setError, reset } = useAuthStore();
  const { setStatus: setLiveStatus, setUsername: setLiveUsername } = useLiveStore();

  // Initialize auth and subscribe to session changes
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.auth) {
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    tikke.auth.getSession().then(async (s) => {
      if (s) {
        setSession(s);
        const p = await tikke.auth!.getProfile(s.user.id);
        setProfile(p);
      }
      setLoading(false);
    }).catch(() => setLoading(false));

    const unsub = tikke.auth.onSession(async (s) => {
      if (s) {
        setSession(s);
        const p = await tikke.auth!.getProfile(s.user.id);
        setProfile(p);
      } else {
        reset();
      }
    });

    return unsub;
  }, [setSession, setProfile, setLoading, setError, reset]);

  // Initialize live status and subscribe to changes
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.live) return;

    tikke.live.getStatus().then(({ status, username }) => {
      setLiveStatus(status);
      setLiveUsername(username);
    }).catch(() => {});

    const unsub = tikke.live.onStatus(({ status, error }) => {
      setLiveStatus(status, error);
      if (status !== "connected") setLiveUsername(null);
    });

    return unsub;
  }, [setLiveStatus, setLiveUsername]);

  // 업데이트 상태 구독
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.updater) return;
    return tikke.updater.onStatus((s) => {
      setHasUpdate(s.status === "available" || s.status === "downloading" || s.status === "downloaded");
      if (s.status === "checking" || s.status === "available" || s.status === "downloading" || s.status === "downloaded" || s.status === "error") {
        setUpdaterState(s);
        if (s.status === "available") setUpdateDismissed(false);
      }
      // 최신 버전이면 팝업 닫기
      if (s.status === "not-available") setUpdaterState(null);
    });
  }, []);

  // Subscribe to TikTok events
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.events?.onEvent) return;
    return tikke.events.onEvent((event) => addEvent(event));
  }, [addEvent]);

  // 앱 시작 시 저장된 메뉴판을 오버레이에 즉시 동기화
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.settings || !tikke?.overlay) return;
    tikke.settings.get("menuBoardData").then((raw: unknown) => {
      if (typeof raw !== "string" || !raw) return;
      try {
        const { boards, activeId } = JSON.parse(raw) as { boards: { id: string; rows: number; cols: number; cellSize: number; gap: number; cells: unknown[] }[]; activeId: string | null };
        const active = boards.find((b) => b.id === activeId) ?? boards[0];
        if (active) void tikke.overlay!.send({ type: "menu_board_sync", payload: active });
      } catch {}
    }).catch(() => {});
  }, []);

  async function handleSignOut(): Promise<void> {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    await tikke?.auth?.signOut();
  }

  const liveStatus = useLiveStore((s) => s.status);

  function renderPage(): React.ReactElement {
    switch (page) {
      case "dashboard": return <Dashboard />;
      case "connection": return <Connection />;
      case "eventlog": return <EventLog />;
      case "chat": return <ChatViewer />;
      case "gifts": return <GiftViewer />;
      case "giftbrowser": return <GiftBrowser />;
      case "sounds": return <SoundLibrary />;
      case "tts": return <TTSSettings />;
      case "translation": return <TranslationOverlay />;
      case "timer":       return <TimerSettings />;
      case "dbmeter":     return <DbMeter />;
      case "overlays": return <OverlaySettings />;
      case "eventoverlay": return <EventOverlay />;
      case "commands": return <CommandSettings />;
      case "integrations": return <Integrations />;
      case "settings": return <AppSettings />;
      case "buildinfo": return <BuildInfo />;
      case "leaguecutoffs": return <LeagueCutoffs />;
      default: return <Dashboard />;
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div
        style={{
          height: "100vh",
          display: "flex",
          flexDirection: "column",
          alignItems: "center",
          justifyContent: "center",
          background: "var(--bg)",
          gap: 16,
        }}
      >
        <div
          style={{
            width: 52,
            height: 52,
            borderRadius: 13,
            background: "linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, #0080ff 100%)",
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            justifyContent: "center",
            fontSize: 26,
            fontWeight: 900,
            color: "#000",
            boxShadow: "0 0 32px rgba(0,242,234,0.35)",
          }}
        >
          T
        </div>
        <span
          style={{
            fontSize: 22,
            fontWeight: 800,
            color: "var(--text)",
            letterSpacing: -0.5,
          }}
        >
          Tikke
        </span>
        <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-dim)" }}>불러오는 중...</span>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!session) {
    return <Login />;
  }

  const showModal = updaterState !== null && !updateDismissed &&
    (updaterState.status === "checking" || updaterState.status === "available" ||
     updaterState.status === "downloading" || updaterState.status === "downloaded" ||
     updaterState.status === "error");

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", height: "100vh" }}>
      {showModal && updaterState && (
        <UpdateModal
          state={updaterState}
          onDownload={() => {
            const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
            void tikke?.updater?.downloadUpdate();
          }}
          onInstall={() => {
            const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
            void tikke?.updater?.installUpdate();
          }}
          onDismiss={() => setUpdateDismissed(true)}
        />
      )}
      <StatusBar
        status={liveStatus}
        username={profile?.display_name ?? session.user.email}
        onSignOut={() => void handleSignOut()}
      />
      <div style={{ display: "flex", flex: 1, overflow: "hidden" }}>
        <Sidebar current={page} onNavigate={setPage} hasUpdate={hasUpdate} />
        <main style={{ flex: 1, overflow: "hidden", display: "flex" }}>
          {renderPage()}
        </main>
        <EventFeed />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== ./app/main.tsx =====
import React from "react";
import { createRoot } from "react-dom/client";
import { App } from "./App";
import "../styles/globals.css";

const root = document.getElementById("root");
if (!root) throw new Error("No #root element found");

createRoot(root).render(<App />);

===== ./components/EventFeed.tsx =====
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { useEventStore } from "../stores/eventStore";
import type { TikkeEvent, ChatEvent, GiftEvent, LikeEvent } from "@tikke/shared";

interface TypeStyle {
  color: string;
  bg: string;
  label: string;
}

const TYPE_STYLE: Record<string, TypeStyle> = {
  chat:      { color: "#00F2EA", bg: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)",  label: "채팅" },
  gift:      { color: "#FF0050", bg: "rgba(255,0,80,0.1)",   label: "선물" },
  like:      { color: "#FF6B9D", bg: "rgba(255,107,157,0.1)",label: "좋아요" },
  follow:    { color: "#A78BFA", bg: "rgba(167,139,250,0.1)",label: "팔로우" },
  member:    { color: "#60A5FA", bg: "rgba(96,165,250,0.1)", label: "입장" },
  share:     { color: "#34D399", bg: "rgba(52,211,153,0.1)", label: "공유" },
  subscribe: { color: "#FBBF24", bg: "rgba(251,191,36,0.1)", label: "구독" },
  system:    { color: "#94A3B8", bg: "rgba(148,163,184,0.1)",label: "시스템" },
  command:   { color: "#F472B6", bg: "rgba(244,114,182,0.1)",label: "명령어" },
};

function eventBody(event: TikkeEvent): string {
  const nick = event.user?.nickname ?? event.user?.uniqueId ?? "?";
  switch (event.type) {
    case "chat":
      return `${nick}: ${(event as ChatEvent).message}`;
    case "gift": {
      const g = event as GiftEvent;
      const cnt = g.repeatCount && g.repeatCount > 1 ? ` ×${g.repeatCount}` : "";
      const dia = g.diamondCount ? ` (💎${g.diamondCount * (g.repeatCount ?? 1)})` : "";
      return `${nick} → ${g.giftName ?? "선물"}${cnt}${dia}`;
    }
    case "like": {
      const l = event as LikeEvent;
      return `${nick} 좋아요${l.likeCount ? ` +${l.likeCount}` : ""}`;
    }
    case "follow":    return `${nick} 팔로우`;
    case "member":    return `${nick} 입장`;
    case "share":     return `${nick} 공유`;
    case "subscribe": return `${nick} 구독`;
    default:          return `[${event.type}]`;
  }
}

function formatTime(ts: number): string {
  const d = new Date(ts);
  const hh = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
  const mm = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
  const ss = String(d.getSeconds()).padStart(2, "0");
  return `${hh}:${mm}:${ss}`;
}

export function EventFeed(): React.ReactElement {
  const events = useEventStore((s) => s.events);
  const clearEvents = useEventStore((s) => s.clearEvents);
  const bottomRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const prevLen = useRef(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (events.length > prevLen.current) {
      bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
    }
    prevLen.current = events.length;
  }, [events.length]);

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        width: 270,
        background: "var(--surface)",
        borderLeft: "1px solid var(--border)",
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        flexShrink: 0,
      }}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <div
        style={{
          padding: "0 14px",
          height: 38,
          borderBottom: "1px solid var(--border)",
          display: "flex",
          alignItems: "center",
          justifyContent: "space-between",
          flexShrink: 0,
        }}
      >
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 7 }}>
          <span
            style={{
              width: 6,
              height: 6,
              borderRadius: "50%",
              background: events.length > 0 ? "var(--secondary)" : "var(--text-dim)",
              boxShadow: events.length > 0 ? "0 0 6px var(--secondary-glow)" : "none",
              flexShrink: 0,
              display: "inline-block",
            }}
          />
          <span style={{ fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, color: "var(--text-muted)", letterSpacing: "0.06em", textTransform: "uppercase" }}>
            LIVE 이벤트
          </span>
          {events.length > 0 && (
            <span
              style={{
                fontSize: 10,
                fontWeight: 700,
                background: "var(--secondary-dim)",
                color: "var(--secondary)",
                borderRadius: 10,
                padding: "1px 6px",
              }}
            >
              {events.length}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
        {events.length > 0 && (
          <button
            onClick={clearEvents}
            style={{
              background: "transparent",
              border: "none",
              color: "var(--text-dim)",
              cursor: "pointer",
              fontSize: 11,
              padding: "2px 4px",
              borderRadius: 4,
              transition: "color var(--transition)",
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => { (e.target as HTMLButtonElement).style.color = "var(--text-muted)"; }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => { (e.target as HTMLButtonElement).style.color = "var(--text-dim)"; }}
          >
            지우기
          </button>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Feed */}
      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflowY: "auto", padding: "6px 0" }}>
        {events.length === 0 ? (
          <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              flexDirection: "column",
              alignItems: "center",
              justifyContent: "center",
              height: "100%",
              gap: 8,
              color: "var(--text-dim)",
            }}
          >
            <span style={{ fontSize: 28, opacity: 0.3 }}>◎</span>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 12 }}>이벤트 대기 중...</span>
          </div>
        ) : (
          events.filter((e) => e.type !== "roomUser").map((event, idx, arr) => (
            <EventRow key={event.id} event={event} isNew={idx === arr.length - 1} />
          ))
        )}
        <div ref={bottomRef} />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

interface EventRowProps {
  event: TikkeEvent;
  isNew: boolean;
}

function EventRow({ event, isNew }: EventRowProps): React.ReactElement {
  const ts = TYPE_STYLE[event.type] ?? TYPE_STYLE["system"];

  return (
    <div
      className={isNew ? "anim-slide-in" : undefined}
      style={{
        padding: "5px 12px",
        display: "grid",
        gridTemplateColumns: "auto 1fr",
        gap: "0 8px",
        alignItems: "start",
        borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03)",
      }}
    >
      {/* Badge */}
      <span
        style={{
          fontSize: 9,
          fontWeight: 700,
          letterSpacing: "0.05em",
          textTransform: "uppercase",
          color: ts.color,
          background: ts.bg,
          borderRadius: 4,
          padding: "2px 5px",
          marginTop: 1,
          whiteSpace: "nowrap",
        }}
      >
        {ts.label}
      </span>

      {/* Body + time */}
      <div>
        <span
          style={{
            fontSize: 12,
            color: "var(--text)",
            wordBreak: "break-word",
            lineHeight: 1.45,
            display: "block",
          }}
        >
          {eventBody(event)}
        </span>
        <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--text-dim)", display: "block", marginTop: 1 }}>
          {formatTime(event.timestamp)}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== ./components/Sidebar.tsx =====
import React from "react";

export type SidebarPage =
  | "dashboard"
  | "connection"
  | "eventlog"
  | "chat"
  | "gifts"
  | "giftbrowser"
  | "sounds"
  | "tts"
  | "translation"
  | "overlays"
  | "eventoverlay"
  | "commands"
  | "integrations"
  | "settings"
  | "timer"
  | "dbmeter"
  | "buildinfo"
  | "leaguecutoffs";

interface NavItem {
  id: SidebarPage;
  label: string;
  icon: string;
}

interface NavSection {
  title?: string;
  items: NavItem[];
}

const NAV_SECTIONS: NavSection[] = [
  {
    items: [
      { id: "dashboard", label: "대시보드", icon: "📊" },
      { id: "connection", label: "TikTok 연결", icon: "📡" },
    ],
  },
  {
    title: "라이브",
    items: [
      { id: "eventlog", label: "이벤트 로그", icon: "📋" },
      { id: "chat", label: "채팅 로그", icon: "💬" },
      { id: "gifts", label: "선물 로그", icon: "🎀" },
      { id: "giftbrowser", label: "선물 브라우저", icon: "🎁" },
      { id: "eventoverlay", label: "이벤트 오버레이", icon: "🎬" },
      { id: "leaguecutoffs", label: "리그 조각컷", icon: "🏆" },
    ],
  },
  {
    title: "미디어",
    items: [
      { id: "sounds", label: "사운드", icon: "🔊" },
      { id: "timer", label: "타이머", icon: "⏱️" },
      { id: "tts", label: "TTS", icon: "🗣️" },
      { id: "translation", label: "번역 자막", icon: "🌐" },
      { id: "dbmeter",    label: "dB 측정기", icon: "🎚️" },
      { id: "overlays", label: "오버레이 URL 설정", icon: "🔧" },
      { id: "commands", label: "명령어", icon: "⌨️" },
    ],
  },
  {
    title: "시스템",
    items: [
      { id: "integrations", label: "연동", icon: "🔗" },
      { id: "settings", label: "설정", icon: "⚙️" },
      { id: "buildinfo", label: "업데이트", icon: "🔄" },
    ],
  },
];

interface SidebarProps {
  current: SidebarPage;
  onNavigate: (page: SidebarPage) => void;
  hasUpdate?: boolean;
}

export function Sidebar({ current, onNavigate, hasUpdate }: SidebarProps): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <nav
      style={{
        width: 200,
        background: "var(--surface)",
        borderRight: "1px solid var(--border)",
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        flexShrink: 0,
        overflowY: "auto",
      }}
    >
      {/* Brand */}
      <div
        style={{
          padding: "18px 16px 14px",
          borderBottom: "1px solid var(--border)",
          display: "flex",
          alignItems: "center",
          gap: 10,
        }}
      >
        <div
          style={{
            width: 28,
            height: 28,
            borderRadius: 7,
            background: "linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, #0080ff 100%)",
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            justifyContent: "center",
            fontSize: 14,
            color: "#000",
            fontWeight: 800,
            flexShrink: 0,
            boxShadow: "0 0 14px rgba(0,242,234,0.3)",
          }}
        >
          T
        </div>
        <span
          style={{
            fontSize: 16,
            fontWeight: 800,
            color: "var(--text)",
            letterSpacing: -0.4,
          }}
        >
          Tikke
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Navigation */}
      <div style={{ flex: 1, padding: "8px 0 12px" }}>
        {NAV_SECTIONS.map((section, si) => (
          <div key={si} style={{ marginBottom: si < NAV_SECTIONS.length - 1 ? 4 : 0 }}>
            {section.title && (
              <div
                style={{
                  padding: "10px 16px 4px",
                  fontSize: 9,
                  fontWeight: 700,
                  letterSpacing: "0.08em",
                  textTransform: "uppercase",
                  color: "var(--text-dim)",
                }}
              >
                {section.title}
              </div>
            )}
            {section.items.map((item) => {
              const active = item.id === current;
              return (
                <NavButton
                  key={item.id}
                  item={item}
                  active={active}
                  onClick={() => onNavigate(item.id)}
                  badge={item.id === "buildinfo" && hasUpdate}
                />
              );
            })}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </nav>
  );
}

interface NavButtonProps {
  item: NavItem;
  active: boolean;
  onClick: () => void;
  badge?: boolean | null;
}

function NavButton({ item, active, onClick, badge }: NavButtonProps): React.ReactElement {
  const [hovered, setHovered] = React.useState(false);

  return (
    <button
      onClick={onClick}
      onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(true)}
      onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(false)}
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        gap: 9,
        padding: "8px 14px",
        margin: "1px 8px",
        background: active
          ? "var(--primary-dim)"
          : hovered
          ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)"
          : "transparent",
        border: "none",
        borderRadius: "var(--radius-sm)",
        color: active ? "var(--primary)" : hovered ? "var(--text)" : "var(--text-muted)",
        cursor: "pointer",
        textAlign: "left",
        fontSize: 13,
        fontWeight: active ? 600 : 400,
        transition: "all var(--transition)",
        width: "calc(100% - 16px)",
        position: "relative",
        boxShadow: active ? "inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,242,234,0.15)" : "none",
      }}
    >
      {active && (
        <span
          style={{
            position: "absolute",
            left: 0,
            top: "50%",
            transform: "translateY(-50%)",
            width: 3,
            height: "60%",
            background: "var(--primary)",
            borderRadius: "0 3px 3px 0",
            boxShadow: "0 0 8px var(--primary-glow)",
          }}
        />
      )}
      <span
        style={{
          fontSize: 14,
          width: 18,
          textAlign: "center",
          flexShrink: 0,
          opacity: active ? 1 : 0.7,
        }}
      >
        {item.icon}
      </span>
      {item.label}
      {badge && (
        <span style={{
          marginLeft: "auto",
          width: 8, height: 8,
          borderRadius: "50%",
          background: "#FF0050",
          boxShadow: "0 0 6px rgba(255,0,80,0.7)",
          flexShrink: 0,
        }} />
      )}
    </button>
  );
}

===== ./components/StatusBar.tsx =====
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: { app?: { getVersion: () => Promise<string> } };
};

interface StatusBarProps {
  status: "idle" | "connecting" | "connected" | "disconnected" | "error";
  username?: string;
  onSignOut?: () => void;
}

const STATUS_COLOR: Record<StatusBarProps["status"], string> = {
  idle: "#444",
  connecting: "#F5A623",
  connected: "#00F2EA",
  disconnected: "#555",
  error: "#FF0050",
};

const STATUS_LABEL: Record<StatusBarProps["status"], string> = {
  idle: "대기 중",
  connecting: "연결 중",
  connected: "라이브 연결됨",
  disconnected: "연결 끊김",
  error: "오류",
};

export function StatusBar({ status, username, onSignOut }: StatusBarProps): React.ReactElement {
  const color = STATUS_COLOR[status];
  const isConnected = status === "connected";
  const [version, setVersion] = useState("");

  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    void tikke?.app?.getVersion().then((v) => setVersion(v));
  }, []);

  return (
    <div
      className="drag-region"
      style={{
        height: 38,
        background: "var(--surface)",
        borderBottom: "1px solid var(--border)",
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        paddingLeft: 0,
        paddingRight: 12,
        gap: 0,
        flexShrink: 0,
      }}
    >
      {/* Sidebar-width spacer so status bar aligns with content */}
      <div style={{ width: 200, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", paddingLeft: 16 }}>
        <span
          style={{
            fontSize: 13,
            fontWeight: 700,
            color: "var(--text-dim)",
            letterSpacing: 0.2,
          }}
        >
          {version ? `v${version}` : ""}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1 }} />

      {/* Status indicator */}
      <div
        className="no-drag"
        style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6, marginRight: 12 }}
      >
        <span
          className={isConnected ? "pulse-connected" : undefined}
          style={{
            width: 7,
            height: 7,
            borderRadius: "50%",
            background: color,
            display: "inline-block",
            flexShrink: 0,
            boxShadow: isConnected ? `0 0 8px ${color}` : "none",
            transition: "background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s",
          }}
        />
        <span style={{ color: "var(--text-muted)", fontSize: 12, whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>
          {STATUS_LABEL[status]}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* User */}
      {username && (
        <div
          className="no-drag"
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            gap: 6,
            paddingLeft: 12,
            borderLeft: "1px solid var(--border)",
            height: 18,
          }}
        >
          <span
            style={{
              width: 20,
              height: 20,
              borderRadius: "50%",
              background: "linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, #0080ff 100%)",
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              justifyContent: "center",
              fontSize: 10,
              fontWeight: 800,
              color: "#000",
              flexShrink: 0,
            }}
          >
            {(username[0] ?? "?").toUpperCase()}
          </span>
          <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", maxWidth: 120, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>
            {username}
          </span>
        </div>
      )}

      {onSignOut && (
        <button
          className="no-drag btn btn-ghost"
          onClick={onSignOut}
          style={{
            padding: "3px 10px",
            fontSize: 11,
            marginLeft: 8,
            borderRadius: 4,
          }}
        >
          로그아웃
        </button>
      )}

      <WindowControls />
    </div>
  );
}

function WindowControls(): React.ReactElement {
  const tikke = (window as unknown as { tikke?: { window?: { minimize: () => void; maximize: () => void; close: () => void } } }).tikke;
  const [hovered, setHovered] = React.useState<string | null>(null);

  const controls = [
    { action: "minimize" as const, color: "#FFBD2E", hover: "#FFD060" },
    { action: "maximize" as const, color: "#28C840", hover: "#3EDB57" },
    { action: "close" as const, color: "#FF5F57", hover: "#FF7B75" },
  ];

  return (
    <div
      className="no-drag"
      style={{ display: "flex", gap: 7, marginLeft: 14 }}
    >
      {controls.map(({ action, color, hover }) => (
        <button
          key={action}
          onClick={() => tikke?.window?.[action]()}
          onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(action)}
          onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(null)}
          aria-label={action}
          style={{
            width: 12,
            height: 12,
            borderRadius: "50%",
            border: "none",
            cursor: "pointer",
            background: hovered === action ? hover : color,
            transition: "background var(--transition), transform var(--transition)",
            transform: hovered === action ? "scale(1.15)" : "scale(1)",
            boxShadow: hovered === action ? `0 0 6px ${color}88` : "none",
          }}
        />
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

===== ./config/slotMachineOverlay.ts =====
// 벌칙머신 오버레이 중앙 설정 파일

export interface SlotItem {
  label: string;        // 릴에 표시될 텍스트
  icon?: string;        // 이모지 또는 아이콘 (선택)
  weight: number;       // 상대 확률 가중치 (높을수록 자주 나옴)
  message?: string;     // 결과 확정 후 표시 메시지 (없으면 label 사용)
}

export interface TriggerGift {
  giftId?: number;
  giftName?: string;
  minDiamonds?: number;
}

export interface SlotAnimationConfig {
  spinDurationMs: number;   // 스핀 총 시간
  showResultMs: number;     // 결과 표시 유지 시간
}

export interface SlotSoundConfig {
  enabled: boolean;
  tickIntervalMs: number;   // 스핀 틱 간격 (ms)
  // 추후 커스텀 사운드 파일 경로 (tikke-sound:// 프로토콜)
  customTickPath?: string;
  customWinPath?: string;
  customLosePath?: string;
}

export interface SlotMachineConfig {
  title: string;
  triggers: TriggerGift[];
  items: SlotItem[];
  animation: SlotAnimationConfig;
  sound: SlotSoundConfig;
}

export const SLOT_MACHINE_CONFIG: SlotMachineConfig = {
  title: "벌칙머신",

  // 이 선물들이 들어오면 슬롯 실행
  triggers: [
    { giftName: "장미" },
    { minDiamonds: 1 },
  ],

  // 결과 항목 목록 (weight 합계 기준 확률 계산)
  items: [
    { label: "벌칙 1",  icon: "😈", weight: 30, message: "팔굽혀펴기 10개!" },
    { label: "벌칙 2",  icon: "🔥", weight: 25, message: "노래 한 소절!" },
    { label: "벌칙 3",  icon: "💀", weight: 20, message: "춤 추기!" },
    { label: "행운",    icon: "🍀", weight: 15, message: "오늘은 운이 좋네요!" },
    { label: "면제",    icon: "✨", weight: 10, message: "이번엔 면제!" },
  ],

  animation: {
    spinDurationMs: 2400,
    showResultMs:   4500,
  },

  sound: {
    enabled:       true,
    tickIntervalMs: 80,
  },
};

// 가중치 기반 랜덤 인덱스 선택 (렌더러/테스트용)
export function weightedRandomIndex(items: SlotItem[]): number {
  const total = items.reduce((s, i) => s + i.weight, 0);
  let rand = Math.random() * total;
  for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
    rand -= items[i].weight;
    if (rand <= 0) return i;
  }
  return items.length - 1;
}

);

===== ./data/tiktokGifts.ts =====
// 틱톡 한국 서버 선물 데이터 (한글 이름 기준, 1889개)
export interface TikTokGift {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  diamondCount: number;
  image: string;

유니버스","diamondCount":44999,"image":"https://p16-webcast.tiktokcdn.com/img/maliva/webcast-va/8f471afbcebfda3841a6cc515e381f58~tplv-obj.webp"}];

===== ./hooks/useDbMeter.ts =====
// 마이크 dB 측정, 임계값 알람, 오버레이 전송 훅
import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { useDbMeterStore } from "../stores/dbMeterStore";

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: {
    settings?: { getAll: () => Promise<Record<string, unknown>> };
    overlay?: { send: (msg: unknown) => Promise<unknown> };
    sound?: {
      listFiles: () => Promise<Array<{ id: string; filePath: string }>>;
      readBuffer: (id: string) => Promise<ArrayBuffer | null>;
    };
  };
};

const PEAK_HOLD_MS = 2000;
const SMOOTHING = 0.85;

function playDefaultAlarm(ctx: AudioContext, volume: number): void {
  const gain0 = Math.max(0.001, 0.6 * volume);
  const now = ctx.currentTime;
  [880, 1100, 880, 1100].forEach((freq, i) => {
    const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
    const gain = ctx.createGain();
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(ctx.destination);
    osc.frequency.value = freq;
    osc.type = "square";
    const t = now + i * 0.18;
    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(gain0, t);
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, t + 0.16);
    osc.start(t);
    osc.stop(t + 0.17);
  });
}

function playCustomAlarm(ctx: AudioContext, soundId: string, volume: number): void {
  const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
  if (!tikke?.sound?.readBuffer) return;
  const vol = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, volume));
  tikke.sound.readBuffer(soundId).then((data) => {
    if (!data) return;
    // IPC may return Uint8Array (Node Buffer serialized); ensure clean ArrayBuffer
    const raw = data as unknown;
    let arrayBuf: ArrayBuffer;
    if (ArrayBuffer.isView(raw)) {
      const v = raw as Uint8Array;
      arrayBuf = v.buffer.slice(v.byteOffset, v.byteOffset + v.byteLength) as ArrayBuffer;
    } else {
      arrayBuf = raw as ArrayBuffer;
    }
    ctx.decodeAudioData(arrayBuf, (decoded) => {
      const src = ctx.createBufferSource();
      const gain = ctx.createGain();
      gain.gain.value = vol;
      src.buffer = decoded;
      src.connect(gain);
      gain.connect(ctx.destination);
      src.start();
    });
  }).catch(() => {});
}

export function useDbMeter(): void {
  // 렌더 트리거용 — enabled/loaded만 구독
  const enabled = useDbMeterStore((s) => s.enabled);
  const loaded  = useDbMeterStore((s) => s.loaded);

  const rafRef        = useRef<number>(0);
  const analyserRef   = useRef<AnalyserNode | null>(null);
  const streamRef     = useRef<MediaStream | null>(null);
  const audioCtxRef   = useRef<AudioContext | null>(null);
  const lastAlarmRef  = useRef<number>(0);
  const peakTimerRef  = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>();
  const smoothDbRef   = useRef<number>(-Infinity);

  // 설정 로드 (마운트 1회)
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    const s = useDbMeterStore.getState();
    if (!tikke?.settings) { s.setLoaded(true); return; }
    tikke.settings.getAll().then((all) => {
      s.setEnabled(Boolean(all.dbMeterEnabled ?? false));
      s.setThreshold(Number(all.dbMeterThreshold ?? -20));
      s.setAlarmEnabled(Boolean(all.dbMeterAlarmEnabled ?? true));
      s.setAlarmCooldownMs(Number(all.dbMeterAlarmCooldownMs ?? 3000));
      s.setAlarmSoundId(String(all.dbMeterAlarmSoundId ?? "default"));
      s.setAlarmVolume(Number(all.dbMeterAlarmVolume ?? 1));
      s.setLoaded(true);
    }).catch(() => useDbMeterStore.getState().setLoaded(true));
  }, []); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  // enabled/loaded 변경 시 마이크 시작/중지
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!loaded) return;

    if (!enabled) {
      // 중지
      cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
      streamRef.current?.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
      void audioCtxRef.current?.close();
      analyserRef.current = null;
      streamRef.current = null;
      audioCtxRef.current = null;
      smoothDbRef.current = -Infinity;
      const st = useDbMeterStore.getState();
      st.setCurrentDb(-Infinity);
      st.setPeakDb(-Infinity);
      st.setAlarming(false);
      // 오버레이도 비활성 상태로 초기화
      const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
      void tikke?.overlay?.send({
        type: "dbmeter",
        payload: { db: null, peak: null, threshold: st.threshold },
      });
      return;
    }

    let alive = true;

    navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true, video: false }).then((stream) => {
      if (!alive) { stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop()); return; }

      const ctx = new AudioContext();
      const source = ctx.createMediaStreamSource(stream);
      const analyser = ctx.createAnalyser();
      analyser.fftSize = 2048;
      analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0;
      source.connect(analyser);
      streamRef.current = stream;
      audioCtxRef.current = ctx;
      analyserRef.current = analyser;

      const data = new Float32Array(analyser.fftSize);

      const loop = () => {
        if (!alive || !analyserRef.current) return;
        analyserRef.current.getFloatTimeDomainData(data);

        let sum = 0;
        for (const v of data) sum += v * v;
        const rms = Math.sqrt(sum / data.length);
        const rawDb = rms > 0 ? 20 * Math.log10(rms) : -Infinity;

        if (!isFinite(smoothDbRef.current)) {
          smoothDbRef.current = rawDb;
        } else {
          smoothDbRef.current = SMOOTHING * smoothDbRef.current + (1 - SMOOTHING) * rawDb;
        }
        const db = smoothDbRef.current;

        // 상태 직접 업데이트 (React 렌더 유발 없음)
        useDbMeterStore.setState({ currentDb: db });

        // 피크 홀드
        const curPeak = useDbMeterStore.getState().peakDb;
        if (!isFinite(curPeak) || db > curPeak) {
          clearTimeout(peakTimerRef.current);
          useDbMeterStore.setState({ peakDb: db });
          peakTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
            useDbMeterStore.setState({ peakDb: -Infinity });
          }, PEAK_HOLD_MS);
        }

        // 알람
        const st = useDbMeterStore.getState();
        const now = Date.now();
        if (st.alarmEnabled && !st.alarmPaused && isFinite(db) && db >= st.threshold &&
            now - lastAlarmRef.current > st.alarmCooldownMs) {
          lastAlarmRef.current = now;
          useDbMeterStore.setState({ alarming: true });
          setTimeout(() => useDbMeterStore.setState({ alarming: false }), 800);

          if (st.alarmSoundId === "default") {
            if (audioCtxRef.current) playDefaultAlarm(audioCtxRef.current, st.alarmVolume ?? 1);
          } else if (audioCtxRef.current) {
            playCustomAlarm(audioCtxRef.current, st.alarmSoundId, st.alarmVolume ?? 1);
          }
        }

        // 오버레이 전송
        const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
        void tikke?.overlay?.send({
          type: "dbmeter",
          payload: { db, peak: st.peakDb, threshold: st.threshold },
        });

        rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
      };

      rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    }).catch((err) => {
      console.error("[useDbMeter] mic error:", err);
    });

    return () => {
      alive = false;
      cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
      streamRef.current?.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
      void audioCtxRef.current?.close();
      analyserRef.current = null;
      streamRef.current = null;
      audioCtxRef.current = null;
    };
  }, [enabled, loaded]);
}

===== ./hooks/useSoundPlayer.ts =====
import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { useSoundStore } from "../stores/soundStore";

interface SoundPlayPayload {
  ruleId: string;
  fileId: string;
  url: string;
  volume: number;
  name: string;
}

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: {
    sound?: {
      onPlay: (cb: (payload: SoundPlayPayload) => void) => () => void;
      onStopAll: (cb: () => void) => () => void;
      readBuffer: (id: string) => Promise<ArrayBuffer | null>;
    };
  };
};

const MAX_CONCURRENT = 5;

export function useSoundPlayer(): void {
  const addActiveSound = useSoundStore((s) => s.addActiveSound);
  const removeActiveSound = useSoundStore((s) => s.removeActiveSound);
  const clearActiveSounds = useSoundStore((s) => s.clearActiveSounds);
  // 통합 stop 인터페이스 (HTMLAudioElement / AudioContext 모두 처리)
  const activeSounds = useRef<Map<string, { stop: () => void }>>(new Map());
  const audioCtxRef = useRef<AudioContext | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.sound) return;

    function getCtx(): AudioContext {
      if (!audioCtxRef.current || audioCtxRef.current.state === "closed") {
        audioCtxRef.current = new AudioContext();
      }
      return audioCtxRef.current;
    }

    const unsubPlay = tikke.sound.onPlay((payload) => {
      if (activeSounds.current.size >= MAX_CONCURRENT) return;

      const instanceId = `${payload.fileId}_${Date.now()}`;
      const volume = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, payload.volume));

      function cleanup() {
        activeSounds.current.delete(instanceId);
        removeActiveSound(instanceId);
      }

      // 즉시 등록 (MAX_CONCURRENT 체크 정확도 유지)
      activeSounds.current.set(instanceId, { stop: cleanup });
      addActiveSound({ id: instanceId, name: payload.name, startedAt: Date.now() });

      // 모든 사운드: readBuffer(main process) → AudioContext
      // 로컬: readFileSync, 원격: net.fetch — 브라우저 보안 제약 없음
      void (async () => {
        try {
          const buffer = await tikke!.sound!.readBuffer(payload.fileId);
          if (!buffer) { cleanup(); return; }
          const ctx = getCtx();
          const decoded = await ctx.decodeAudioData(buffer);
          const source = ctx.createBufferSource();
          const gain = ctx.createGain();
          gain.gain.value = volume;
          source.buffer = decoded;
          source.connect(gain);
          gain.connect(ctx.destination);
          source.onended = cleanup;
          source.start();
          activeSounds.current.set(instanceId, {
            stop: () => { try { source.stop(); } catch {} cleanup(); },
          });
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("[sound-player] AudioContext error:", err);
          cleanup();
        }
      })();
    });

    const unsubStop = tikke.sound.onStopAll(() => {
      for (const s of activeSounds.current.values()) {
        try { s.stop(); } catch {}
      }
      activeSounds.current.clear();
      clearActiveSounds();
    });

    return () => {
      unsubPlay();
      unsubStop();
    };
  }, [addActiveSound, removeActiveSound, clearActiveSounds]);
}

===== ./hooks/useTranslationEngine.ts =====
import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useTranslationStore } from "../stores/translationStore";
import { translationCache } from "../services/translation-cache";
import { translationQueue } from "../services/translation-queue";
import { createProvider, type TranslationProviderName } from "../providers";
import { debounce } from "../utils/debounce";
import type { TranslationSubtitle } from "../stores/translationStore";

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: {
    overlay?: {
      send: (msg: unknown) => Promise<unknown>;
    };
    settings?: {
      getAll: () => Promise<Record<string, unknown>>;
      set: (key: string, value: unknown) => Promise<void>;
    };
  };
};

const ALL_TARGETS = ["en", "ja", "zh-CN", "zh-TW", "fr", "ar", "th"] as const;

export function useTranslationEngine(): {
  translate: (text: string) => void;
  translationError: string | null;
} {
  const config = useTranslationStore((s) => s.config);
  const setConfig = useTranslationStore((s) => s.setConfig);
  const setConfigLoaded = useTranslationStore((s) => s.setConfigLoaded);
  const setCurrentSubtitle = useTranslationStore((s) => s.setCurrentSubtitle);
  const addToHistory = useTranslationStore((s) => s.addToHistory);
  const [translationError, setTranslationError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Load settings from Tikke on first mount
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.settings) { setConfigLoaded(true); return; }
    tikke.settings.getAll().then((all) => {
      setConfig({
        provider: (all.translationProvider as TranslationProviderName) ?? "google",
        showOriginal: Boolean(all.translationShowOriginal ?? true),
        langEn: Boolean(all.translationLangEn ?? true),
        langJa: Boolean(all.translationLangJa ?? true),
        langZhCN: Boolean(all.translationLangZhCN ?? true),
        langZhTW: Boolean(all.translationLangZhTW ?? false),
        langFr: Boolean(all.translationLangFr ?? false),
        langAr: Boolean(all.translationLangAr ?? false),
        langTh: Boolean(all.translationLangTh ?? false),
        fontSizeKo: Number(all.translationFontSizeKo ?? 28),
        fontSizeEn: Number(all.translationFontSizeEn ?? 24),
        fontSizeJa: Number(all.translationFontSizeJa ?? 22),
        fontSizeZhCN: Number(all.translationFontSizeZhCN ?? 22),
        fontSizeZhTW: Number(all.translationFontSizeZhTW ?? 22),
        fontSizeFr: Number(all.translationFontSizeFr ?? 24),
        fontSizeAr: Number(all.translationFontSizeAr ?? 24),
        fontSizeTh: Number(all.translationFontSizeTh ?? 22),
        colorKo: String(all.translationColorKo ?? "#FFFFFF"),
        colorEn: String(all.translationColorEn ?? "#A7F3D0"),
        colorJa: String(all.translationColorJa ?? "#BAE6FD"),
        colorZhCN: String(all.translationColorZhCN ?? "#FDE68A"),
        colorZhTW: String(all.translationColorZhTW ?? "#FCD34D"),
        colorFr: String(all.translationColorFr ?? "#C4B5FD"),
        colorAr: String(all.translationColorAr ?? "#FCA5A5"),
        colorTh: String(all.translationColorTh ?? "#86EFAC"),
        strokeWidth: Number(all.translationStrokeWidth ?? 2),
        shadowBlur: Number(all.translationShadowBlur ?? 6),
        shadowColor: String(all.translationShadowColor ?? "#000000"),
        bgOpacity: Number(all.translationBgOpacity ?? 50),
        displayTimeoutMs: Number(all.translationDisplayTimeoutMs ?? 10000),
        libreUrl: String(all.translationLibreUrl ?? "https://libretranslate.com"),
        papagoProxyUrl: String(all.translationPapagoProxyUrl ?? ""),
      });
      setConfigLoaded(true);
    }).catch(() => setConfigLoaded(true));
  }, []); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  // Wire provider into queue whenever config changes
  const provider = useMemo(
    () => createProvider(config.provider, {
      libreUrl: config.libreUrl,
      papagoProxyUrl: config.papagoProxyUrl,
    }),
    [config.provider, config.libreUrl, config.papagoProxyUrl]
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    translationQueue.setProvider(provider);
  }, [provider]);

  const translateAsync = useCallback(async (text: string): Promise<void> => {
    const activeTargets = ALL_TARGETS.filter((t) => {
      if (t === "en")    return config.langEn;
      if (t === "ja")    return config.langJa;
      if (t === "zh-CN") return config.langZhCN;
      if (t === "zh-TW") return config.langZhTW;
      if (t === "fr")    return config.langFr;
      if (t === "ar")    return config.langAr;
      if (t === "th")    return config.langTh;
      return false;
    });

    // Cache lookup
    const cached: Partial<Record<"en" | "ja" | "zh-CN" | "zh-TW" | "fr" | "ar" | "th", string>> = {};
    const uncached: string[] = [];
    for (const target of activeTargets) {
      const hit = translationCache.get(text, target);
      if (hit !== undefined) cached[target] = hit;
      else uncached.push(target);
    }

    let fresh: Record<string, string> = {};
    if (uncached.length > 0) {
      try {
        fresh = await translationQueue.enqueue(text, "ko", uncached);
        for (const [target, translation] of Object.entries(fresh)) {
          translationCache.set(text, target, translation);
        }
        setTranslationError(null);
      } catch (err) {
        const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
        setTranslationError(`번역 실패: ${msg}`);
        console.error("[TranslationEngine] failed:", err);
      }
    }

    const translations = {
      ...cached,
      ...(fresh as Partial<Record<"en" | "ja" | "zh-CN" | "zh-TW" | "fr" | "ar" | "th", string>>),
    };

    const subtitle: TranslationSubtitle = {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      original: text,
      translations,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
    };

    setCurrentSubtitle(subtitle);
    addToHistory(subtitle);

    // Send to OBS overlay via Tikke's WebSocket broadcast
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (tikke?.overlay) {
      void tikke.overlay.send({
        type: "translation",
        payload: {
          subtitle: { original: text, translations },
          style: {
            showOriginal: config.showOriginal,
            enabledLangs: {
              en: config.langEn, ja: config.langJa,
              "zh-CN": config.langZhCN, "zh-TW": config.langZhTW,
              fr: config.langFr, ar: config.langAr, th: config.langTh,
            },
            fontSizes: {
              ko: config.fontSizeKo,
              en: config.fontSizeEn, ja: config.fontSizeJa,
              "zh-CN": config.fontSizeZhCN, "zh-TW": config.fontSizeZhTW,
              fr: config.fontSizeFr, ar: config.fontSizeAr, th: config.fontSizeTh,
            },
            colors: {
              ko: config.colorKo,
              en: config.colorEn, ja: config.colorJa,
              "zh-CN": config.colorZhCN, "zh-TW": config.colorZhTW,
              fr: config.colorFr, ar: config.colorAr, th: config.colorTh,
            },
            strokeWidth: config.strokeWidth,
            shadowBlur: config.shadowBlur,
            shadowColor: config.shadowColor,
            bgOpacity: config.bgOpacity,
            displayTimeoutMs: config.displayTimeoutMs,
            textAlign: config.textAlign,
          },
        },
      });
    }
  }, [config, setCurrentSubtitle, addToHistory]);

  // Stable debounced wrapper
  const translateAsyncRef = useRef(translateAsync);
  translateAsyncRef.current = translateAsync;
  const debouncedRef = useRef(
    debounce((text: string) => { void translateAsyncRef.current(text); }, 150)
  );

  return { translate: debouncedRef.current, translationError };
}

===== ./hooks/useTTSEngine.ts =====
import { useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";
import { useTTSStore, type TTSConfig, type TTSQueueItem, type MvpUser } from "../stores/ttsStore";
import type { TikkeEvent } from "@tikke/shared";

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: {
    events?: { onEvent: (cb: (e: TikkeEvent) => void) => () => void };
    settings?: {
      getAll: () => Promise<Record<string, unknown>>;
      set: (key: string, value: unknown) => Promise<void>;
    };
    tts?: {
      onSpeak: (cb: (payload: { text: string }) => void) => () => void;
      tiktokLogin: () => Promise<{ sessionId?: string; error?: string }>;
      synthesize: (req: {
        provider: string;
        text: string;
        tiktokSessionId?: string;
        tiktokVoiceId?: string;
        edgeVoiceName?: string;
        googleSpeechV2Key?: string;
        googleSpeechV2Lang?: string;
        googleSpeechV2Gender?: string;
        googleSpeechV2Speed?: number;
        googleSpeechV2Pitch?: number;
      }) => Promise<{ audioBase64?: string; audioUrl?: string; useWebSpeech?: boolean; wsVoiceName?: string; error?: string }>;
    };
  };
};

// ── Text formatting ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const PROFANITY_LIST = ["씨발", "개새끼", "병신", "쓰레기"];

function applyProfanityFilter(text: string): string {
  let result = text;
  for (const word of PROFANITY_LIST) {
    result = result.split(word).join("*".repeat(word.length));
  }
  return result;
}

function getMvpUser(event: TikkeEvent, config: TTSConfig): MvpUser | null {
  if (!config.allowMvpUsers || config.mvpUsers.length === 0) return null;
  const e = event as unknown as Record<string, unknown>;
  const user = e["user"] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
  const uniqueId = String(user?.["uniqueId"] ?? "").toLowerCase();
  return config.mvpUsers.find((u) => u.uniqueId.toLowerCase() === uniqueId) ?? null;
}

function isUserMvp(event: TikkeEvent, config: TTSConfig): boolean {
  return getMvpUser(event, config) !== null;
}

function isUserAllowed(event: TikkeEvent, config: TTSConfig): boolean {
  const e = event as unknown as Record<string, unknown>;
  const raw = e["raw"] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
  const user = e["user"] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
  const uniqueId = String(user?.["uniqueId"] ?? "").toLowerCase();

  // MVP 목록에 있으면 항상 허용 (독립 엔진 사용)
  if (config.allowMvpUsers && config.mvpUsers.some((u) => u.uniqueId.toLowerCase() === uniqueId)) return true;

  const followRole = Number(raw?.["followRole"] ?? 0);
  const isModerator = Boolean(raw?.["isModerator"]);
  const isSubscriber = Boolean(raw?.["isSubscriber"]);
  const topGifterRank = Number(raw?.["topGifterRank"] ?? 0);
  const badgeLevel = Number(raw?.["badgeLevel"] ?? raw?.["teamMemberLevel"] ?? 0);

  const isFollower = followRole >= 1;
  const isNormal = !isFollower && !isModerator && !isSubscriber;

  if (config.allowModerators && isModerator) return true;
  if (config.allowSubscribers && isSubscriber) return true;
  if (config.allowFollowers && isFollower) return true;
  if (config.allowTeamMembers && badgeLevel >= config.teamMembersMinLevel) return true;
  if (config.allowTopGifters && topGifterRank > 0 && topGifterRank <= config.topGiftersTopN) return true;
  if (config.allowNormal && isNormal) return true;

  return false;
}

function formatEventText(event: TikkeEvent, config: TTSConfig): string | null {
  if (!isUserAllowed(event, config)) return null;

  const e = event as unknown as Record<string, unknown>;
  const nick = (e["user"] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined)?.["nickname"] as string | undefined
    ?? (e["user"] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined)?.["uniqueId"] as string | undefined
    ?? "";
  const prefix = config.readUsername && nick ? `${nick}님 ` : "";

  switch (event.type) {
    case "chat": {
      if (!config.eventChat) return null;
      const msg = String(e["message"] ?? "");
      if (!msg.trim()) return null;
      const text = prefix + msg;
      return text.slice(0, config.maxTextLength);
    }
    case "gift": {
      if (!config.eventGift) return null;
      const diamonds = (Number(e["repeatCount"] ?? 1)) * (Number(e["diamondCount"] ?? 0));
      if (diamonds < config.giftMinDiamonds) return null;
      const giftName = String(e["giftName"] ?? "선물");
      const count = Number(e["repeatCount"] ?? 1);
      return `${prefix}${giftName} ${count > 1 ? count + "개 " : ""}보내셨습니다`;
    }
    case "follow":
      if (!config.eventFollow) return null;
      return `${nick ? nick + "님이 " : ""}팔로우했습니다`;
    case "member":
      if (!config.eventMember) return null;
      return `${nick ? nick + "님이 " : ""}입장했습니다`;
    case "share":
      if (!config.eventShare) return null;
      return `${nick ? nick + "님이 " : ""}공유했습니다`;
    case "subscribe":
      if (!config.eventSubscribe) return null;
      return `${nick ? nick + "님이 " : ""}구독했습니다`;
    default:
      return null;
  }
}

// TikTok provider지만 Web Speech API로 처리할 voice ID
const WEB_SPEECH_TIKTOK_IDS = new Set(["default", "google_female", "google_male"]);

// 환경별 한국어 음성 우선순위 (Chromium → Edge Neural → Windows SAPI → macOS → 폴백)
const KOREAN_VOICE_PRIORITY = [
  "Google 한국어",
  "Microsoft Seoyeon Online (Natural) - Korean (Korea)",
  "Microsoft Heami Online (Natural) - Korean (Korea)",
  "Microsoft SunHi Online - Korean (Korea)",
  "Microsoft Seoyeon Desktop - Korean (Korea)",
  "Microsoft Heami Desktop - Korean (Korea)",
  "Yuna",
  "Sora",
];

// MDN 패턴: Chrome은 voiceschanged 이벤트 전까지 getVoices() → [] 반환
// speak 시점이 아닌 로딩 시점에 캐시해야 음성 누락 방지
let cachedVoices: SpeechSynthesisVoice[] = [];

function loadVoices(): void {
  cachedVoices = speechSynthesis.getVoices();
}

function pickKoreanVoice(): SpeechSynthesisVoice | null {
  for (const name of KOREAN_VOICE_PRIORITY) {
    const v = cachedVoices.find((v) => v.name === name);
    if (v) return v;
  }
  return cachedVoices.find((v) => v.lang.startsWith("ko")) ?? null;
}

// ── Hook ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export function useTTSEngine(): void {
  // 일반 큐 처리용
  const isSpeakingRef = useRef(false);
  const utteranceRef = useRef<SpeechSynthesisUtterance | null>(null);
  const stopAudioRef = useRef<(() => void) | null>(null);
  // MVP 독립 큐 처리용
  const isMvpSpeakingRef = useRef(false);
  const mvpUtteranceRef = useRef<SpeechSynthesisUtterance | null>(null);
  const mvpStopAudioRef = useRef<(() => void) | null>(null);

  const configRef = useRef<TTSConfig>(useTTSStore.getState().config);

  useEffect(() => {
    return useTTSStore.subscribe((state) => {
      configRef.current = state.config;
    });
  }, []);

  // MDN 패턴: 즉시 + voiceschanged 이벤트 — Chrome은 비동기 로딩
  useEffect(() => {
    loadVoices();
    speechSynthesis.addEventListener("voiceschanged", loadVoices);
    return () => speechSynthesis.removeEventListener("voiceschanged", loadVoices);
  }, []);

  const processQueue = useCallback((): void => {
    if (isSpeakingRef.current) return;
    const state = useTTSStore.getState();
    if (state.queue.length === 0) {
      state.setSpeaking(false);
      state.setCurrentItem(null);
      return;
    }

    const item = state.dequeue();
    if (!item) return;

    isSpeakingRef.current = true;
    state.setSpeaking(true);
    state.setCurrentItem(item);

    const cfg = configRef.current;
    let text = item.text;
    if (cfg.profanityFilter) text = applyProfanityFilter(text);

    const isWebSpeechTiktok = cfg.provider === "tiktok" &&
      (WEB_SPEECH_TIKTOK_IDS.has(cfg.tiktokVoiceId) || cfg.tiktokVoiceId.startsWith("webspeech:"));
    const useWebSpeech = cfg.provider === "webspeech" || isWebSpeechTiktok;

    if (useWebSpeech) {
      let wsVoiceName = cfg.provider === "webspeech" ? cfg.voiceName : "";
      if (isWebSpeechTiktok) {
        wsVoiceName = cfg.tiktokVoiceId.startsWith("webspeech:")
          ? cfg.tiktokVoiceId.slice(10)
          : (pickKoreanVoice()?.name ?? "");
      }
      const overrideCfg = { ...cfg, provider: "webspeech" as const, voiceName: wsVoiceName };
      speakWebSpeech(text, overrideCfg, utteranceRef, isSpeakingRef, () => {
        useTTSStore.getState().setCurrentItem(null);
        processQueue();
      });
    } else {
      void speakExternal(text, cfg, stopAudioRef, isSpeakingRef, () => {
        useTTSStore.getState().setCurrentItem(null);
        processQueue();
      });
    }
  }, []);

  const processMvpQueue = useCallback((): void => {
    if (isMvpSpeakingRef.current) return;
    const state = useTTSStore.getState();
    if (state.mvpQueue.length === 0) {
      state.setMvpSpeaking(false);
      state.setMvpCurrentItem(null);
      return;
    }

    const item = state.dequeueMvp();
    if (!item) return;

    isMvpSpeakingRef.current = true;
    state.setMvpSpeaking(true);
    state.setMvpCurrentItem(item);

    const cfg = configRef.current;
    let text = item.text;
    if (cfg.profanityFilter) text = applyProfanityFilter(text);

    // 해당 사용자의 개별 MVP 설정 조회
    const mvpUser = item.mvpUniqueId
      ? cfg.mvpUsers.find((u) => u.uniqueId.toLowerCase() === item.mvpUniqueId!.toLowerCase())
      : undefined;
    const mvpCfg: TTSConfig = mvpUser?.provider
      ? {
          ...cfg,
          provider: mvpUser.provider as TTSConfig["provider"],
          voiceName: mvpUser.voiceName || cfg.voiceName,
          tiktokVoiceId: mvpUser.tiktokVoiceId || cfg.tiktokVoiceId,
          edgeVoiceName: mvpUser.edgeVoiceName || cfg.edgeVoiceName,
          rate: mvpUser.rate ?? cfg.rate,
          pitch: mvpUser.pitch ?? cfg.pitch,
          volume: mvpUser.volume ?? cfg.volume,
        }
      : cfg;

    const isMvpWebSpeechTiktok = mvpCfg.provider === "tiktok" &&
      (WEB_SPEECH_TIKTOK_IDS.has(mvpCfg.tiktokVoiceId) || mvpCfg.tiktokVoiceId.startsWith("webspeech:"));
    const useMvpWebSpeech = mvpCfg.provider === "webspeech" || isMvpWebSpeechTiktok;

    if (useMvpWebSpeech) {
      let mvpWsVoiceName = mvpCfg.provider === "webspeech" ? mvpCfg.voiceName : "";
      if (isMvpWebSpeechTiktok) {
        mvpWsVoiceName = mvpCfg.tiktokVoiceId.startsWith("webspeech:")
          ? mvpCfg.tiktokVoiceId.slice(10)
          : (pickKoreanVoice()?.name ?? "");
      }
      const overrideMvpCfg = { ...mvpCfg, provider: "webspeech" as const, voiceName: mvpWsVoiceName };
      speakWebSpeech(text, overrideMvpCfg, mvpUtteranceRef, isMvpSpeakingRef, () => {
        useTTSStore.getState().setMvpCurrentItem(null);
        processMvpQueue();
      });
    } else {
      void speakExternal(text, mvpCfg, mvpStopAudioRef, isMvpSpeakingRef, () => {
        useTTSStore.getState().setMvpCurrentItem(null);
        processMvpQueue();
      });
    }
  }, []);

  // Subscribe to TikTok events
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.events?.onEvent) return;

    return tikke.events.onEvent((event: TikkeEvent) => {
      const cfg = configRef.current;
      if (!cfg.enabled) return;

      const text = formatEventText(event, cfg);
      if (!text) return;

      const mvpUser = getMvpUser(event, cfg);
      const isMvp = mvpUser !== null;
      const e = event as unknown as Record<string, unknown>;
      const userUniqueId = String((e["user"] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined)?.["uniqueId"] ?? "");
      const item: TTSQueueItem = {
        id: event.id,
        text,
        eventType: event.type,
        timestamp: event.timestamp,
        isMvp,
        mvpUniqueId: isMvp ? userUniqueId : undefined,
      };

      if (isMvp) {
        useTTSStore.getState().enqueueMvp(item);
        processMvpQueue();
      } else {
        useTTSStore.getState().enqueue(item);
        processQueue();
      }
    });
  }, [processQueue]);

  // Load config from settings on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.settings) {
      useTTSStore.getState().setLoaded(true);
      return;
    }

    tikke.settings.getAll().then((all: Record<string, unknown>) => {
      const s = useTTSStore.getState();
      s.setConfig({
        enabled: Boolean(all["ttsEnabled"] ?? true),
        provider: (String(all["ttsProvider"] ?? "edge")) as import("../stores/ttsStore").TTSProvider,
        voiceName: String(all["ttsVoiceName"] ?? ""),
        rate: Number(all["ttsRate"] ?? 1.0),
        pitch: Number(all["ttsPitch"] ?? 1.0),
        volume: Number(all["ttsVolume"] ?? 1.0),
        tiktokSessionId: String(all["ttsTiktokSessionId"] ?? ""),
        tiktokVoiceId: String(all["ttsTiktokVoiceId"] ?? "gspeech:ko-KR:female"),
        readUsername: Boolean(all["ttsReadUsername"] ?? true),
        eventChat: Boolean(all["ttsEventChat"] ?? true),
        eventGift: Boolean(all["ttsEventGift"] ?? true),
        eventFollow: Boolean(all["ttsEventFollow"] ?? true),
        eventMember: Boolean(all["ttsEventMember"] ?? false),
        eventShare: Boolean(all["ttsEventShare"] ?? false),
        eventSubscribe: Boolean(all["ttsEventSubscribe"] ?? true),
        giftMinDiamonds: Number(all["ttsGiftMinDiamonds"] ?? 0),
        maxTextLength: Number(all["ttsMaxTextLength"] ?? 100),
        profanityFilter: Boolean(all["ttsProfanityFilter"] ?? false),
        allowNormal: Boolean(all["ttsAllowNormal"] ?? true),
        allowFollowers: Boolean(all["ttsAllowFollowers"] ?? true),
        allowSubscribers: Boolean(all["ttsAllowSubscribers"] ?? true),
        allowModerators: Boolean(all["ttsAllowModerators"] ?? true),
        allowTeamMembers: Boolean(all["ttsAllowTeamMembers"] ?? true),
        teamMembersMinLevel: Number(all["ttsTeamMembersMinLevel"] ?? 1),
        allowTopGifters: Boolean(all["ttsAllowTopGifters"] ?? true),
        topGiftersTopN: Number(all["ttsTopGiftersTopN"] ?? 3),
        allowMvpUsers: Boolean(all["ttsAllowMvpUsers"] ?? false),
        edgeVoiceName: String(all["ttsEdgeVoiceName"] ?? "ko-KR-SunHiNeural"),
        googleSpeechV2Key: String(all["ttsGoogleSpeechV2Key"] ?? ""),
        googleSpeechV2Lang: String(all["ttsGoogleSpeechV2Lang"] ?? "ko-KR"),
        googleSpeechV2Gender: (String(all["ttsGoogleSpeechV2Gender"] ?? "female")) as "female" | "male",
        googleSpeechV2Speed: Number(all["ttsGoogleSpeechV2Speed"] ?? 0.50),
        googleSpeechV2Pitch: Number(all["ttsGoogleSpeechV2Pitch"] ?? 0.50),
        mvpUsers: (() => {
          try { return JSON.parse(String(all["ttsMvpUsers"] ?? "[]")) as import("../stores/ttsStore").MvpUser[]; }
          catch { return []; }
        })(),
      });
      s.setLoaded(true);
    }).catch(() => {
      useTTSStore.getState().setLoaded(true);
    });
  }, []);

  // Receive TTS speak requests from main process (e.g. command engine)
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.tts?.onSpeak) return;
    return tikke.tts.onSpeak(({ text }) => {
      const cfg = configRef.current;
      if (!cfg.enabled) return;
      const item: TTSQueueItem = {
        id: `cmd_${Date.now()}`,
        text,
        eventType: "command",
        timestamp: Date.now(),
      };
      useTTSStore.getState().enqueue(item);
      processQueue();
    });
  }, [processQueue]);

  // Expose stop/clear globally via store
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (): void => {
      speechSynthesis.cancel();
      if (stopAudioRef.current) { stopAudioRef.current(); stopAudioRef.current = null; }
      if (mvpStopAudioRef.current) { mvpStopAudioRef.current(); mvpStopAudioRef.current = null; }
      isSpeakingRef.current = false;
      isMvpSpeakingRef.current = false;
      utteranceRef.current = null;
      mvpUtteranceRef.current = null;
      const state = useTTSStore.getState();
      state.clearQueue();
      state.setSpeaking(false);
      state.setCurrentItem(null);
      state.clearMvpQueue();
      state.setMvpSpeaking(false);
      state.setMvpCurrentItem(null);
    };
    window.addEventListener("tikke:tts:stop", handler);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("tikke:tts:stop", handler);
  }, []);
}

// ── Provider implementations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

function speakWebSpeech(
  text: string,
  cfg: TTSConfig,
  utteranceRef: { current: SpeechSynthesisUtterance | null },
  isSpeakingRef: { current: boolean },
  onDone: () => void,
): void {
  const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
  utterance.lang = "ko-KR";
  utterance.rate = cfg.rate;
  utterance.pitch = cfg.pitch;
  utterance.volume = cfg.volume;

  // cachedVoices 사용 (voiceschanged 이후 보장) — speak 시점 getVoices() 호출 금지
  const voice = cfg.voiceName
    ? (cachedVoices.find((v) => v.name === cfg.voiceName) ?? pickKoreanVoice())
    : pickKoreanVoice();
  if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;

  // Chrome/Electron bug: 발화 ~15s 이상 시 speechSynthesis 묵음 정지
  // pause→resume 주기 호출로 방지
  const watchdog = window.setInterval(() => {
    if (!speechSynthesis.speaking) { clearInterval(watchdog); return; }
    speechSynthesis.pause();
    speechSynthesis.resume();
  }, 14000);

  utterance.onend = () => {
    clearInterval(watchdog);
    isSpeakingRef.current = false;
    onDone();
  };
  utterance.onerror = (e) => {
    clearInterval(watchdog);
    if (e.error !== "interrupted") console.error("[tts] utterance error:", e.error);
    isSpeakingRef.current = false;
    onDone();
  };

  utteranceRef.current = utterance;
  speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
}

async function speakExternal(
  text: string,
  cfg: TTSConfig,
  stopAudioRef: { current: (() => void) | null },
  isSpeakingRef: { current: boolean },
  onDone: () => void,
): Promise<void> {
  const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
  if (!tikke?.tts?.synthesize) {
    console.error("[tts] synthesize IPC not available");
    isSpeakingRef.current = false;
    onDone();
    return;
  }

  const result = await tikke.tts.synthesize({
    provider: cfg.provider,
    text,
    tiktokSessionId: cfg.tiktokSessionId,
    tiktokVoiceId: cfg.tiktokVoiceId,
    edgeVoiceName: cfg.edgeVoiceName,
    googleSpeechV2Key: cfg.googleSpeechV2Key,
    googleSpeechV2Lang: cfg.googleSpeechV2Lang,
    googleSpeechV2Gender: cfg.googleSpeechV2Gender,
    googleSpeechV2Speed: cfg.googleSpeechV2Speed,
    googleSpeechV2Pitch: cfg.googleSpeechV2Pitch,
  });

  // useWebSpeech: google_female 또는 webspeech:* — Web Speech API로 재생
  if (result.useWebSpeech) {
    let voiceName = result.wsVoiceName ?? "";
    if (!voiceName) {
      // google_female/default → Google 한국어 자동 선택
      voiceName = pickKoreanVoice()?.name ?? "";
    }
    speakWebSpeech(text, { ...cfg, provider: "webspeech" as const, voiceName }, stopAudioRef as unknown as { current: SpeechSynthesisUtterance | null }, isSpeakingRef, onDone);
    return;
  }

  // audioUrl: <audio> element 직접 재생
  if (result.audioUrl) {
    await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
      const audio = new Audio(result.audioUrl);
      audio.volume = cfg.volume;
      stopAudioRef.current = () => { audio.pause(); audio.src = ""; resolve(); };
      audio.onended = () => { stopAudioRef.current = null; resolve(); };
      audio.onerror = () => { stopAudioRef.current = null; resolve(); };
      void audio.play().catch(() => resolve());
    });
    isSpeakingRef.current = false;
    onDone();
    return;
  }

  if (result.error || !result.audioBase64) {
    console.error("[tts] synthesize error:", result.error);
    isSpeakingRef.current = false;
    onDone();
    return;
  }

  try {
    const binary = atob(result.audioBase64);
    const bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
    for (let i = 0; i < binary.length; i++) bytes[i] = binary.charCodeAt(i);

    const audioCtx = new AudioContext();
    const audioBuffer = await audioCtx.decodeAudioData(bytes.buffer);
    const source = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
    source.buffer = audioBuffer;
    source.playbackRate.value = cfg.rate;
    source.detune.value = (cfg.pitch - 1.0) * 1200;
    const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
    gain.gain.value = cfg.volume;
    source.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);

    stopAudioRef.current = () => {
      try { source.stop(); } catch { /* already stopped */ }
      void audioCtx.close();
    };

    await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
      source.onended = () => { void audioCtx.close(); stopAudioRef.current = null; resolve(); };
      source.start(0);
    });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("[tts] audio playback error:", err);
  }

  isSpeakingRef.current = false;
  onDone();
}

export function stopTTS(): void {
  window.dispatchEvent(new Event("tikke:tts:stop"));
}

===== ./pages/AppSettings.tsx =====
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import type { AppSettings } from "../../electron/services/settings";

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: {
    settings?: {
      getAll: () => Promise<AppSettings>;
      set: (key: keyof AppSettings, value: AppSettings[keyof AppSettings]) => Promise<void>;
    };
    cloud?: {
      push: () => Promise<{ ok: boolean; error?: string }>;
      pull: () => Promise<{ ok: boolean; error?: string; count?: number }>;
    };
  };
};

function Row({ label, children }: { label: string; children: React.ReactNode }): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div style={{
      display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between",
      padding: "12px 0",
      borderBottom: "1px solid var(--border)",
    }}>
      <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "var(--text)" }}>{label}</span>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>{children}</div>
    </div>
  );
}

function Toggle({ value, onChange }: { value: boolean; onChange: (v: boolean) => void }): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={() => onChange(!value)}
      style={{
        width: 40, height: 22, borderRadius: 11,
        background: value ? "var(--primary)" : "var(--border)",
        border: "none", cursor: "pointer", position: "relative",
        transition: "background 0.2s", flexShrink: 0,
      }}
    >
      <div style={{
        position: "absolute",
        top: 3, left: value ? 21 : 3,
        width: 16, height: 16, borderRadius: "50%",
        background: value ? "#000" : "var(--text-muted)",
        transition: "left 0.2s",
      }} />
    </button>
  );
}

function NumberInput({ value, onChange, min, max, step = 1 }: {
  value: number; onChange: (v: number) => void;
  min?: number; max?: number; step?: number;
}): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <input
      type="number"
      value={value}
      min={min} max={max} step={step}
      onChange={(e) => onChange(Number(e.target.value))}
      style={{
        width: 80, background: "var(--surface-2)",
        border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 6,
        padding: "5px 8px", color: "var(--text)",
        fontSize: 13, outline: "none", textAlign: "right",
      }}
    />
  );
}


export function AppSettings(): React.ReactElement {
  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<AppSettings | null>(null);
  const [saved, setSaved] = useState(false);
  const [cloudStatus, setCloudStatus] = useState<{ ok?: boolean; error?: string; count?: number; action?: string } | null>(null);

  const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;

  useEffect(() => {
    tikke?.settings?.getAll().then(setSettings).catch(() => {});
  }, [tikke]);

  async function update<K extends keyof AppSettings>(key: K, value: AppSettings[K]): Promise<void> {
    setSettings((prev) => prev ? { ...prev, [key]: value } : prev);
    await tikke?.settings?.set(key, value);
    setSaved(true);
    setTimeout(() => setSaved(false), 1500);
  }

  async function handleCloudPush(): Promise<void> {
    setCloudStatus({ action: "push" });
    const result = await tikke?.cloud?.push();
    setCloudStatus({ ...result, action: "push" });
    setTimeout(() => setCloudStatus(null), 4000);
  }

  async function handleCloudPull(): Promise<void> {
    setCloudStatus({ action: "pull" });
    const result = await tikke?.cloud?.pull();
    setCloudStatus({ ...result, action: "pull" });
    if (result?.ok) {
      // Reload settings from DB
      tikke?.settings?.getAll().then(setSettings).catch(() => {});
    }
    setTimeout(() => setCloudStatus(null), 4000);
  }

  if (!settings) {
    return (
      <div style={{ padding: 24, flex: 1, color: "var(--text-muted)", fontSize: 13 }}>
        설정을 불러오는 중...
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: 24, flex: 1, overflowY: "auto" }}>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12, marginBottom: 24 }}>
        <h1 style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, flex: 1 }}>앱 설정</h1>
        {saved && (
          <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "#34D399", fontWeight: 600 }}>✓ 저장됨</span>
        )}
        <button
          onClick={() => void (async () => {
            if (!tikke?.settings || !settings) return;
            const entries = Object.entries(settings) as [keyof AppSettings, AppSettings[keyof AppSettings]][];
            await Promise.all(entries.map(([k, v]) => tikke.settings!.set(k, v)));
            setSaved(true);
            setTimeout(() => setSaved(false), 2000);
          })()}
          style={{
            padding: "6px 14px",
            background: saved ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.12)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)",
            border: `1px solid ${saved ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.4)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.3)"}`,
            borderRadius: 6,
            color: saved ? "#34D399" : "var(--primary)",
            cursor: "pointer",
            fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700,
          }}
        >
          설정 저장
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Cloud Sync */}
      <section style={{ marginBottom: 28 }}>
