      { label: "스핀", color: "#FF0050", send: { type: "slotmachine" } },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "chat",
    name: "💬 채팅 오버레이",
    description: "실시간 채팅 메시지를 OBS 화면에 표시.",
    path: "/overlay/chat",
    tags: ["채팅"],
  },
  {
    id: "gift",
    name: "🎁 선물 오버레이",
    description: "선물 수신 시 팝업 알림 표시.",
    path: "/overlay/gift",
    tags: ["선물"],
  },
  {
    id: "marquee",
    name: "📜 자막 롤",
    description: "가로 스크롤 자막 텍스트. 공지·이벤트 안내에 활용.",
    path: "/overlay/marquee",
    tags: ["텍스트"],
    testActions: [
      { label: "테스트 자막", color: "#00F2EA", send: { type: "marquee", text: "테스트 자막입니다! 🎉", durationMs: 6000 } },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "fireworks",
    name: "🎆 불꽃 효과",
    description: "구독·선물 등 특별 이벤트 시 불꽃 파티클 연출.",
    path: "/overlay/fireworks",
    tags: ["효과"],
    testActions: [
      { label: "불꽃 발사", color: "#FB923C", send: { type: "fireworks", intensity: 5, durationMs: 4000 } },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "translation",
    name: "🌐 번역 자막",
    description: "STT로 실시간 음성 인식 후 번역 자막 표시.",
    path: "/overlay/translation",
    tags: ["번역", "자막"],
  },
  {
    id: "menu-board",
    name: "🎛 메뉴판",
    description: "선물 수신 시 해당 셀 하이라이트되는 인터랙티브 그리드.",
    path: "/overlay/menu-board",
    tags: ["선물", "게임"],
  },
  {
    id: "timer",
    name: "⏱ 타이머",
    description: "카운트다운/스톱워치 오버레이.",
    path: "/overlay/timer",
    tags: ["유틸"],
  },
];

const TAG_COLOR: Record<string, string> = {
  선물: "#FF0050", 채팅: "#00F2EA", 게임: "#A78BFA",
  효과: "#FB923C", 텍스트: "#60A5FA", 번역: "#34D399",
  자막: "#34D399", 인터랙티브: "#FBBF24", 유틸: "#94A3B8",
};

export function EventOverlay(): React.ReactElement {
  const [cloudUrls, setCloudUrls] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [httpPort, setHttpPort] = useState(18181);
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [previewing, setPreviewing] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const iframeRefs = useRef<Record<string, HTMLIFrameElement | null>>({});

  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    tikke?.cloudOverlay?.getUrls().then(setCloudUrls).catch(() => {});
    tikke?.overlay?.getStatus().then((s) => setHttpPort(s.httpPort ?? 18181)).catch(() => {});
  }, []);

  const ID_TO_LABEL: Record<string, string> = {
    "slot-machine": "벌칙머신",
    "chat": "채팅", "gift": "선물", "marquee": "자막 롤",
    "fireworks": "불꽃", "translation": "번역 자막",
    "menu-board": "메뉴판", "timer": "타이머", "video": "영상",
  };

  // OBS 복사용 = 클라우드 URL
  // getUrls()에 없는 항목은 room key로 직접 생성
  function cloudUrl(card: OverlayCard): string {
    const label = ID_TO_LABEL[card.id];
    if (label && cloudUrls[label]) return cloudUrls[label];
    // fallback: 다른 URL에서 room key 추출해 직접 생성
    const anyUrl = Object.values(cloudUrls)[0] ?? "";
    const roomMatch = anyUrl.match(/[?&]room=([^&]+)/);
    if (roomMatch) {
      return `https://tikke-web.pages.dev/overlay/${card.id}.html?room=${roomMatch[1]}`;
    }
    return Object.keys(cloudUrls).length === 0 ? "로딩 중..." : "URL 없음";
  }

  // 미리보기 = 로컬 URL (window.tikke 접근 가능)
  function previewUrl(card: OverlayCard): string {
    const base = `http://localhost:${httpPort}${card.path}`;
    if (card.testQuery) return base + card.testQuery;
    return base;
  }

  function copyUrl(card: OverlayCard): void {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    const url = cloudUrl(card);
    if (url === "로딩 중...") return;
    tikke?.clipboard?.write(url).then(() => {
      setCopied(card.id);
      setTimeout(() => setCopied(null), 1800);
    }).catch(() => {});
  }

  function sendTest(cardId: string, action: TestAction): void {
    // iframe contentWindow에 직접 호출 (test mode는 WS 미연결)
    const iframe = iframeRefs.current[cardId];
    const cw = iframe?.contentWindow as (Window & { triggerSpin?: (o: unknown) => void }) | null;
    if (cw?.triggerSpin) {
      cw.triggerSpin({});
      return;
    }
    // fallback: WS 브로드캐스트
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    void tikke?.overlay?.send(action.send);
  }

  const inputStyle: React.CSSProperties = {
    background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)",
    borderRadius: 5, padding: "4px 8px", color: "var(--text-muted)",
    fontSize: 11, outline: "none", flex: 1, overflow: "hidden",
    textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap",
  };

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: 24, overflowY: "auto", flex: 1, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 20 }}>
      {/* 헤더 */}
      <div>
        <h1 style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 4 }}>이벤트 오버레이</h1>
        <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>
          OBS Browser Source에 추가할 클라우드 오버레이 URL을 복사하세요.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* 카드 그리드 */}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr))", gap: 16 }}>
        {OVERLAYS.map((card) => {
          const isPreviewing = previewing === card.id;
          return (
            <div
              key={card.id}
              style={{
                background: "var(--surface)",
                border: "1px solid var(--border)",
                borderRadius: 14,
                overflow: "hidden",
                display: "flex",
                flexDirection: "column",
                transition: "border-color 0.15s",
              }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => { e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "rgba(0,242,234,0.3)"; }}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => { e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "var(--border)"; }}
            >
              {/* 미리보기 영역 */}
              <div style={{
                height: 180,
                background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.6)",
                position: "relative",
                overflow: "hidden",
                cursor: "pointer",
                display: "flex",
                alignItems: "center",
                justifyContent: "center",
              }}
                onClick={() => setPreviewing(isPreviewing ? null : card.id)}
              >
                {isPreviewing ? (
                  <iframe
                    ref={(el) => { iframeRefs.current[card.id] = el; }}
                    src={previewUrl(card)}
                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%", border: "none", background: "transparent" }}
                    title={card.name}
                  />
                ) : (
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 36 }}>{card.name.split(" ")[0]}</span>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 12 }}>클릭하여 미리보기</span>
                  </div>
                )}
                {/* 미리보기 배지 */}
                {isPreviewing && (
                  <div style={{
                    position: "absolute", top: 8, right: 8,
                    padding: "2px 8px", borderRadius: 4,
                    background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.15)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)",
                    color: "var(--primary)", fontSize: 10, fontWeight: 700,
                  }}>
                    LIVE
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>

              {/* 카드 내용 */}
              <div style={{ padding: "14px 16px", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10, flex: 1 }}>
                {/* 이름 + 태그 */}
                <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 8 }}>
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 700, color: "var(--text)" }}>{card.name}</span>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 4, flexWrap: "wrap", justifyContent: "flex-end" }}>
                    {card.tags.map(tag => (
                      <span key={tag} style={{
                        fontSize: 9, fontWeight: 700, padding: "1px 6px", borderRadius: 99,
                        background: `${TAG_COLOR[tag] ?? "#94A3B8"}18`,
                        color: TAG_COLOR[tag] ?? "#94A3B8",
                        border: `1px solid ${TAG_COLOR[tag] ?? "#94A3B8"}33`,
                      }}>{tag}</span>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* 설명 */}
                <p style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", lineHeight: 1.5, margin: 0 }}>
                  {card.description}
                </p>

                {/* URL 복사 */}
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, alignItems: "center" }}>
                  <input readOnly value={cloudUrl(card)} style={inputStyle} />
                  <button
                    onClick={() => copyUrl(card)}
                    style={{
                      padding: "5px 12px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", flexShrink: 0,
                      background: copied === card.id ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.12)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)",
                      border: `1px solid ${copied === card.id ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.3)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.25)"}`,
                      color: copied === card.id ? "#34D399" : "var(--primary)",
                      transition: "all 0.15s",
                    }}
                  >
                    {copied === card.id ? "✓ 복사됨" : "URL 복사"}
                  </button>
                </div>

                {/* 테스트 버튼 */}
                {card.testActions && card.testActions.length > 0 && (
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, borderTop: "1px solid var(--border)", paddingTop: 8 }}>
                    {card.testActions.map((action) => (
                      <button
                        key={action.label}
                        onClick={() => sendTest(card.id, action)}
                        style={{
                          padding: "5px 12px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer",
                          background: `${action.color}15`,
                          border: `1px solid ${action.color}40`,
                          color: action.color,
                        }}
                      >
                        ▷ {action.label}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", textAlign: "center", paddingBottom: 8 }}>
        카드 클릭 → 미리보기 · URL 복사 → OBS Browser Source에 붙여넣기
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== ./pages/EventOverlay.tsx =====
// 이벤트 오버레이 갤러리 — 미리보기 + URL 복사 + 테스트 + 설정
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: {
    overlay?: {
      getStatus: () => Promise<{ running: boolean; httpPort: number }>;
      send: (msg: unknown) => Promise<void>;
    };
    cloudOverlay?: { getUrls: () => Promise<Record<string, string>> };
    clipboard?: { write: (text: string) => Promise<void> };
    settings?: {
      getAll: () => Promise<Record<string, unknown>>;
      set: (key: string, value: unknown) => Promise<void>;
    };
  };
};

interface OverlayCard {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  path: string;
  testQuery?: string;
  tags: string[];
  testActions?: TestAction[];
}

interface TestAction {
  label: string;
  color: string;
  send: unknown;
}

// 오버레이별 duration 설정 키 + 기본값
const DURATION_CONFIG: Record<string, { key: string; label: string; default: number }> = {
  chat:      { key: "overlayChatDurationMs",      label: "표시 시간 (0=자동 유지)", default: 0    },
  gift:      { key: "overlayGiftDurationMs",       label: "팝업 유지 시간",          default: 6000 },
  marquee:   { key: "overlayMarqueeDurationMs",    label: "자막 지속 시간",          default: 8000 },
  fireworks: { key: "overlayFireworksDurationMs",  label: "불꽃 지속 시간",          default: 3000 },
};

// 미리보기 없이 카드만 표시할 오버레이

        { row: 1, col: 1, title: "선물 5", giftId: 5, backgroundColor: "rgba(52,211,153,0.35)", textColor: "#fff", fontSize: 13 },
        { row: 1, col: 2, title: "선물 6", giftId: 6, backgroundColor: "rgba(96,165,250,0.35)", textColor: "#fff", fontSize: 13 },
      ] } } },
      { label: "셀 하이라이트", color: "#FBBF24", send: { type: "gift", payload: { giftId: 1 } } },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "timer",
    name: "⏱ 타이머",
    description: "카운트다운/스톱워치 오버레이.",
    path: "/overlay/timer",
    tags: ["유틸"],
    testActions: [
      { label: "60초 카운트다운", color: "#FBBF24", send: { type: "timer_sync", payload: { mode: "countdown", targetMs: 60000, elapsedMs: 0, isRunning: true, color: "#00F2EA", fontSize: 80, bgOpacity: 0, bgColor: "#000000", align: "center", showMs: false } } },
    ],
  },
];

const TAG_COLOR: Record<string, string> = {
  선물: "#FF0050", 채팅: "#00F2EA", 게임: "#A78BFA",
  효과: "#FB923C", 텍스트: "#60A5FA", 번역: "#34D399",
  자막: "#34D399", 인터랙티브: "#FBBF24", 유틸: "#94A3B8",
};

// 슬롯머신 항목 파싱 ("라벨 (가중치)" 형식)
function parseSlotItems(raw: string): Array<{ label: string; weight: number }> {
  return raw.split("\n").map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean).map(line => {
    const wMatch = line.match(/\((\d+)\)\s*$/);
    const weight = wMatch ? parseInt(wMatch[1]) : 10;
    const label = line.replace(/\s*\(\d+\)\s*$/, "").trim();
    return { label, weight };
  });
}

export function EventOverlay(): React.ReactElement {
  const [cloudUrls, setCloudUrls] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [httpPort, setHttpPort] = useState(18181);
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [previewing, setPreviewing] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [settingsOpen, setSettingsOpen] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<Record<string, unknown>>({});
  const [savedKey, setSavedKey] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const iframeRefs = useRef<Record<string, HTMLIFrameElement | null>>({});
  const pendingActionRef = useRef<Record<string, TestAction | null>>({});

  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    tikke?.cloudOverlay?.getUrls().then(setCloudUrls).catch(() => {});
    tikke?.overlay?.getStatus().then((s) => setHttpPort(s.httpPort ?? 18181)).catch(() => {});
    tikke?.settings?.getAll().then(setConfig).catch(() => {});
  }, []);

  const saveSetting = useCallback(async (key: string, value: unknown) => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    await tikke?.settings?.set(key, value);
    setConfig(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: value }));
    setSavedKey(key);
    setTimeout(() => setSavedKey(null), 1500);
  }, []);

  const ID_TO_LABEL: Record<string, string> = {
    "slot-machine": "벌칙머신",
    "chat": "채팅", "gift": "선물", "marquee": "자막 롤",
    "fireworks": "불꽃", "translation": "번역 자막",
    "menu-board": "메뉴판", "timer": "타이머", "video": "영상",
  };

  function getBaseCloudUrl(card: OverlayCard): string {
    const label = ID_TO_LABEL[card.id];
    if (label && cloudUrls[label]) return cloudUrls[label];
    // room key 추출: 새 형식 /overlay/{type}/{room} 또는 구 형식 ?room=KEY
    const anyUrl = Object.values(cloudUrls)[0] ?? "";
    const pathMatch = anyUrl.match(/\/overlay\/[^/]+\/([^/?]+)$/);
    if (pathMatch) return `https://tikke-web.pages.dev/overlay/${card.id}/${pathMatch[1]}`;
    const roomMatch = anyUrl.match(/[?&]room=([^&]+)/);
    if (roomMatch) return `https://tikke-web.pages.dev/overlay/${card.id}/${roomMatch[1]}`;
    return Object.keys(cloudUrls).length === 0 ? "로딩 중..." : "URL 없음";
  }

  function cloudUrl(card: OverlayCard): string {
    const base = getBaseCloudUrl(card);
    if (base === "로딩 중..." || base === "URL 없음") return base;
    const dc = DURATION_CONFIG[card.id];
    if (!dc) return base;
    const ms = Number(config[dc.key] ?? dc.default);
    if (ms <= 0 && card.id !== "chat") return base;
    const sep = base.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
    return `${base}${sep}duration=${ms}`;
  }

  function previewUrl(card: OverlayCard): string {
    const base = `http://localhost:${httpPort}${card.path}`;
    const query = card.testQuery ? card.testQuery + "&mute=1" : "?mute=1";
    return base + query;
  }

  function copyUrl(card: OverlayCard): void {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    const url = cloudUrl(card);
    if (url === "로딩 중...") return;
    tikke?.clipboard?.write(url).then(() => {
      setCopied(card.id);
      setTimeout(() => setCopied(null), 1800);
    }).catch(() => {});
  }

  // 슬롯머신은 저장된 설정을 send 페이로드에 반영
  function buildSend(card: OverlayCard, action: TestAction): unknown {
    if (card.id !== "slot-machine") return action.send;
    const itemsRaw = String(config.slotMachineItems ?? "");
    const title = String(config.slotMachineTitle ?? "");
    const spinMs = Number(config.slotMachineSpinMs ?? 2400);
    const extra: Record<string, unknown> = {};
    if (itemsRaw.trim()) extra.slotItems = parseSlotItems(itemsRaw);
    if (title.trim()) extra.title = title;
    if (spinMs) extra.spinDurationMs = spinMs;
    return { ...(action.send as object), ...extra };
  }

  function sendTest(cardId: string, action: TestAction): void {
    const send = buildSend(OVERLAYS.find(c => c.id === cardId)!, action);
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    void tikke?.overlay?.send(send);

    const iframe = iframeRefs.current[cardId];
    if (previewing === cardId && iframe?.contentWindow) {
      iframe.contentWindow.postMessage(send, "*");
      return;
    }
    pendingActionRef.current[cardId] = { ...action, send };
    setPreviewing(cardId);
  }

  const baseInput: React.CSSProperties = {
    background: "var(--surface)", border: "1px solid var(--border)",
    borderRadius: 5, padding: "5px 8px", color: "var(--text)",
    fontSize: 12, outline: "none", width: "100%",
  };

  const urlInput: React.CSSProperties = {
    background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)",
    borderRadius: 5, padding: "4px 8px", color: "var(--text-muted)",
    fontSize: 11, outline: "none", flex: 1, overflow: "hidden",
    textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap",
  };

  function renderSettingsPanel(card: OverlayCard): React.ReactElement | null {
    if (settingsOpen !== card.id) return null;

    const dc = DURATION_CONFIG[card.id];

    return (
      <div style={{ borderTop: "1px solid var(--border)", padding: "12px 16px", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.2)", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10 }}>
        {/* Duration 설정 (chat/gift/marquee/fireworks) */}
        {dc && (
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 4 }}>
            <label style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>{dc.label} (ms)</label>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, alignItems: "center" }}>
              <input
                type="number"
                min={0}
                step={500}
                value={Number(config[dc.key] ?? dc.default)}
                onChange={(e) => setConfig(prev => ({ ...prev, [dc.key]: Number(e.target.value) }))}
                onBlur={(e) => void saveSetting(dc.key, Number(e.target.value))}
                style={{ ...baseInput, width: 100 }}
              />
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>ms</span>
              {savedKey === dc.key && <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#34D399" }}>✓ 저장됨</span>}
            </div>
            {card.id === "chat" && <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--text-dim)" }}>0 = 자동 숨김 없음</span>}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* 슬롯머신 설정 */}
        {card.id === "slot-machine" && (
          <>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 4 }}>
              <label style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>제목</label>
              <input
                type="text"
                value={String(config.slotMachineTitle ?? "")}
                onChange={(e) => setConfig(prev => ({ ...prev, slotMachineTitle: e.target.value }))}
                onBlur={(e) => void saveSetting("slotMachineTitle", e.target.value)}
                style={baseInput}
                placeholder="🎰 벌칙머신"
              />
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 4 }}>
              <label style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>항목 목록 (한 줄에 하나, 가중치는 뒤에 (숫자) 형식)</label>
              <textarea
                rows={5}
                value={String(config.slotMachineItems ?? "😈 벌칙 1 (30)\n🔥 벌칙 2 (25)\n💀 벌칙 3 (20)\n🍀 행운 (15)\n✨ 면제 (10)")}
                onChange={(e) => setConfig(prev => ({ ...prev, slotMachineItems: e.target.value }))}
                onBlur={(e) => void saveSetting("slotMachineItems", e.target.value)}
                style={{ ...baseInput, resize: "none", lineHeight: 1.6, fontFamily: "inherit" }}
              />
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, alignItems: "center" }}>
              <label style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", flexShrink: 0 }}>스핀 시간</label>
              <input
                type="number"
                min={500}
                step={200}
                value={Number(config.slotMachineSpinMs ?? 2400)}
                onChange={(e) => setConfig(prev => ({ ...prev, slotMachineSpinMs: Number(e.target.value) }))}
                onBlur={(e) => void saveSetting("slotMachineSpinMs", Number(e.target.value))}
                style={{ ...baseInput, width: 80 }}
              />
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>ms</span>
              {savedKey === "slotMachineSpinMs" && <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#34D399" }}>✓</span>}
            </div>
          </>
        )}

        {/* 설정 없는 오버레이 */}
        {!dc && card.id !== "slot-machine" && (
          <p style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", margin: 0, lineHeight: 1.6 }}>
            {card.id === "translation" && "번역 자막 페이지에서 세부 설정을 변경할 수 있습니다."}
            {card.id === "menu-board" && "선물 브라우저 → 메뉴판 탭에서 설정합니다."}
            {card.id === "timer" && "타이머 탭에서 설정합니다."}
          </p>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: 24, overflowY: "auto", flex: 1, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 20 }}>
      <div>
        <h1 style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 4 }}>이벤트 오버레이</h1>
        <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>
          OBS Browser Source에 추가할 클라우드 오버레이 URL을 복사하세요.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr))", gap: 16 }}>
        {OVERLAYS.map((card) => {
          const isPreviewing = previewing === card.id;
          const isSettingsOpen = settingsOpen === card.id;
          const hasPreview = !NO_PREVIEW.has(card.id);
          return (
            <div
              key={card.id}
              style={{
                background: "var(--surface)",
                border: `1px solid ${isSettingsOpen ? "rgba(167,139,250,0.4)" : "var(--border)"}`,
                borderRadius: 14,
                overflow: "hidden",
                display: "flex",
                flexDirection: "column",
                transition: "border-color 0.15s",
              }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => { if (!isSettingsOpen) e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "rgba(0,242,234,0.3)"; }}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => { if (!isSettingsOpen) e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "var(--border)"; }}
            >
              {/* 미리보기 영역 (일부 카드만) */}
              {hasPreview && (
              <div style={{
                height: 180, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.6)", position: "relative",
                overflow: "hidden", cursor: "pointer", display: "flex",
                alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
              }}
                onClick={() => setPreviewing(isPreviewing ? null : card.id)}
              >
                {isPreviewing ? (
                  <iframe
                    ref={(el) => { iframeRefs.current[card.id] = el; }}
                    src={previewUrl(card)}
                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%", border: "none", background: "transparent" }}
                    title={card.name}
                    onLoad={() => {
                      const pending = pendingActionRef.current[card.id];
                      if (!pending) return;
                      pendingActionRef.current[card.id] = null;
                      const cw = iframeRefs.current[card.id]?.contentWindow;
                      if (cw) setTimeout(() => cw.postMessage(pending.send, "*"), 300);
                    }}
                  />
                ) : (
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 36 }}>{card.name.split(" ")[0]}</span>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 12 }}>클릭하여 미리보기</span>
                  </div>
                )}
                {isPreviewing && (
                  <div style={{
                    position: "absolute", top: 8, right: 8, padding: "2px 8px", borderRadius: 4,
                    background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.15)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)",
                    color: "var(--primary)", fontSize: 10, fontWeight: 700,
                  }}>LIVE</div>
                )}
              </div>
              )}

              {/* 카드 내용 */}
              <div style={{ padding: "14px 16px", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10, flex: 1 }}>
                {/* 이름 + 설정 버튼 + 태그 */}
                <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 8 }}>
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 700, color: "var(--text)" }}>{card.name}</span>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 4, flexShrink: 0 }}>
                    {/* 설정 버튼 */}
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setSettingsOpen(isSettingsOpen ? null : card.id)}
                      title="설정"
                      style={{
                        width: 22, height: 22, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer",
                        background: isSettingsOpen ? "rgba(167,139,250,0.15)" : "transparent",
                        border: `1px solid ${isSettingsOpen ? "rgba(167,139,250,0.4)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"}`,
                        color: isSettingsOpen ? "#A78BFA" : "var(--text-muted)",
                        fontSize: 12, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
                        transition: "all 0.15s",
                      }}
                    >⚙</button>
                    {/* 태그 */}
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 4, flexWrap: "wrap", justifyContent: "flex-end" }}>
                      {card.tags.map(tag => (
                        <span key={tag} style={{
                          fontSize: 9, fontWeight: 700, padding: "1px 6px", borderRadius: 99,
                          background: `${TAG_COLOR[tag] ?? "#94A3B8"}18`,
                          color: TAG_COLOR[tag] ?? "#94A3B8",
                          border: `1px solid ${TAG_COLOR[tag] ?? "#94A3B8"}33`,
                        }}>{tag}</span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* 설명 */}
                <p style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", lineHeight: 1.5, margin: 0 }}>
                  {card.description}
                </p>

                {/* URL 복사 */}
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, alignItems: "center" }}>
                  <input readOnly value={cloudUrl(card)} style={urlInput} />
                  <button
                    onClick={() => copyUrl(card)}
                    style={{
                      padding: "5px 12px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", flexShrink: 0,
                      background: copied === card.id ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.12)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)",
                      border: `1px solid ${copied === card.id ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.3)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.25)"}`,
                      color: copied === card.id ? "#34D399" : "var(--primary)",
                      transition: "all 0.15s",
                    }}
                  >
                    {copied === card.id ? "✓ 복사됨" : "URL 복사"}
                  </button>
                </div>

                {/* 테스트 버튼 */}
                {card.testActions && card.testActions.length > 0 && (
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, borderTop: "1px solid var(--border)", paddingTop: 8 }}>
                    {card.testActions.map((action) => (
                      <button
                        key={action.label}
                        onClick={() => sendTest(card.id, action)}
                        style={{
                          padding: "5px 12px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer",
                          background: `${action.color}15`,
                          border: `1px solid ${action.color}40`,
                          color: action.color,
                        }}
                      >▷ {action.label}</button>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>

              {/* 설정 패널 */}
              {renderSettingsPanel(card)}
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", textAlign: "center", paddingBottom: 8 }}>
        카드 클릭 → 미리보기 · ⚙ 설정 · URL 복사 → OBS Browser Source에 붙여넣기
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== ./pages/GiftBrowser.tsx =====
// 틱톡 선물 브라우저 — 선물 탐색/다운로드 + 메뉴판 설정
import React, { useState, useMemo, useCallback, useEffect, useLayoutEffect, useRef } from "react";
import JSZip from "jszip";
import { TIKTOK_GIFTS } from "../data/tiktokGifts";
import { useGiftImageStore } from "../stores/giftImageStore";
import { useMenuBoardStore, type MenuCell, DEFAULT_CELL_STYLE, FONT_OPTIONS } from "../stores/menuBoardStore";
import { useEventStore } from "../stores/eventStore";
import type { GiftEvent } from "@tikke/shared";

interface GiftSoundFile {
  id: string; name: string; filePath: string; volume: number;
}
interface GiftSoundCondition {
  giftId?: number; giftName?: string; minDiamonds?: number;
}
interface GiftSoundRule {
  id: string; eventType: string; condition: GiftSoundCondition;
  soundId: string; enabled: boolean; createdAt: number;
}

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: {
    overlay?: {
      getUrls: () => Promise<Record<string, string>>;
      send: (msg: unknown) => Promise<unknown>;
    };
    cloudOverlay?: {
      getUrls: () => Promise<Record<string, string>>;
    };
    clipboard?: { write: (text: string) => Promise<void> };
    settings?: {
      get: (key: string) => Promise<unknown>;
      set: (key: string, value: unknown) => Promise<void>;
    };
    sound?: {
      listFiles: () => Promise<GiftSoundFile[]>;
      listRules: () => Promise<GiftSoundRule[]>;
      addRule: (rule: GiftSoundRule) => Promise<{ error?: string }>;
      deleteRule: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
      toggleRule: (id: string, enabled: boolean) => Promise<void>;
      newId: () => Promise<string>;
      playFile: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
    };
  };
};

// ── 공통 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const DIAMOND_FILTERS = [
  { label: "전체", min: 0, max: Infinity },
  { label: "◈ 1", min: 1, max: 1 },
  { label: "◈ 5", min: 5, max: 9 },
  { label: "◈ 10", min: 10, max: 49 },
  { label: "◈ 50", min: 50, max: 99 },
  { label: "◈ 100", min: 100, max: 499 },
  { label: "◈ 500+", min: 500, max: Infinity },
];

function diamondColor(count: number): string {
  if (count >= 500) return "#FF0050";
  if (count >= 100) return "#FBBF24";
  if (count >= 10) return "#A78BFA";
  return "var(--primary)";
}

async function imageUrlToPngBlob(url: string): Promise<Blob> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const img = new Image();
    img.crossOrigin = "anonymous";
    img.onload = () => {
      const canvas = document.createElement("canvas");
      canvas.width = img.naturalWidth || img.width;
      canvas.height = img.naturalHeight || img.height;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
      if (!ctx) { reject(new Error("canvas ctx 없음")); return; }
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
      canvas.toBlob((blob) => blob ? resolve(blob) : reject(new Error("toBlob 실패")), "image/png");
    };
    img.onerror = () => reject(new Error("이미지 로드 실패"));
    img.src = url;
  });
}

function safeName(name: string): string {
  return name.replace(/[^\w가-힣]/g, "_").slice(0, 60);
}

// ── 선물 목록 탭 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function GiftListTab(): React.ReactElement {
  const runtimeImages = useGiftImageStore((s) => s.images);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [diamondFilter, setDiamondFilter] = useState(0);
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());
  const [bulkStatus, setBulkStatus] = useState<"idle" | "loading" | "done">("idle");
  const [bulkProgress, setBulkProgress] = useState(0);

  const allGifts = useMemo(() => {
    const runtime = Array.from(runtimeImages.entries()).map(([id, image]) => {
      const existing = TIKTOK_GIFTS.find((g) => g.id === id);
      return existing ?? { id, name: `Gift #${id}`, diamondCount: 0, image };
    });
    const staticIds = new Set(runtime.map((g) => g.id));
    const staticOnly = TIKTOK_GIFTS.filter((g) => !staticIds.has(g.id));
    return [...runtime, ...staticOnly].sort((a, b) => a.diamondCount - b.diamondCount || a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
  }, [runtimeImages]);

  const filter = DIAMOND_FILTERS[diamondFilter];
  const filtered = useMemo(() =>
    allGifts.filter((g) => {
      if (g.diamondCount < filter.min || g.diamondCount > filter.max) return false;
      if (search.trim()) return g.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase());
      return true;
    }), [allGifts, filter, search]);

  const toggleSelect = useCallback((id: number) => {
    setSelected((prev) => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      next.has(id) ? next.delete(id) : next.add(id);
      return next;
    });
  }, []);

  const isAllSelected = filtered.length > 0 && filtered.every((g) => selected.has(g.id));

  async function downloadSelected(): Promise<void> {
    const targets = filtered.filter((g) => selected.has(g.id));
    if (!targets.length) return;
    setBulkStatus("loading"); setBulkProgress(0);
    const zip = new JSZip();
    const folder = zip.folder("tikke_gifts") ?? zip;
    for (let i = 0; i < targets.length; i++) {
      try { folder.file(`${safeName(targets[i].name)}_${targets[i].id}.png`, await imageUrlToPngBlob(targets[i].image)); }
      catch { /* skip */ }
      setBulkProgress(Math.round(((i + 1) / targets.length) * 100));
    }
    const blob = await zip.generateAsync({ type: "blob" });
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = `tikke_gifts_${targets.length}개.zip`;
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
    setBulkStatus("done");
    setTimeout(() => { setBulkStatus("idle"); setBulkProgress(0); }, 2000);
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", flex: 1, overflow: "hidden" }}>
      <div style={{ padding: "10px 16px", borderBottom: "1px solid var(--border)", flexShrink: 0, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 8 }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
          <input type="text" placeholder="선물 이름 검색..." value={search} onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
            style={{ background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 6, padding: "5px 10px", color: "var(--text)", fontSize: 12, outline: "none", flex: 1, minWidth: 140 }} />
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 4, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
            {DIAMOND_FILTERS.map((f, i) => (
              <button key={i} onClick={() => setDiamondFilter(i)} style={{
                padding: "4px 9px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 600, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer",
                background: diamondFilter === i ? "rgba(0,242,234,0.15)" : "var(--surface-2)",
                border: `1px solid ${diamondFilter === i ? "rgba(0,242,234,0.4)" : "var(--border)"}`,
                color: diamondFilter === i ? "var(--primary)" : "var(--text-muted)",
              }}>{f.label}</button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
          <button onClick={() => isAllSelected ? setSelected(new Set()) : setSelected(new Set(filtered.map((g) => g.id)))}
            style={{ padding: "4px 10px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>
            {isAllSelected ? "선택 해제" : "전체 선택"}
          </button>
          <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>{filtered.length}/{allGifts.length}개</span>
          {selected.size > 0 && (
            <>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--primary)", fontWeight: 700 }}>{selected.size}개 선택</span>
              <button onClick={() => void downloadSelected()} disabled={bulkStatus === "loading"} style={{
                padding: "4px 14px", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5,
                cursor: bulkStatus === "loading" ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
                background: bulkStatus === "done" ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.15)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.12)",
                border: `1px solid ${bulkStatus === "done" ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.4)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.3)"}`,
                color: bulkStatus === "done" ? "#34D399" : "var(--primary)",
              }}>
                {bulkStatus === "loading" ? `⏳ ${bulkProgress}%` : bulkStatus === "done" ? "✓ 완료" : `⬇ PNG ZIP (${selected.size}개)`}
              </button>
              <button onClick={() => setSelected(new Set())} style={{ padding: "4px 8px", fontSize: 11, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", background: "transparent", border: "1px solid var(--border)", color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>✕</button>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflowY: "auto", padding: 12 }}>
        {filtered.length === 0 ? (
          <div style={{ padding: 40, textAlign: "center", color: "var(--text-muted)", fontSize: 13 }}>검색 결과 없음</div>
        ) : (
          <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(100px, 1fr))", gap: 8 }}>
            {filtered.map((gift) => {
              const isSel = selected.has(gift.id);
              return (
                <div key={gift.id} onClick={() => toggleSelect(gift.id)}
                  style={{
                    background: isSel ? "rgba(0,242,234,0.06)" : "var(--surface)",
                    border: `1px solid ${isSel ? "rgba(0,242,234,0.5)" : "var(--border)"}`,
                    borderRadius: 10, padding: "10px 8px 8px",
                    display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: 6,
                    cursor: "pointer", position: "relative", userSelect: "none",
                    transition: "border-color 0.12s, background 0.12s",
                  }}>
                  {isSel && (
                    <div style={{ position: "absolute", top: 5, right: 5, width: 16, height: 16, borderRadius: "50%", background: "var(--primary)", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontSize: 9, color: "#000", fontWeight: 900 }}>✓</div>
                  )}
                  <div style={{ width: 56, height: 56, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", borderRadius: 8, background: "var(--surface-2)", overflow: "hidden" }}>
                    <img src={gift.image} alt={gift.name} style={{ width: 48, height: 48, objectFit: "contain" }} onError={(e) => { (e.currentTarget as HTMLImageElement).style.display = "none"; }} />
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 600, color: "var(--text)", textAlign: "center", lineHeight: 1.3, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", display: "-webkit-box", WebkitLineClamp: 2, WebkitBoxOrient: "vertical", width: "100%" }}>
                    {gift.name}
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, color: diamondColor(gift.diamondCount) }}>◈ {gift.diamondCount.toLocaleString()}</div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 메뉴판 탭 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface GiftPickerProps {
  onSelect: (giftId: number, giftName: string, giftImageUrl: string) => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}

function GiftPicker({ onSelect, onClose }: GiftPickerProps): React.ReactElement {
  const runtimeImages = useGiftImageStore((s) => s.images);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");

  const gifts = useMemo(() => {
    const q = search.toLowerCase();
    return TIKTOK_GIFTS.filter((g) => !q || g.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0, 100);
  }, [search]);

  return (
    <div style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, zIndex: 999, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.7)", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center" }} onClick={onClose}>
      <div style={{ background: "var(--surface)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 12, padding: 16, width: 480, maxHeight: "70vh", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10 }} onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
          <span style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 700, flex: 1 }}>선물 선택</span>
          <button onClick={onClose} style={{ background: "transparent", border: "none", color: "var(--text-muted)", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 16 }}>✕</button>
        </div>
        <input autoFocus type="text" placeholder="이름 검색..." value={search} onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
          style={{ background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 6, padding: "6px 10px", color: "var(--text)", fontSize: 12, outline: "none" }} />
        <div style={{ overflowY: "auto", display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(80px, 1fr))", gap: 6 }}>
          {gifts.map((g) => {
            const imgUrl = runtimeImages.get(g.id) ?? g.image;
            return (
              <div key={g.id} onClick={() => onSelect(g.id, g.name, imgUrl)}
                style={{ background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 8, padding: "8px 6px", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: 4, cursor: "pointer" }}
                onMouseEnter={(e) => { e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "rgba(0,242,234,0.4)"; }}
                onMouseLeave={(e) => { e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "var(--border)"; }}>
                <img src={imgUrl} alt={g.name} style={{ width: 40, height: 40, objectFit: "contain" }} onError={(e) => { (e.currentTarget as HTMLImageElement).style.display = "none"; }} />
                <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--text)", textAlign: "center", lineHeight: 1.2, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", display: "-webkit-box", WebkitLineClamp: 2, WebkitBoxOrient: "vertical", width: "100%" }}>{g.name}</span>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 9, color: diamondColor(g.diamondCount), fontWeight: 700 }}>◈{g.diamondCount}</span>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 선물 사운드 탭 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function GiftSoundTab(): React.ReactElement {
  const runtimeImages = useGiftImageStore((s) => s.images);
  const [soundFiles, setSoundFiles] = useState<GiftSoundFile[]>([]);
  const [rules, setRules] = useState<GiftSoundRule[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
  const [pickerOpen, setPickerOpen] = useState(false);
  const [selGift, setSelGift] = useState<{ id: number; name: string; image: string } | null>(null);
  const [selSoundId, setSelSoundId] = useState("");
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const sound = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke?.sound;
    if (!sound) { setLoading(false); return; }
    Promise.all([sound.listFiles(), sound.listRules()])
      .then(([files, allRules]) => {
        setSoundFiles(files);
        setRules(allRules.filter((r) => r.eventType === "gift"));
        if (files[0]) setSelSoundId(files[0].id);
      })
      .catch(() => {})
      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
  }, []);

  function getGiftInfo(giftId?: number) {
    if (giftId == null) return null;
    const g = TIKTOK_GIFTS.find((x) => x.id === giftId);
    const img = runtimeImages.get(giftId) ?? g?.image ?? "";
    return g ? { name: g.name, image: img, diamonds: g.diamondCount } : null;
  }

  async function handleAdd(): Promise<void> {
    if (!selGift || !selSoundId) return;
    const sound = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke?.sound;
    if (!sound) return;
    setSaving(true);
    setError(null);
    const id = await sound.newId();
    const rule: GiftSoundRule = {
      id,
      eventType: "gift",
      condition: { giftId: selGift.id, giftName: selGift.name },
      soundId: selSoundId,
      enabled: true,
      createdAt: Date.now(),
    };
    const res = await sound.addRule(rule);
    if (res?.error) { setError(res.error); setSaving(false); return; }
    setRules((prev) => [...prev, rule]);
    setSelGift(null);
    setSelSoundId(soundFiles[0]?.id ?? "");
    setShowForm(false);
    setSaving(false);
  }

  async function handleDelete(id: string): Promise<void> {
    await (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke?.sound?.deleteRule(id);
    setRules((prev) => prev.filter((r) => r.id !== id));
  }

  async function handleToggle(id: string, enabled: boolean): Promise<void> {
    await (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke?.sound?.toggleRule(id, enabled);
    setRules((prev) => prev.map((r) => r.id === id ? { ...r, enabled } : r));
  }

  const rowStyle: React.CSSProperties = {
    display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10,
    padding: "10px 14px", background: "var(--surface-2)",
    border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 8,
  };

  const inpStyle: React.CSSProperties = {
    background: "var(--surface)", border: "1px solid var(--border)",
    borderRadius: 5, padding: "6px 10px", color: "var(--text)", fontSize: 12, outline: "none",
  };

  if (loading) return <div style={{ padding: 40, textAlign: "center", color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>로딩 중...</div>;

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", flex: 1, overflow: "hidden" }}>
      {/* 헤더 */}
      <div style={{ padding: "10px 16px", borderBottom: "1px solid var(--border)", flexShrink: 0, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between" }}>
        <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>
          선물 수신 시 지정한 사운드를 자동 재생합니다.
        </span>
        <button
          onClick={() => { setShowForm((v) => !v); setError(null); }}
          style={{ padding: "6px 14px", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 6, cursor: "pointer", background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)", color: "var(--primary)" }}
        >
          + 추가
        </button>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflowY: "auto", padding: 14, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 8 }}>
        {/* 추가 폼 */}
        {showForm && (
          <div style={{ padding: 14, background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.2)", borderRadius: 8, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10 }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, color: "var(--primary)" }}>선물 → 사운드 매핑 추가</div>

            {error && <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--secondary)", padding: "4px 8px", background: "rgba(255,0,80,0.08)", borderRadius: 5 }}>{error}</div>}

            {soundFiles.length === 0 && (
              <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--secondary)" }}>먼저 사운드 라이브러리에서 사운드를 추가하세요.</div>
            )}

            {soundFiles.length > 0 && (
              <>
                {/* 선물 선택 */}
                <div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 6 }}>1. 선물 선택</div>
                  {selGift ? (
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, padding: "8px 10px", background: "var(--surface)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)", borderRadius: 7 }}>
                      <img src={selGift.image} alt={selGift.name} style={{ width: 36, height: 36, objectFit: "contain" }} />
                      <span style={{ fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, flex: 1 }}>{selGift.name}</span>
                      <button onClick={() => setPickerOpen(true)} style={{ padding: "3px 10px", fontSize: 11, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>변경</button>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <button onClick={() => setPickerOpen(true)} style={{ padding: "8px 16px", width: "100%", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 7, cursor: "pointer", background: "rgba(255,0,80,0.08)", border: "1px dashed rgba(255,0,80,0.3)", color: "#FF0050" }}>
                      🎁 선물 선택...
                    </button>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* 사운드 선택 */}
                <div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 6 }}>2. 사운드 선택</div>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, alignItems: "center" }}>
                    <select value={selSoundId} onChange={(e) => setSelSoundId(e.target.value)} style={{ ...inpStyle, flex: 1 }}>
                      {soundFiles.map((f) => <option key={f.id} value={f.id}>{f.name}</option>)}
                    </select>
                    <button onClick={() => { const sound = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke?.sound; if (selSoundId) void sound?.playFile(selSoundId); }}
                      title="미리 듣기"
                      style={{ padding: "6px 10px", fontSize: 12, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.25)", color: "var(--primary)" }}>▷</button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* 버튼 */}
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, justifyContent: "flex-end" }}>
                  <button onClick={() => { setShowForm(false); setSelGift(null); setError(null); }}
                    style={{ padding: "6px 14px", background: "transparent", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 5, color: "var(--text-muted)", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 12 }}>취소</button>
                  <button onClick={() => void handleAdd()} disabled={!selGift || !selSoundId || saving}
                    style={{ padding: "6px 14px", background: selGift && selSoundId ? "var(--primary)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.15)", color: selGift && selSoundId ? "#000" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.4)", border: "none", borderRadius: 5, cursor: selGift && selSoundId ? "pointer" : "not-allowed", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700 }}>
                    {saving ? "저장 중..." : "추가"}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* 기존 매핑 목록 */}
        {rules.length === 0 && !showForm ? (
          <div style={{ padding: "40px 0", textAlign: "center", color: "var(--text-muted)", fontSize: 13 }}>
            아직 선물 사운드가 없습니다.<br />
            <span style={{ fontSize: 12 }}>위의 + 추가 버튼으로 선물마다 사운드를 지정하세요.</span>
          </div>
        ) : (
          rules.map((rule) => {
            const giftInfo = getGiftInfo(rule.condition.giftId);
            const soundFile = soundFiles.find((f) => f.id === rule.soundId);
            return (
              <div key={rule.id} style={{ ...rowStyle, opacity: rule.enabled ? 1 : 0.45 }}>
                {/* 선물 */}
                {giftInfo ? (
                  <>
                    <img src={giftInfo.image} alt={giftInfo.name} style={{ width: 36, height: 36, objectFit: "contain", flexShrink: 0 }} onError={(e) => { (e.currentTarget as HTMLImageElement).style.display = "none"; }} />
                    <div style={{ minWidth: 0, flexShrink: 0 }}>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 600, color: "var(--text)", whiteSpace: "nowrap", overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", maxWidth: 120 }}>{giftInfo.name}</div>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: diamondColor(giftInfo.diamonds), fontWeight: 700 }}>◈ {giftInfo.diamonds.toLocaleString()}</div>
                    </div>
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", flexShrink: 0 }}>
                    {rule.condition.giftName ?? `giftId=${rule.condition.giftId ?? "?"}`}
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* 화살표 */}
                <span style={{ fontSize: 16, color: "var(--text-dim)", flexShrink: 0 }}>→</span>

                {/* 사운드 */}
                <div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: soundFile ? "var(--text)" : "var(--secondary)", fontWeight: 600, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>
                    🔊 {soundFile?.name ?? "(삭제된 파일)"}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* 토글 */}
                <button onClick={() => void handleToggle(rule.id, !rule.enabled)}
                  style={{ padding: "4px 10px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", flexShrink: 0,
                    background: rule.enabled ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.12)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",
                    border: `1px solid ${rule.enabled ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.3)" : "var(--border)"}`,
                    color: rule.enabled ? "#34D399" : "var(--text-muted)" }}>
                  {rule.enabled ? "ON" : "OFF"}
                </button>

                {/* 삭제 */}
                <button onClick={() => void handleDelete(rule.id)}
                  style={{ padding: "4px 10px", fontSize: 12, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", flexShrink: 0, background: "rgba(255,0,80,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,0,80,0.2)", color: "var(--secondary)" }}>
                  ✕
                </button>
              </div>
            );
          })
        )}
      </div>

      {/* 선물 선택 모달 */}
      {pickerOpen && (
        <GiftPicker
          onSelect={(id, name, image) => { setSelGift({ id, name, image }); setPickerOpen(false); }}
          onClose={() => setPickerOpen(false)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function MenuBoardTab(): React.ReactElement {
  const { boards, activeId, activatedCells, addBoard, updateBoard, removeBoard, setActive, getActive, upsertCell, removeCell, applyColorToAll, applyFontSizeToAll, applyFontWeightToAll, swapCells } = useMenuBoardStore();
  const [dragSrc, setDragSrc] = useState<{ row: number; col: number } | null>(null);
  const [pickerCell, setPickerCell] = useState<{ row: number; col: number } | null>(null);
  const [bulkBgColor, setBulkBgColor] = useState("#1E293B");
  const [bulkTextColor, setBulkTextColor] = useState("#FFFFFF");
  const [bulkFontSize, setBulkFontSize] = useState(14);
  const [bulkFontWeight, setBulkFontWeight] = useState(700);
  const [bulkThickness, setBulkThickness] = useState(7);
  const [editCell, setEditCell] = useState<MenuCell | null>(null);
  const [overlayUrl, setOverlayUrl] = useState("");
  const [copyStatus, setCopyStatus] = useState<"idle" | "copied">("idle");
  const [syncStatus, setSyncStatus] = useState<"idle" | "syncing" | "synced">("idle");
  const [importStatus, setImportStatus] = useState<"idle" | "ok" | "err">("idle");
  const syncTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
  const previewRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const [gridZoom, setGridZoom] = useState(1);
  const runtimeImages = useGiftImageStore((s) => s.images);
  const events = useEventStore((s) => s.events);
  const activateGift = useMenuBoardStore((s) => s.activateGift);

  // 오버레이 URL 로드
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    tikke?.cloudOverlay?.getUrls().then((urls) => setOverlayUrl(urls["메뉴판"] ?? "")).catch(() => {});
  }, []);

  // SQLite에서 메뉴판 데이터 로드 (최초 1회)
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.settings) return;
    tikke.settings.get("menuBoardData").then((raw) => {
      if (typeof raw !== "string" || !raw) return;
      try {
        const { boards: b, activeId: a } = JSON.parse(raw) as { boards: import("../stores/menuBoardStore").MenuBoard[]; activeId: string | null };
        if (Array.isArray(b) && b.length > 0) {
          useMenuBoardStore.setState({ boards: b, activeId: a ?? b[0]?.id ?? null });
        }
      } catch {}
    }).catch(() => {});
  }, []); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  // boards 변경 시 오버레이 자동 동기화 (300ms debounce → 슬라이더 드래그 중 과부하 방지)
  useEffect(() => {
    const board = getActive();
    if (!board) return;
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    setSyncStatus("syncing");
    if (syncTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(syncTimerRef.current);
    syncTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
      void tikke?.overlay?.send({ type: "menu_board_sync", payload: board });
      setSyncStatus("synced");
      setTimeout(() => setSyncStatus("idle"), 1500);
    }, 300);
    return () => { if (syncTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(syncTimerRef.current); };
  }, [boards, activeId]); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  // boards 변경 시 SQLite 자동 저장 (1000ms debounce)
  useEffect(() => {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.settings) return;
    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current);
    saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
      const { boards: b, activeId: a } = useMenuBoardStore.getState();
      void tikke?.settings?.set("menuBoardData", JSON.stringify({ boards: b, activeId: a }));
    }, 1000);
    return () => { if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current); };
  }, [boards, activeId]); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  // JSON 내보내기
  function handleExport(): void {
    const { boards: b } = useMenuBoardStore.getState();
    const json = JSON.stringify({ version: 1, boards: b }, null, 2);
    const blob = new Blob([json], { type: "application/json" });
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = `tikke-menuboard-${Date.now()}.json`;
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
  }

  // JSON 불러오기
  function handleImport(): void {
    const input = document.createElement("input");
    input.type = "file";
    input.accept = ".json";
    input.onchange = () => {
      const file = input.files?.[0];
      if (!file) return;
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = () => {
        try {
          const data = JSON.parse(reader.result as string) as { boards?: import("../stores/menuBoardStore").MenuBoard[] };
          if (!Array.isArray(data.boards)) throw new Error("invalid");
          useMenuBoardStore.setState({ boards: data.boards, activeId: data.boards[0]?.id ?? null });
          setImportStatus("ok");
          setTimeout(() => setImportStatus("idle"), 2000);
        } catch {
          setImportStatus("err");
          setTimeout(() => setImportStatus("idle"), 2000);
        }
      };
      reader.readAsText(file);
    };
    input.click();
  }

  function handleCopy(): void {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    void tikke?.clipboard?.write(overlayUrl).then(() => {
      setCopyStatus("copied");
      setTimeout(() => setCopyStatus("idle"), 2000);
    });
  }


  // 미리보기 컨테이너 폭 기준으로 그리드 zoom 계산 (열이 잘리지 않게)
  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    if (!previewRef.current || !board) return;
    const available = previewRef.current.clientWidth - 32;
    const gridWidth = board.cols * (board.cellSize + (board.gapX ?? 8));
    setGridZoom(available > 0 && gridWidth > available ? available / gridWidth : 1);
  }); // 매 렌더마다 재계산 (cols/cellSize/gapX 변경 즉시 반영)

  // 선물 이벤트 수신 시 셀 활성화
  useEffect(() => {
    const giftEvents = events.filter((e): e is GiftEvent => e.type === "gift");
    if (!giftEvents.length) return;
    const latest = giftEvents[giftEvents.length - 1];
    if (latest.giftId != null) activateGift(latest.giftId);
  }, [events, activateGift]);

  const board = getActive();

  function handleAddBoard(): void {
    addBoard();
  }

  function handleCellClick(row: number, col: number): void {
    if (!board) return;
    const existing = board.cells.find((c) => c.row === row && c.col === col);
    if (existing) {
      setEditCell(existing);
    } else {
      setPickerCell({ row, col });
    }
  }

  function handleGiftPick(giftId: number, giftName: string, giftImageUrl: string): void {
    if (!board || !pickerCell) return;
    const cellId = typeof crypto !== "undefined" && typeof crypto.randomUUID === "function"
      ? crypto.randomUUID() : `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;
    const cell: MenuCell = {
      id: cellId,
      row: pickerCell.row,
      col: pickerCell.col,
      title: giftName,
      giftId,
      giftName,
      giftImageUrl,
      ...DEFAULT_CELL_STYLE,
    };
    upsertCell(board.id, cell);
    setPickerCell(null);
  }

  const inputStyle: React.CSSProperties = {
    background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)",
    borderRadius: 5, padding: "4px 8px", color: "var(--text)", fontSize: 12, outline: "none",
  };

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", flex: 1, overflow: "hidden" }}>
      {/* 상단 툴바 — URL + 저장 + 동기화 */}
      <div style={{ padding: "10px 16px", borderBottom: "1px solid var(--border)", flexShrink: 0, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 8 }}>
        {/* URL 행 */}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, alignItems: "center" }}>
          <input readOnly value={overlayUrl || "오버레이 URL 로딩 중..."} style={{ flex: 1, background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 6, padding: "5px 10px", color: overlayUrl ? "var(--text-muted)" : "var(--text-dim)", fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "monospace", outline: "none" }} />
          <button onClick={handleCopy} disabled={!overlayUrl} style={{
            padding: "5px 12px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: overlayUrl ? "pointer" : "not-allowed", whiteSpace: "nowrap",
            background: copyStatus === "copied" ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.12)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)",
            border: `1px solid ${copyStatus === "copied" ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.4)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.3)"}`,
            color: copyStatus === "copied" ? "#34D399" : "var(--primary)",
          }}>{copyStatus === "copied" ? "✓ 복사됨" : "URL 복사"}</button>
        </div>
        {/* 버튼 행 */}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, flexWrap: "wrap", alignItems: "center" }}>
          <button onClick={handleExport} style={{ padding: "5px 10px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", background: "rgba(251,191,36,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(251,191,36,0.3)", color: "#FBBF24" }}>⬇ 내보내기</button>
          <button onClick={handleImport} style={{
            padding: "5px 10px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer",
            background: importStatus === "ok" ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.1)" : importStatus === "err" ? "rgba(255,0,80,0.1)" : "rgba(167,139,250,0.1)",
            border: `1px solid ${importStatus === "ok" ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.4)" : importStatus === "err" ? "rgba(255,0,80,0.3)" : "rgba(167,139,250,0.3)"}`,
            color: importStatus === "ok" ? "#34D399" : importStatus === "err" ? "var(--secondary)" : "#A78BFA",
          }}>{importStatus === "ok" ? "✓ 불러옴" : importStatus === "err" ? "✕ 오류" : "⬆ 불러오기"}</button>
          {/* 자동 동기화 상태 */}
          <div style={{ marginLeft: "auto", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}>
            <div style={{
              width: 7, height: 7, borderRadius: "50%", flexShrink: 0, transition: "all 0.3s",
              background: syncStatus === "syncing" ? "#FBBF24" : syncStatus === "synced" ? "#34D399" : "rgba(52,211,153,0.35)",
              boxShadow: syncStatus !== "idle" ? `0 0 6px ${syncStatus === "syncing" ? "#FBBF24" : "#34D399"}` : "none",
            }} />
            <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>
              {syncStatus === "syncing" ? "동기화 중..." : syncStatus === "synced" ? "동기화됨" : "자동 동기화"}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 메뉴판 세트 선택 바 */}
      <div style={{ padding: "10px 16px", borderBottom: "1px solid var(--border)", flexShrink: 0, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 4, flex: 1, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
          {boards.map((b) => (
            <button key={b.id} onClick={() => setActive(b.id)} style={{
              padding: "4px 12px", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 600, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer",
              background: activeId === b.id ? "rgba(0,242,234,0.12)" : "var(--surface-2)",
              border: `1px solid ${activeId === b.id ? "rgba(0,242,234,0.4)" : "var(--border)"}`,
              color: activeId === b.id ? "var(--primary)" : "var(--text-muted)",
            }}>{b.name}</button>
          ))}
        </div>
        <button onClick={handleAddBoard} style={{ padding: "4px 12px", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: "pointer", background: "rgba(167,139,250,0.12)", border: "1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.3)", color: "#A78BFA" }}>+ 추가</button>
      </div>

      {!board ? (
        <div style={{ flex: 1, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", flexDirection: "column", gap: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>
          <div style={{ fontSize: 32 }}>🎛</div>
          <div style={{ fontSize: 13 }}>메뉴판 세트를 추가하세요</div>
          <button onClick={handleAddBoard} style={{ padding: "8px 20px", background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)", borderRadius: 7, color: "var(--primary)", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 700 }}>+ 메뉴판 추가</button>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div style={{ flex: 1, overflowY: "auto", padding: 16, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 14 }}>
          {/* 메뉴판 이름 + 삭제 */}
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, alignItems: "center" }}>
            <input value={board.name} onChange={(e) => updateBoard({ ...board, name: e.target.value })}
              style={{ ...inputStyle, flex: 1, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 700 }} />
            <button onClick={() => removeBoard(board.id)} style={{ padding: "4px 10px", background: "rgba(255,0,80,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,0,80,0.25)", borderRadius: 5, color: "var(--secondary)", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 11 }}>삭제</button>
          </div>

          {/* 그리드 설정 */}
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 16, alignItems: "center", flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
            {([
              { label: "행", key: "rows" as const, min: 1, max: 20, step: 1 },
              { label: "열", key: "cols" as const, min: 1, max: 20, step: 1 },
              { label: "셀 크기", key: "cellSize" as const, min: 40, max: 200, step: 2 },
              { label: "가로 간격", key: "gapX" as const, min: -40, max: 20, step: 1 },
            { label: "세로 간격", key: "gapY" as const, min: -40, max: 20, step: 1 },
            ] as { label: string; key: "rows" | "cols" | "cellSize" | "gapX" | "gapY"; min: number; max: number; step: number }[]).map(({ label, key, min, max, step }) => (
              <div key={key} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", minWidth: 36 }}>{label}</span>
                <input type="range" min={min} max={max} step={step} value={board[key]}
                  onChange={(e) => updateBoard({ ...board, [key]: Number(e.target.value) })}
                  style={{ width: 80, accentColor: "var(--primary)" }} />
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-dim)", minWidth: 24 }}>{board[key]}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
            {/* 이미지 크기 (절댓값 px, 셀 크기 독립) */}
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", minWidth: 36 }}>이미지</span>
              <input type="range" min={10} max={200} step={2}
                value={board.imgSize ?? 62}
                onChange={(e) => updateBoard({ ...board, imgSize: Number(e.target.value) })}
                style={{ width: 80, accentColor: "var(--primary)" }} />
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-dim)", minWidth: 30 }}>{board.imgSize ?? 62}px</span>
            </div>
            {/* 폰트↔이미지 간격 */}
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", minWidth: 36 }}>텍스트 높이</span>
              <input type="range" min={-20} max={40} step={1}
                value={board.textImgGap ?? 4}
                onChange={(e) => updateBoard({ ...board, textImgGap: Number(e.target.value) })}
                style={{ width: 80, accentColor: "var(--primary)" }} />
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-dim)", minWidth: 30 }}>{board.textImgGap ?? 4}px</span>
            </div>
            {/* 셀 모서리 반경 */}
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", minWidth: 36 }}>모서리</span>
              <input type="range" min={0} max={40} step={1}
                value={board.cellBorderRadius ?? 12}
                onChange={(e) => updateBoard({ ...board, cellBorderRadius: Number(e.target.value) })}
                style={{ width: 80, accentColor: "var(--primary)" }} />
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-dim)", minWidth: 30 }}>{board.cellBorderRadius ?? 12}px</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* 폰트 선택 */}
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", minWidth: 36 }}>폰트</span>
            <select
              value={board.fontFamily ?? FONT_OPTIONS[0].value}
              onChange={(e) => updateBoard({ ...board, fontFamily: e.target.value })}
              style={{ background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 5, padding: "4px 8px", color: "var(--text)", fontSize: 12, outline: "none", cursor: "pointer" }}
            >
              {FONT_OPTIONS.map((f) => (
                <option key={f.value} value={f.value}>{f.label}</option>
              ))}
            </select>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", fontFamily: board.fontFamily ?? FONT_OPTIONS[0].value }}>미리보기 Aa 가나다</span>
          </div>

          {/* 전체 색상·폰트 일괄 변경 */}
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, alignItems: "center", flexWrap: "wrap", padding: "8px 10px", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", borderRadius: 8, border: "1px solid var(--border)" }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, color: "var(--text-muted)", minWidth: 60 }}>전체 일괄</span>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>배경</span>
              <input type="color" value={bulkBgColor === "transparent" ? "#000000" : bulkBgColor}
                onChange={(e) => { setBulkBgColor(e.target.value); applyColorToAll(board.id, "backgroundColor", e.target.value); }}
                style={{ width: 30, height: 24, borderRadius: 4, border: "1px solid var(--border)", cursor: "pointer", background: "transparent" }} />
              <button onClick={() => applyColorToAll(board.id, "backgroundColor", bulkBgColor)}
                style={{ padding: "3px 9px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 4, cursor: "pointer", background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)", color: "var(--primary)" }}>적용</button>
              <button onClick={() => { setBulkBgColor("transparent"); applyColorToAll(board.id, "backgroundColor", "transparent"); }}
                style={{ padding: "3px 9px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 4, cursor: "pointer", background: bulkBgColor === "transparent" ? "rgba(167,139,250,0.2)" : "rgba(167,139,250,0.08)", border: `1px solid ${bulkBgColor === "transparent" ? "rgba(167,139,250,0.6)" : "rgba(167,139,250,0.3)"}`, color: "#A78BFA" }}>투명</button>
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>글자색</span>
              <input type="color" value={bulkTextColor}
                onChange={(e) => { setBulkTextColor(e.target.value); applyColorToAll(board.id, "textColor", e.target.value); }}
                style={{ width: 30, height: 24, borderRadius: 4, border: "1px solid var(--border)", cursor: "pointer", background: "transparent" }} />
              <button onClick={() => applyColorToAll(board.id, "textColor", bulkTextColor)}
                style={{ padding: "3px 9px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 4, cursor: "pointer", background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)", color: "var(--primary)" }}>적용</button>
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>폰트 크기</span>
              <input type="range" min={4} max={60} value={bulkFontSize}
                onChange={(e) => { setBulkFontSize(Number(e.target.value)); applyFontSizeToAll(board.id, Number(e.target.value)); }}
                style={{ width: 70, accentColor: "var(--primary)" }} />
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-dim)", minWidth: 28 }}>{bulkFontSize}px</span>
              <button onClick={() => applyFontSizeToAll(board.id, bulkFontSize)}
                style={{ padding: "3px 9px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 4, cursor: "pointer", background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)", color: "var(--primary)" }}>적용</button>
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>두께</span>
              <input type="range" min={1} max={20} step={1} value={bulkThickness}
                onChange={(e) => {
                  const lv = Number(e.target.value);
                  setBulkThickness(lv);
                  const fw = Math.min(900, lv * 100);
                  const sw = Math.max(0, lv - 9);
                  applyFontWeightToAll(board.id, fw);
                  updateBoard({ ...board, strokeWidth: sw });
                }}
                style={{ width: 70, accentColor: "var(--primary)" }} />
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-dim)", minWidth: 28 }}>{bulkThickness}</span>
              <button onClick={() => {
                const fw = Math.min(900, bulkThickness * 100);
                const sw = Math.max(0, bulkThickness - 9);
                applyFontWeightToAll(board.id, fw);
                updateBoard({ ...board, strokeWidth: sw });
              }} style={{ padding: "3px 9px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 4, cursor: "pointer", background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)", color: "var(--primary)" }}>적용</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* 텍스트 스타일 — 외곽선·그림자 */}
          <div style={{ padding: "8px 10px", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", borderRadius: 8, border: "1px solid var(--border)", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 8 }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, color: "var(--text-muted)", textTransform: "uppercase" as const, letterSpacing: "0.06em" }}>텍스트 스타일</span>
            {([
              { key: "strokeWidth" as const, label: "외곽선", min: 0, max: 8,  suffix: "px" },
              { key: "shadowBlur"  as const, label: "그림자", min: 0, max: 24, suffix: "px" },
            ] as { key: "strokeWidth" | "shadowBlur"; label: string; min: number; max: number; suffix: string }[]).map(({ key, label, min, max, suffix }) => (
              <div key={key} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", width: 44, flexShrink: 0 }}>{label}</span>
                <input type="range" min={min} max={max} value={(board[key] as number) ?? 0}
                  onChange={(e) => updateBoard({ ...board, [key]: Number(e.target.value) })}
                  style={{ flex: 1, accentColor: "var(--primary)", height: 3 }} />
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-dim)", width: 36 }}>{(board[key] as number) ?? 0}{suffix}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", width: 44, flexShrink: 0 }}>색상</span>
              <input type="color" value={board.shadowColor ?? "#000000"}
                onChange={(e) => updateBoard({ ...board, shadowColor: e.target.value })}
                style={{ width: 36, height: 24, borderRadius: 4, border: "1px solid var(--border)", cursor: "pointer", background: "transparent" }} />
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>외곽선·그림자 공통 색상</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* 오버레이 미리보기 */}
          <div ref={previewRef} style={{
            width: "100%", overflow: "hidden",
            background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", borderRadius: 10,
            border: "1px solid var(--border)", padding: "16px",
            minHeight: 220,
          }}>
          <div style={{
            display: "flex",
            flexWrap: "wrap",
            alignContent: "flex-start",
            width: board.cols * (board.cellSize + (board.gapX ?? 8)),
            zoom: gridZoom,
          }}>
            {Array.from({ length: board.rows }, (_, row) =>
              Array.from({ length: board.cols }, (_, col) => {
                const cell = board.cells.find((c) => c.row === row && c.col === col);
                const isActive = cell?.giftId != null && activatedCells.has(cell.giftId);
                const imgUrl = cell?.giftId != null ? (runtimeImages.get(cell.giftId) ?? cell.giftImageUrl) : undefined;

                const isSrcCell = dragSrc?.row === row && dragSrc?.col === col;
                const isDragOver = dragSrc && !isSrcCell && dragSrc.row === row && dragSrc.col === col;
