async function playBase64Audio(base64: string, volume: number, rate: number, pitch: number): Promise<void> {
  const binary = atob(base64);
  const bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < binary.length; i++) bytes[i] = binary.charCodeAt(i);
  const audioCtx = new AudioContext();
  try {
    const audioBuffer = await audioCtx.decodeAudioData(bytes.buffer);
    const source = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
    source.buffer = audioBuffer;
    source.playbackRate.value = rate;
    source.detune.value = (pitch - 1.0) * 1200;
    const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
    gain.gain.value = volume;
    source.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
      source.onended = () => resolve();
      source.addEventListener("error", () => reject(new Error("재생 중 오류")));
      source.start(0);
    });
  } finally {
    void audioCtx.close();
  }
}

function MvpTestButton({ mvpUser, testText, config }: { mvpUser: MvpUser; testText: string; config: TTSConfig }): React.ReactElement {
  const [err, setErr] = React.useState("");
  const [busy, setBusy] = React.useState(false);

  async function handleTest(): Promise<void> {
    if (!testText.trim() || busy) return;
    setErr(""); setBusy(true);
    const effectiveProvider = (mvpUser.provider || config.provider) as string;
    try {
      if (effectiveProvider === "webspeech") {
        speechSynthesis.cancel();
        const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(testText);
        u.rate = mvpUser.rate; u.pitch = mvpUser.pitch; u.volume = mvpUser.volume; u.lang = "ko-KR";
        const v = speechSynthesis.getVoices().find((v) => v.name === (mvpUser.voiceName || ""));
        if (v) u.voice = v;
        speechSynthesis.speak(u);
      } else {
        const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
        if (!tikke?.tts?.synthesize) return;
        const result = await tikke.tts.synthesize({
          provider: effectiveProvider,
          text: testText,
          tiktokSessionId: config.tiktokSessionId,
          tiktokVoiceId: mvpUser.tiktokVoiceId || config.tiktokVoiceId,
          edgeVoiceName: mvpUser.edgeVoiceName || config.edgeVoiceName,
        });
        if (result.error) { setErr(result.error); return; }
        if (result.audioBase64) await playBase64Audio(result.audioBase64, mvpUser.volume, mvpUser.rate, mvpUser.pitch);
      }
    } catch (e) { setErr(String(e)); }
    finally { setBusy(false); }
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 4 }}>
      <button
        onClick={() => void handleTest()}
        disabled={!testText.trim() || busy}
        style={{
          padding: "6px 14px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5,
          cursor: busy ? "wait" : "pointer",
          background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)",
          color: "var(--primary)",
        }}
      >{busy ? "재생 중..." : "▷ 테스트"}</button>
      {err && <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#f87171" }}>{err}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

async function saveSetting(key: keyof TTSConfig, value: unknown): Promise<void> {
  const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
  const stored = Array.isArray(value) ? JSON.stringify(value) : value;
  await tikke?.settings?.set(CONFIG_KEY_MAP[key], stored);
}

function formatTime(ts: number): string {
  return new Date(ts).toLocaleTimeString("ko-KR", {
    hour: "2-digit",
    minute: "2-digit",
    second: "2-digit",
  });
}

// ── Sub-components ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface ToggleProps {
  label: string;
  value: boolean;
  onChange: (v: boolean) => void;
  description?: string;
}

function Toggle({ label, value, onChange, description }: ToggleProps): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", padding: "10px 14px", background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 8 }}>
      <div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "var(--text)", fontWeight: 500 }}>{label}</div>
        {description && <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginTop: 2 }}>{description}</div>}
      </div>
      <button
        onClick={() => onChange(!value)}
        style={{
          width: 42,
          height: 24,
          borderRadius: 12,
          border: "none",
          background: value ? "var(--primary)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)",
          cursor: "pointer",
          position: "relative",
          flexShrink: 0,
          transition: "background 0.15s",
        }}
      >
        <div
          style={{
            width: 18,
            height: 18,
            borderRadius: "50%",
            background: "#fff",
            position: "absolute",
            top: 3,
            left: value ? 21 : 3,
            transition: "left 0.15s",
          }}
        />
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

interface SliderRowProps {
  label: string;
  value: number;
  min: number;
  max: number;
  step: number;
  displayValue: string;
  onChange: (v: number) => void;
  onCommit: (v: number) => void;
}

function SliderRow({ label, value, min, max, step, displayValue, onChange, onCommit }: SliderRowProps): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12, padding: "10px 14px", background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 8 }}>
      <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "var(--text)", minWidth: 60 }}>{label}</span>
      <input
        type="range"
        min={min}
        max={max}
        step={step}
        value={value}
        onChange={(e) => onChange(parseFloat(e.target.value))}
        onMouseUp={(e) => onCommit(parseFloat((e.target as HTMLInputElement).value))}
        onTouchEnd={(e) => onCommit(parseFloat((e.target as HTMLInputElement).value))}
        style={{ flex: 1, accentColor: "var(--primary)", cursor: "pointer" }}
      />
      <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", minWidth: 36, textAlign: "right" }}>{displayValue}</span>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── TikTok Login Panel ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type TikkeWindowFull = {
  tikke?: {
    settings?: { set: (key: string, value: unknown) => Promise<void> };
    tts?: {
      tiktokLogin: () => Promise<{ sessionId?: string; error?: string }>;
    };
  };
};

interface TikTokLoginPanelProps {
  config: TTSConfig;
  update: <K extends keyof TTSConfig>(key: K, value: TTSConfig[K]) => Promise<void>;
  inputStyle: React.CSSProperties;
  webSpeechVoices: SpeechSynthesisVoice[];
}

function TikTokLoginPanel({ config, update, inputStyle, webSpeechVoices }: TikTokLoginPanelProps): React.ReactElement {
  const [loginStatus, setLoginStatus] = useState<"idle" | "loading" | "ok" | "error">("idle");
  const [loginError, setLoginError] = useState("");

  async function handleLogin(): Promise<void> {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindowFull).tikke;
    if (!tikke?.tts?.tiktokLogin) return;
    setLoginStatus("loading");
    setLoginError("");
    const result = await tikke.tts.tiktokLogin();
    if (result.sessionId) {
      await update("tiktokSessionId", result.sessionId);
      setLoginStatus("ok");
    } else {
      setLoginStatus("error");
      setLoginError(result.error ?? "알 수 없는 오류");
    }
  }

  const isLoggedIn = config.tiktokSessionId.length > 10;

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 8 }}>
      {/* 로그인 상태 */}
      <div style={{
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "space-between",
        padding: "10px 14px",
        background: isLoggedIn ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.06)" : "rgba(167,139,250,0.05)",
        border: `1px solid ${isLoggedIn ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.2)" : "rgba(167,139,250,0.15)"}`,
        borderRadius: 8,
      }}>
        <div>
          <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: isLoggedIn ? "#34D399" : "var(--text-muted)", fontWeight: 600 }}>
            {isLoggedIn ? "✓ TikTok 로그인됨" : "TikTok 미로그인"}
          </div>
          <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginTop: 2 }}>
            {isLoggedIn ? "TTS 음성을 사용할 수 있습니다." : "버튼을 눌러 로그인하세요."}
          </div>
        </div>
        <button
          onClick={() => void handleLogin()}
          disabled={loginStatus === "loading"}
          style={{
            padding: "7px 16px",
            background: loginStatus === "loading" ? "rgba(167,139,250,0.05)" : "rgba(167,139,250,0.15)",
            border: "1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.3)",
            borderRadius: 6,
            color: loginStatus === "loading" ? "var(--text-muted)" : "#A78BFA",
            cursor: loginStatus === "loading" ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
            fontSize: 12,
            fontWeight: 600,
            flexShrink: 0,
          }}
        >
          {loginStatus === "loading" ? "로그인 중..." : isLoggedIn ? "재로그인" : "🔑 TikTok 로그인"}
        </button>
      </div>

      {loginStatus === "error" && (
        <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#f87171", padding: "5px 10px", background: "rgba(248,113,113,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.2)", borderRadius: 5 }}>
          {loginError}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 음성 선택 */}
      <div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 4 }}>음성 모델</div>
        <select
          value={config.tiktokVoiceId}
          onChange={(e) => void update("tiktokVoiceId", e.target.value)}
          style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}
        >
          {TIKTOK_VOICES.map((group) => (
            <optgroup key={group.group} label={group.group}>
              {group.voices.map((v) => (
                <option key={v.value} value={v.value}>{v.label}</option>
              ))}
            </optgroup>
          ))}
          {webSpeechVoices.length > 0 && (
            <optgroup label="🌐 Web Speech API (브라우저)">
              {webSpeechVoices.map((v) => (
                <option key={v.name} value={`webspeech:${v.name}`}>
                  {v.name} ({v.lang})
                </option>
              ))}
            </optgroup>
          )}
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── Main Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export function TTSSettings(): React.ReactElement {
  const { config, queue, speaking, currentItem, setConfig, clearQueue, mvpQueue, mvpSpeaking, mvpCurrentItem, clearMvpQueue } = useTTSStore();
  const [voices, setVoices] = useState<SpeechSynthesisVoice[]>([]);
  const [testText, setTestText] = useState("안녕하세요! TTS 테스트입니다.");
  const [testError, setTestError] = useState("");
  const [mvpUserInput, setMvpUserInput] = useState("");
  const [expandedMvpId, setExpandedMvpId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [saveStatus, setSaveStatus] = useState<"idle" | "saving" | "saved">("idle");

  const loadVoices = useCallback(() => {
    const all = speechSynthesis.getVoices();
    if (all.length > 0) setVoices(all);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadVoices();
    speechSynthesis.addEventListener("voiceschanged", loadVoices);
    return () => speechSynthesis.removeEventListener("voiceschanged", loadVoices);
  }, [loadVoices]);

  async function update<K extends keyof TTSConfig>(key: K, value: TTSConfig[K]): Promise<void> {
    setConfig({ [key]: value });
    await saveSetting(key, value);
  }

  async function handleTestSpeak(): Promise<void> {
    if (!testText.trim()) return;
    setTestError("");

    if (config.provider === "webspeech") {
      speechSynthesis.cancel();
      const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(testText);
      utterance.rate = config.rate;
      utterance.pitch = config.pitch;
      utterance.volume = config.volume;
      const allVoices = speechSynthesis.getVoices();
      if (config.voiceName) {
        const voice = allVoices.find((v) => v.name === config.voiceName);
        if (voice) {
          utterance.voice = voice;
        } else {
          utterance.lang = "ko-KR";
        }
      } else {
        utterance.lang = "ko-KR";
      }
      speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
    } else {
      // tiktok, naver, edge, google-cloud 모두 IPC 경로
      const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
      if (!tikke?.tts?.synthesize) return;
      const result = await tikke.tts.synthesize({
        provider: config.provider,
        text: testText,
        tiktokSessionId: config.tiktokSessionId,
        tiktokVoiceId: config.tiktokVoiceId,
        edgeVoiceName: config.edgeVoiceName,
        googleSpeechV2Key: config.googleSpeechV2Key,
        googleSpeechV2Lang: config.googleSpeechV2Lang,
        googleSpeechV2Gender: config.googleSpeechV2Gender,
        googleSpeechV2Speed: config.googleSpeechV2Speed,
        googleSpeechV2Pitch: config.googleSpeechV2Pitch,
      });
      if (result.error) { setTestError(result.error); return; }
      if (result.useWebSpeech) {
        speechSynthesis.cancel();
        const allVoices = speechSynthesis.getVoices();
        const targetName = result.wsVoiceName
          ?? allVoices.find((v) => v.name === "Google 한국어")?.name
          ?? allVoices.find((v) => v.name.startsWith("Google") && v.lang.startsWith("ko"))?.name
          ?? "";
        const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(testText);
        utterance.volume = config.volume;
        utterance.rate = config.rate;
        utterance.pitch = config.pitch;
        const voice = targetName ? allVoices.find((v) => v.name === targetName) : null;
        if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;
        else utterance.lang = "ko-KR";
        speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
        return;
      }
      if (result.audioUrl) {
        const audio = new Audio(result.audioUrl);
        audio.volume = config.volume;
        await audio.play().catch((e) => setTestError(`재생 실패: ${String(e)}`));
      } else if (result.audioBase64) {
        try {
          await playBase64Audio(result.audioBase64, config.volume, config.rate, config.pitch);
        } catch (err) {
          setTestError(`오디오 재생 실패: ${String(err)}`);
        }
      } else {
        setTestError("오디오 데이터를 받지 못했습니다.");
      }
    }
  }

  function updateMvpUser(uniqueId: string, patch: Partial<MvpUser>): void {
    const next = config.mvpUsers.map((u) => u.uniqueId === uniqueId ? { ...u, ...patch } : u);
    void update("mvpUsers", next);
  }

  async function handleSaveAll(): Promise<void> {
    setSaveStatus("saving");
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;
    if (tikke?.settings) {
      const entries = Object.entries(CONFIG_KEY_MAP) as [keyof TTSConfig, string][];
      await Promise.all(entries.map(([k, dbKey]) => tikke.settings!.set(dbKey, config[k])));
    }
    setSaveStatus("saved");
    setTimeout(() => setSaveStatus("idle"), 2000);
  }

  function handleStop(): void {
    stopTTS();
  }

  function handleClear(): void {
    stopTTS();
    clearQueue();
    clearMvpQueue();
  }

  const sectionTitle = (title: string): React.ReactElement => (
    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, color: "var(--text-muted)", textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: 0.5, marginTop: 8 }}>{title}</div>
  );

  const inputStyle: React.CSSProperties = {
    background: "var(--surface)",
    border: "1px solid var(--border)",
    borderRadius: 5,
    padding: "6px 10px",
    color: "var(--text)",
    fontSize: 12,
    outline: "none",
  };

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: 24, overflowY: "auto", flex: 1, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 14 }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start", justifyContent: "space-between" }}>
        <div>
          <h1 style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 2 }}>TTS 설정</h1>
          <p style={{ color: "var(--text-muted)", fontSize: 13 }}>
            텍스트 음성 변환 (TikTok TTS)
          </p>
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, alignItems: "center" }}>
          {(speaking || queue.length > 0 || mvpSpeaking || mvpQueue.length > 0) && (
            <button
              onClick={handleClear}
              style={{ padding: "7px 14px", background: "rgba(255,0,80,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,0,80,0.25)", borderRadius: 6, color: "var(--secondary)", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 600 }}
            >
              ■ 전체 중지
            </button>
          )}
          <button
            onClick={() => void handleSaveAll()}
            disabled={saveStatus === "saving"}
            style={{
              padding: "7px 16px",
              background: saveStatus === "saved" ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.12)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)",
              border: `1px solid ${saveStatus === "saved" ? "rgba(52,211,153,0.4)" : "rgba(0,242,234,0.3)"}`,
              borderRadius: 6,
              color: saveStatus === "saved" ? "#34D399" : "var(--primary)",
              cursor: saveStatus === "saving" ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
              fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700,
            }}
          >
            {saveStatus === "saving" ? "저장 중..." : saveStatus === "saved" ? "✓ 저장됨" : "설정 저장"}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Now speaking */}
      {(speaking || queue.length > 0 || mvpSpeaking || mvpQueue.length > 0) && (
        <div style={{ padding: "10px 14px", background: "rgba(167,139,250,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.2)", borderRadius: 8, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 4 }}>
          {currentItem && (
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, color: "#A78BFA", flexShrink: 0 }}>▶ 일반</span>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text)", flex: 1, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>{currentItem.text}</span>
            </div>
          )}
          {queue.length > 0 && (
            <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>일반 대기 {queue.length}개</div>
          )}
          {mvpCurrentItem && (
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, color: "var(--primary)", flexShrink: 0 }}>▶ MVP</span>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text)", flex: 1, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>{mvpCurrentItem.text}</span>
            </div>
          )}
          {mvpQueue.length > 0 && (
            <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>MVP 대기 {mvpQueue.length}개</div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Main toggle */}
      {sectionTitle("기본 설정")}
      <Toggle
        label="TTS 활성화"
        value={config.enabled}
        onChange={(v) => void update("enabled", v)}
        description="비활성화하면 모든 TTS 읽기가 중단됩니다"
      />

      {/* Provider + Voice settings */}
      {sectionTitle("TTS 엔진")}

      <div style={{ padding: "10px 14px", background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 8, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 12 }}>
        <div>
          <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 6 }}>음성 엔진 선택</div>
          <select
            value={config.provider}
            onChange={(e) => void update("provider", e.target.value as TTSProvider)}
            style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}
          >
            <option value="webspeech">🌐 웹 브라우저 (Web Speech API)</option>
            <option value="tiktok">🎵 TikTok TTS (틱톡 내장 음성)</option>
            <option value="edge">🔵 Microsoft Edge TTS (Neural, 무료)</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Web Speech API */}
        {config.provider === "webspeech" && (
          <div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 6 }}>음성 선택</div>
            <select
              value={config.voiceName}
              onChange={(e) => void update("voiceName", e.target.value)}
              style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}
            >
              <option value="">기본 음성</option>
              {voices.filter((v) => v.lang.startsWith("ko") || v.lang.startsWith("en")).map((v) => (
                <option key={v.name} value={v.name}>{v.name} ({v.lang})</option>
              ))}
              {voices.filter((v) => !v.lang.startsWith("ko") && !v.lang.startsWith("en")).map((v) => (
                <option key={v.name} value={v.name}>{v.name} ({v.lang})</option>
              ))}
            </select>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginTop: 4 }}>
              {voices.length === 0 ? "음성 목록 로딩 중..." : `${voices.length}개 사용 가능`}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* TikTok TTS */}
        {config.provider === "tiktok" && (
          <TikTokLoginPanel config={config} update={update} inputStyle={inputStyle} webSpeechVoices={voices} />
        )}

        {/* Microsoft Edge TTS */}
        {config.provider === "edge" && (
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10 }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", lineHeight: 1.6, padding: "8px 10px", background: "rgba(96,165,250,0.05)", borderRadius: 6, border: "1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.15)" }}>
              Microsoft Edge Read Aloud Neural TTS. API 키 불필요. 고품질 Neural 음성 지원.
            </div>
            <div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 4 }}>음성 선택</div>
              <select
                value={config.edgeVoiceName}
                onChange={(e) => { setConfig({ edgeVoiceName: e.target.value }); void update("edgeVoiceName", e.target.value); }}
                style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}
              >
                {EDGE_VOICES.map((g) => (
                  <optgroup key={g.group} label={g.group}>
                    {g.voices.map((v) => <option key={v.value} value={v.value}>{v.label}</option>)}
                  </optgroup>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}


      </div>

      <SliderRow
        label="속도"
        value={config.rate}
        min={0.5} max={2.0} step={0.05}
        displayValue={config.rate.toFixed(2)}
        onChange={(v) => setConfig({ rate: v })}
        onCommit={(v) => void update("rate", v)}
      />
      <SliderRow
        label="음높이"
        value={config.pitch}
        min={0} max={2.0} step={0.05}
        displayValue={config.pitch.toFixed(2)}
        onChange={(v) => setConfig({ pitch: v })}
        onCommit={(v) => void update("pitch", v)}
      />
      <SliderRow
        label="볼륨"
        value={config.volume}
        min={0} max={1.0} step={0.01}
        displayValue={`${Math.round(config.volume * 100)}%`}
        onChange={(v) => setConfig({ volume: v })}
        onCommit={(v) => void update("volume", v)}
      />

      {/* TikTok 미로그인 경고 */}
      {config.provider === "tiktok" && !config.tiktokSessionId && (
        <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "#fbbf24", padding: "8px 12px", background: "rgba(251,191,36,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(251,191,36,0.25)", borderRadius: 7 }}>
          ⚠ TikTok 로그인이 필요합니다. 위의 "TTS 엔진" 섹션에서 먼저 로그인하세요.
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Test */}
      <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6 }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8 }}>
          <input
            type="text"
            value={testText}
            onChange={(e) => setTestText(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === "Enter") void handleTestSpeak(); }}
            style={{ ...inputStyle, flex: 1 }}
            placeholder="테스트 텍스트..."
          />
          <button
            onClick={() => void handleTestSpeak()}
            disabled={!testText.trim()}
            style={{
              padding: "6px 16px",
              background: testText.trim() ? "rgba(167,139,250,0.15)" : "rgba(167,139,250,0.05)",
              border: "1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.3)",
              borderRadius: 6,
              color: testText.trim() ? "#A78BFA" : "rgba(167,139,250,0.3)",
              cursor: testText.trim() ? "pointer" : "not-allowed",
              fontSize: 12,
              fontWeight: 600,
              flexShrink: 0,
            }}
          >
            ▷ 테스트
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={handleStop}
            style={{ padding: "6px 14px", background: "transparent", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 6, color: "var(--text-muted)", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 12 }}
          >
            ■ 중지
          </button>
        </div>
        {testError && (
          <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#f87171", padding: "5px 10px", background: "rgba(248,113,113,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.2)", borderRadius: 5 }}>
            {testError}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Allowed Users */}
      {sectionTitle("허용된 사용자 (Allowed Users)")}
      <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6 }}>
        <Toggle label="MVP 사용자" value={config.allowMvpUsers} onChange={(v) => void update("allowMvpUsers", v)} description="사용자별 개별 TTS 엔진·음성 설정" />
        {config.allowMvpUsers && (
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6, marginLeft: 12 }}>
            {/* 추가 입력 */}
            <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6 }}>
              <input
                type="text"
                value={mvpUserInput}
                onChange={(e) => setMvpUserInput(e.target.value)}
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                  if (e.key !== "Enter") return;
                  e.preventDefault();
                  const id = mvpUserInput.trim().replace(/^@/, "");
                  if (!id || config.mvpUsers.some((u) => u.uniqueId === id)) return;
                  void update("mvpUsers", [...config.mvpUsers, { ...DEFAULT_MVP_USER, uniqueId: id }]);
                  setMvpUserInput("");
                }}
                placeholder="uniqueId 입력 후 Enter"
                style={{ ...inputStyle, flex: 1 }}
              />
              <button
                onClick={() => {
                  const id = mvpUserInput.trim().replace(/^@/, "");
                  if (!id || config.mvpUsers.some((u) => u.uniqueId === id)) return;
                  void update("mvpUsers", [...config.mvpUsers, { ...DEFAULT_MVP_USER, uniqueId: id }]);
                  setMvpUserInput("");
                }}
                disabled={!mvpUserInput.trim()}
                style={{ padding: "6px 14px", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, borderRadius: 5, cursor: mvpUserInput.trim() ? "pointer" : "not-allowed", background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.12)", border: "1px solid rgba(0,242,234,0.3)", color: "var(--primary)", flexShrink: 0 }}
              >추가</button>
            </div>

            {config.mvpUsers.length === 0 && (
              <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-dim)", padding: "8px 0" }}>추가된 MVP 사용자 없음</div>
            )}

            {/* 사용자별 카드 */}
            {config.mvpUsers.map((mvpUser) => {
              const isOpen = expandedMvpId === mvpUser.uniqueId;
              return (
                <div key={mvpUser.uniqueId} style={{ background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 8, overflow: "hidden" }}>
                  {/* 헤더 */}
                  <div
                    onClick={() => setExpandedMvpId(isOpen ? null : mvpUser.uniqueId)}
                    style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, padding: "8px 12px", cursor: "pointer", userSelect: "none" }}
                  >
                    <span style={{ fontFamily: "monospace", fontSize: 12, color: "var(--primary)", flex: 1 }}>@{mvpUser.uniqueId}</span>
                    {mvpUser.provider && (
                      <span style={{ fontSize: 10, padding: "2px 6px", borderRadius: 4, background: "rgba(0,242,234,0.1)", color: "var(--primary)" }}>
                        {mvpUser.provider}
                      </span>
                    )}
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); void update("mvpUsers", config.mvpUsers.filter((u) => u.uniqueId !== mvpUser.uniqueId)); }}
                      style={{ background: "none", border: "none", color: "rgba(255,0,80,0.5)", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 14, padding: "0 4px" }}
                    >✕</button>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)" }}>{isOpen ? "▲" : "▼"}</span>
                  </div>

                  {/* 설정 패널 */}
                  {isOpen && (
                    <div style={{ padding: "10px 12px", borderTop: "1px solid var(--border)", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10 }}>
                      {/* 엔진 */}
                      <div>
                        <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 4 }}>음성 엔진</div>
                        <select value={mvpUser.provider} onChange={(e) => updateMvpUser(mvpUser.uniqueId, { provider: e.target.value as TTSProvider | "" })} style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}>
                          <option value="">기본 엔진 사용</option>
                          <option value="edge">🔵 Microsoft Edge TTS</option>
                          <option value="google-translate">🌐 Google Translate TTS</option>
                          <option value="google-cloud">🔴 Google Cloud TTS</option>
                          <option value="tiktok">🎵 TikTok TTS</option>
                          <option value="webspeech">🌐 Web Speech API</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>

                      {/* 음성 선택 — 엔진별 */}
                      {mvpUser.provider === "edge" && (
                        <div>
                          <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 4 }}>음성</div>
                          <select value={mvpUser.edgeVoiceName || "ko-KR-SunHiNeural"} onChange={(e) => updateMvpUser(mvpUser.uniqueId, { edgeVoiceName: e.target.value })} style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}>
                            {EDGE_VOICES.map((g) => (
                              <optgroup key={g.group} label={g.group}>
                                {g.voices.map((v) => <option key={v.value} value={v.value}>{v.label}</option>)}
                              </optgroup>
                            ))}
                          </select>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      {mvpUser.provider === "tiktok" && (
                        <div>
                          <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 4 }}>음성</div>
                          <select value={mvpUser.tiktokVoiceId || "kr_002"} onChange={(e) => updateMvpUser(mvpUser.uniqueId, { tiktokVoiceId: e.target.value })} style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}>
                            {TIKTOK_VOICES.map((g) => (
                              <optgroup key={g.group} label={g.group}>
                                {g.voices.map((v) => <option key={v.value} value={v.value}>{v.label}</option>)}
                              </optgroup>
                            ))}
                          </select>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      {mvpUser.provider === "webspeech" && (
                        <div>
                          <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 4 }}>음성</div>
                          <select value={mvpUser.voiceName} onChange={(e) => updateMvpUser(mvpUser.uniqueId, { voiceName: e.target.value })} style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}>
                            <option value="">기본 음성</option>
                            {voices.filter((v) => v.lang.startsWith("ko")).map((v) => <option key={v.name} value={v.name}>{v.name}</option>)}
                          </select>
                        </div>
                      )}

                      {/* 속도·음높이·볼륨 */}
                      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                        {([
                          { label: "속도", key: "rate" as const, min: 0.5, max: 2.0, step: 0.05, fmt: (v: number) => v.toFixed(2) },
                          { label: "음높이", key: "pitch" as const, min: 0, max: 2.0, step: 0.05, fmt: (v: number) => v.toFixed(2) },
                          { label: "볼륨", key: "volume" as const, min: 0, max: 1.0, step: 0.05, fmt: (v: number) => `${Math.round(v * 100)}%` },
                        ]).map(({ label, key, min, max, step, fmt }) => (
                          <div key={key} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6, flex: 1, minWidth: 140 }}>
                            <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", minWidth: 36 }}>{label}</span>
                            <input type="range" min={min} max={max} step={step} value={mvpUser[key]}
                              onChange={(e) => updateMvpUser(mvpUser.uniqueId, { [key]: Number(e.target.value) })}
                              style={{ flex: 1, accentColor: "var(--primary)" }} />
                            <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-dim)", minWidth: 32 }}>{fmt(mvpUser[key])}</span>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>

                      {/* 테스트 버튼 */}
                      <MvpTestButton mvpUser={mvpUser} testText={testText} config={config} />
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              );
            })}

          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <Toggle label="일반 시청자 (Normal)" value={config.allowNormal} onChange={(v) => void update("allowNormal", v)} description="팔로우/구독 없는 일반 시청자" />
      <Toggle label="팔로워 (Followers)" value={config.allowFollowers} onChange={(v) => void update("allowFollowers", v)} />
      <Toggle label="구독자 (Subscribers)" value={config.allowSubscribers} onChange={(v) => void update("allowSubscribers", v)} />
      <Toggle label="모더레이터 (Moderators)" value={config.allowModerators} onChange={(v) => void update("allowModerators", v)} />
      <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6 }}>
        <Toggle label="팀 멤버 (Team Members)" value={config.allowTeamMembers} onChange={(v) => void update("allowTeamMembers", v)} />
        {config.allowTeamMembers && (
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, padding: "8px 14px", background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 8, marginLeft: 12 }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", flex: 1 }}>Min. Level</span>
            <input
              type="number" min={1} max={99}
              value={config.teamMembersMinLevel}
              onChange={(e) => void update("teamMembersMinLevel", parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 1)}
              style={{ ...inputStyle, width: 60, textAlign: "center" }}
            />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6 }}>
        <Toggle label="상위 선물러 (Top Gifters)" value={config.allowTopGifters} onChange={(v) => void update("allowTopGifters", v)} />
        {config.allowTopGifters && (
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, padding: "8px 14px", background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 8, marginLeft: 12 }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text-muted)", flex: 1 }}>Top N</span>
            <input
              type="number" min={1} max={100}
              value={config.topGiftersTopN}
              onChange={(e) => void update("topGiftersTopN", parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 3)}
              style={{ ...inputStyle, width: 60, textAlign: "center" }}
            />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Event toggles */}
      {sectionTitle("이벤트 설정")}
      <Toggle label="채팅 읽기" value={config.eventChat} onChange={(v) => void update("eventChat", v)} />
      <Toggle label="선물 읽기" value={config.eventGift} onChange={(v) => void update("eventGift", v)} />
      <Toggle label="팔로우 알림" value={config.eventFollow} onChange={(v) => void update("eventFollow", v)} />
      <Toggle label="입장 알림" value={config.eventMember} onChange={(v) => void update("eventMember", v)} />
      <Toggle label="공유 알림" value={config.eventShare} onChange={(v) => void update("eventShare", v)} />
      <Toggle label="구독 알림" value={config.eventSubscribe} onChange={(v) => void update("eventSubscribe", v)} />

      {/* Options */}
      {sectionTitle("읽기 옵션")}
      <Toggle
        label="닉네임 포함"
        value={config.readUsername}
        onChange={(v) => void update("readUsername", v)}
        description="이벤트 읽기 시 닉네임을 먼저 읽습니다"
      />
      <Toggle
        label="비속어 필터"
        value={config.profanityFilter}
        onChange={(v) => void update("profanityFilter", v)}
        description="채팅에서 비속어를 ***로 대체합니다"
      />

      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10 }}>
        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
          <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 6 }}>선물 최소 다이아</div>
          <input
            type="number"
            min={0}
            value={config.giftMinDiamonds}
            onChange={(e) => void update("giftMinDiamonds", parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 0)}
            style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}
          />
        </div>
        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
          <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", marginBottom: 6 }}>최대 텍스트 길이</div>
          <input
            type="number"
            min={20}
            max={300}
            value={config.maxTextLength}
            onChange={(e) => void update("maxTextLength", parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 100)}
            style={{ ...inputStyle, width: "100%" }}
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Queue */}
      {sectionTitle(`대기열 (${queue.length}개)`)}
      {queue.length === 0 ? (
        <div style={{ padding: "16px 0", textAlign: "center", color: "var(--text-muted)", fontSize: 12 }}>
          대기 중인 TTS가 없습니다.
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 4 }}>
          {queue.slice(0, 10).map((item) => (
            <div key={item.id} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, padding: "6px 12px", background: "var(--surface-2)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 6 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 10, padding: "1px 6px", borderRadius: 99, background: "rgba(167,139,250,0.1)", color: "#A78BFA", flexShrink: 0 }}>
                {item.eventType}
              </span>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--text)", flex: 1, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>{item.text}</span>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--text-muted)", flexShrink: 0 }}>{formatTime(item.timestamp)}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
          {queue.length > 10 && (
            <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--text-muted)", textAlign: "center" }}>
              +{queue.length - 10}개 더 대기 중
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

===== ./providers/base.provider.ts =====
import type { ITranslationProvider } from "./translation-provider.interface";

export abstract class BaseProvider implements ITranslationProvider {
  abstract translate(text: string, source: string, target: string): Promise<string>;

  async translateMultiple(
    text: string,
    source: string,
    targets: string[]
  ): Promise<Record<string, string>> {
    const results = await Promise.allSettled(
      targets.map((target) =>
        this.translate(text, source, target).then((translation) => ({ target, translation }))
      )
    );
    const output: Record<string, string> = {};
    results.forEach((result, i) => {
      if (result.status === "fulfilled") {
        output[result.value.target] = result.value.translation;
      } else {
        console.warn(`[${this.constructor.name}] ${targets[i]} failed:`, result.reason);
      }
    });
    return output;
  }
}

===== ./providers/google.provider.ts =====
import { BaseProvider } from "./base.provider";

type TikkeWindow = {
  tikke?: {
    translate?: (text: string, source: string, target: string) => Promise<{ text: string; error?: string }>;
  };
};

// Routes through Electron main process (net.fetch) to bypass renderer CORS restrictions.
// Falls back to direct fetch for non-Electron environments.
export class GoogleProvider extends BaseProvider {
  async translate(text: string, source: string, target: string): Promise<string> {
    const tikke = (window as unknown as TikkeWindow).tikke;

    if (tikke?.translate) {
      const result = await tikke.translate(text, source, target);
      if (result.error) throw new Error(result.error);
      return result.text;
    }

    // Fallback: direct fetch (non-Electron or dev)
    const url = new URL("https://translate.googleapis.com/translate_a/single");
    url.searchParams.set("client", "gtx");
    url.searchParams.set("sl", source);
    url.searchParams.set("tl", target);
    url.searchParams.set("dt", "t");
    url.searchParams.set("q", text);

    const res = await fetch(url.toString());
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Google Translate HTTP ${res.status}`);

    const data: unknown = await res.json();
    const segments = (data as [string, ...unknown[]][][][])[0];
    return segments.map((s) => String(s[0] ?? "")).join("");
  }
}

===== ./providers/index.ts =====
import { GoogleProvider } from "./google.provider";
import { LibreProvider } from "./libre.provider";
import { PapagoProvider } from "./papago.provider";
import type { ITranslationProvider } from "./translation-provider.interface";

export type TranslationProviderName = "google" | "libre" | "papago";

export function createProvider(
  name: TranslationProviderName,
  config: { libreUrl?: string; papagoProxyUrl?: string }
): ITranslationProvider {
  switch (name) {
    case "google":  return new GoogleProvider();
    case "libre":   return new LibreProvider(config.libreUrl);
    case "papago":  return new PapagoProvider(config.papagoProxyUrl);
  }
}

export type { ITranslationProvider };

===== ./providers/libre.provider.ts =====
import { BaseProvider } from "./base.provider";

export class LibreProvider extends BaseProvider {
  private readonly baseUrl: string;

  constructor(baseUrl = "https://libretranslate.com") {
    super();
    this.baseUrl = baseUrl;
  }

  async translate(text: string, source: string, target: string): Promise<string> {
    // LibreTranslate uses "zh" instead of "zh-CN"
    const t = target === "zh-CN" ? "zh" : target;

    const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}/translate`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ q: text, source, target: t, format: "text" }),
    });

    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`LibreTranslate HTTP ${res.status}`);
    const data = await res.json() as { translatedText: string };
    return data.translatedText;
  }
}

===== ./providers/papago.provider.ts =====
import { BaseProvider } from "./base.provider";

// Naver Papago credentials must NOT be in the browser bundle.
// Point proxyUrl at a server-side proxy that holds the credentials.
// Proxy contract: POST { source, target, text } → { translatedText: string }
export class PapagoProvider extends BaseProvider {
  private readonly proxyUrl: string;

  constructor(proxyUrl = "") {
    super();
    this.proxyUrl = proxyUrl;
  }

  async translate(text: string, source: string, target: string): Promise<string> {
    if (!this.proxyUrl) {
      throw new Error(
        "Papago requires a proxy URL. Set it in Settings → 번역 자막 → 번역 엔진."
      );
    }

    const res = await fetch(this.proxyUrl, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ source, target, text }),
    });

    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Papago proxy HTTP ${res.status}`);
    const data = await res.json() as { translatedText: string };
    return data.translatedText;
  }
}

===== ./providers/translation-provider.interface.ts =====
export interface ITranslationProvider {
  translate(text: string, source: string, target: string): Promise<string>;
  translateMultiple(
    text: string,
    source: string,
    targets: string[]
  ): Promise<Record<string, string>>;
}

===== ./services/subtitle-deduper.ts =====
// Prevents the same final transcript from being translated twice within a short window.
// Uses time-based expiry so the same phrase can be translated again after expiryMs.
export class SubtitleDeduper {
  private readonly seen = new Map<string, number>(); // normalized text → timestamp
  private readonly maxSize: number;
  private readonly expiryMs: number;

  constructor(maxSize = 100, expiryMs = 8000) {
    this.maxSize = maxSize;
    this.expiryMs = expiryMs;
  }

  private normalize(text: string): string {
    return text.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
  }

  isDuplicate(text: string): boolean {
    const key = this.normalize(text);
    const ts = this.seen.get(key);
    if (ts === undefined) return false;
    if (Date.now() - ts > this.expiryMs) {
      this.seen.delete(key);
      return false;
    }
    return true;
  }

  add(text: string): void {
    const key = this.normalize(text);
    this.seen.delete(key); // remove first to refresh insertion order
    if (this.seen.size >= this.maxSize) {
      const first = this.seen.keys().next().value;
      if (first !== undefined) this.seen.delete(first);
    }
    this.seen.set(key, Date.now());
  }

  clear(): void { this.seen.clear(); }
}

export const subtitleDeduper = new SubtitleDeduper();

===== ./services/translation-cache.ts =====
export class TranslationCache {
  private readonly map = new Map<string, string>();
  private readonly maxSize: number;

  constructor(maxSize = 500) {
    this.maxSize = maxSize;
  }

  private key(text: string, target: string): string {
    return `${target}${text}`;
  }

  get(text: string, target: string): string | undefined {
    return this.map.get(this.key(text, target));
  }

  set(text: string, target: string, translation: string): void {
    const k = this.key(text, target);
    if (this.map.size >= this.maxSize && !this.map.has(k)) {
      const first = this.map.keys().next().value;
      if (first !== undefined) this.map.delete(first);
    }
    this.map.set(k, translation);
  }

  has(text: string, target: string): boolean {
    return this.map.has(this.key(text, target));
  }

  clear(): void { this.map.clear(); }
}

export const translationCache = new TranslationCache();

===== ./services/translation-queue.ts =====
import type { ITranslationProvider } from "../providers/translation-provider.interface";
import { withTimeout } from "../utils/timeout";

const MAX_CONCURRENT = 3;
const MAX_RETRIES = 1;
const TIMEOUT_MS = 8000;

interface Entry {
  text: string;
  source: string;
  targets: string[];
  resolve: (r: Record<string, string>) => void;
  reject: (e: Error) => void;
  attempts: number;
}

class TranslationQueue {
  private queue: Entry[] = [];
  private active = 0;
  private provider: ITranslationProvider | null = null;

  setProvider(p: ITranslationProvider): void {
    this.provider = p;
  }

  enqueue(text: string, source: string, targets: string[]): Promise<Record<string, string>> {
    return new Promise<Record<string, string>>((resolve, reject) => {
      this.queue.push({ text, source, targets, resolve, reject, attempts: 0 });
      this.drain();
    });
  }

  private drain(): void {
    while (this.active < MAX_CONCURRENT && this.queue.length > 0) {
      const entry = this.queue.shift()!;
      this.active++;
      this.execute(entry).finally(() => {
        this.active--;
        this.drain();
      });
    }
  }

  private async execute(entry: Entry): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.provider) {
      entry.reject(new Error("No translation provider set"));
      return;
    }
    try {
      const result = await withTimeout(
        this.provider.translateMultiple(entry.text, entry.source, entry.targets),
        TIMEOUT_MS
      );
      entry.resolve(result);
    } catch (err) {
      if (entry.attempts < MAX_RETRIES) {
        entry.attempts++;
        this.queue.unshift(entry);
      } else {
        entry.reject(err instanceof Error ? err : new Error(String(err)));
      }
    }
  }

  clear(): void { this.queue = []; }
}

export const translationQueue = new TranslationQueue();

import { create } from "zustand";
import type { TikkeEvent } from "@tikke/shared";

interface EventStore {
  events: TikkeEvent[];
  addEvent: (event: TikkeEvent) => void;
  clearEvents: () => void;
}

const MAX_EVENTS = 500;

export const useEventStore = create<EventStore>((set) => ({
  events: [],
  addEvent: (event) =>
    set((state) => ({
      events:
        state.events.length >= MAX_EVENTS
          ? [...state.events.slice(1), event]
          : [...state.events, event],
    })),
  clearEvents: () => set({ events: [] }),
}));

// 런타임 선물 이미지 맵 — TikTok LIVE 연결 시 자동 갱신
import { create } from "zustand";

interface GiftImageStore {
  images: Map<number, string>;
  merge: (map: Record<number, string>) => void;
}

export const useGiftImageStore = create<GiftImageStore>((set) => ({
  images: new Map(),
  merge: (map) =>
    set((s) => {
      const next = new Map(s.images);
      for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(map)) {
        next.set(Number(k), v);
      }
      return { images: next };
    }),
}));

===== ./stores/menuBoardStore.ts =====
// 메뉴판 설정 스토어 — 선물 트리거 그리드 관리
import { create } from "zustand";

function newId(): string {
  return typeof crypto !== "undefined" && typeof crypto.randomUUID === "function"
    ? crypto.randomUUID()
    : `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;
}

export interface MenuCell {
  id: string;
  col: number;
  row: number;
  title: string;
  backgroundColor: string;
  textColor: string;
  fontSize: number;
  fontWeight: number;
  giftId?: number;
  giftName?: string;
  giftImageUrl?: string;
}

export interface MenuBoard {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  rows: number;
  cols: number;
  cellSize: number;
  gapX: number; // 가로(열) 간격
  gapY: number; // 세로(행) 간격
  fontFamily: string;
  imgSize: number; // 이미지 절대 크기 (px) — 셀 크기와 독립
  cellBorderRadius: number; // 셀 모서리 반경 (0=직각, 기본 12)
  strokeWidth: number; // 텍스트 외곽선 두께 (0-8)
  shadowBlur: number;  // 텍스트 그림자 블러 (0-24)
  shadowColor: string; // 외곽선·그림자 색상
  textImgGap: number;  // 폰트↔이미지 간격 (px)
  cells: MenuCell[];
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

export const DEFAULT_CELL_STYLE = {
  backgroundColor: "#1E293B",
  textColor: "#FFFFFF",
  fontSize: 14,
  fontWeight: 700 as const,
};

export const FONT_OPTIONS = [
  { label: "기본 (맑은 고딕)", value: '"Malgun Gothic","Apple SD Gothic Neo",sans-serif' },
  { label: "Pretendard", value: '"Pretendard",sans-serif' },
  { label: "블랙한산스", value: '"Black Han Sans",cursive' },
  { label: "나눔고딕", value: '"Nanum Gothic",sans-serif' },
  { label: "노토산스 KR", value: '"Noto Sans KR",sans-serif' },
  { label: "임팩트", value: 'Impact,"Arial Black",sans-serif' },
  { label: "등폭", value: "monospace" },
] as const;

export const DEFAULT_BOARD: Omit<MenuBoard, "id" | "name" | "createdAt" | "updatedAt"> = {
  rows: 3,
  cols: 4,
  cellSize: 120,
  gapX: 8,
  gapY: 8,
  fontFamily: '"Malgun Gothic","Apple SD Gothic Neo",sans-serif',
  imgSize: 62,
  cellBorderRadius: 12,
  strokeWidth: 0,
  shadowBlur: 4,
  shadowColor: "#000000",
  textImgGap: 4,
  cells: [],
};

interface MenuBoardStore {
  boards: MenuBoard[];
  activeId: string | null;
  activatedCells: Set<number>; // giftId set — flash 상태

  addBoard: () => MenuBoard;
  updateBoard: (board: MenuBoard) => void;
  removeBoard: (id: string) => void;
  setActive: (id: string | null) => void;
  getActive: () => MenuBoard | null;
  upsertCell: (boardId: string, cell: MenuCell) => void;
  removeCell: (boardId: string, cellId: string) => void;
  activateGift: (giftId: number) => void;
  applyColorToAll: (boardId: string, field: "backgroundColor" | "textColor", color: string) => void;
  applyFontSizeToAll: (boardId: string, fontSize: number) => void;
  applyFontWeightToAll: (boardId: string, fontWeight: number) => void;
  swapCells: (boardId: string, src: { row: number; col: number }, dst: { row: number; col: number }) => void;
}

export const useMenuBoardStore = create<MenuBoardStore>((set, get) => ({
  boards: [],
  activeId: null,
  activatedCells: new Set(),

  addBoard: () => {
    const now = new Date().toISOString();
    const board: MenuBoard = {
      id: newId(),
      name: `메뉴판 세트 ${get().boards.length + 1}`,
      ...DEFAULT_BOARD,
      createdAt: now,
      updatedAt: now,
    };
    set((s) => ({ boards: [...s.boards, board], activeId: board.id }));
    return board;
  },

  updateBoard: (board) =>
    set((s) => ({
      boards: s.boards.map((b) =>
        b.id === board.id ? { ...board, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } : b
      ),
    })),

  removeBoard: (id) =>
    set((s) => {
      const next = s.boards.filter((b) => b.id !== id);
      return {
        boards: next,
        activeId: s.activeId === id ? (next[0]?.id ?? null) : s.activeId,
      };
    }),

  setActive: (id) => set({ activeId: id }),

  getActive: () => {
    const s = get();
    return s.boards.find((b) => b.id === s.activeId) ?? null;
  },

  upsertCell: (boardId, cell) =>
    set((s) => ({
      boards: s.boards.map((b) => {
        if (b.id !== boardId) return b;
        const exists = b.cells.some((c) => c.id === cell.id);
        return {
          ...b,
          cells: exists ? b.cells.map((c) => (c.id === cell.id ? cell : c)) : [...b.cells, cell],
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        };
      }),
    })),

  removeCell: (boardId, cellId) =>
    set((s) => ({
      boards: s.boards.map((b) =>
        b.id !== boardId ? b : {
          ...b,
          cells: b.cells.filter((c) => c.id !== cellId),
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        }
      ),
    })),

  activateGift: (giftId) => {
    set((s) => {
      const next = new Set(s.activatedCells);
      next.add(giftId);
      return { activatedCells: next };
    });
    setTimeout(() => {
      set((s) => {
        const next = new Set(s.activatedCells);
        next.delete(giftId);
        return { activatedCells: next };
      });
    }, 1500);
  },

  applyColorToAll: (boardId, field, color) =>
    set((s) => ({
      boards: s.boards.map((b) =>
        b.id !== boardId ? b : {
          ...b,
          cells: b.cells.map((c) => ({ ...c, [field]: color })),
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        }
      ),
    })),

  applyFontSizeToAll: (boardId, fontSize) =>
    set((s) => ({
      boards: s.boards.map((b) =>
        b.id !== boardId ? b : {
          ...b,
          cells: b.cells.map((c) => ({ ...c, fontSize })),
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        }
      ),
    })),

  applyFontWeightToAll: (boardId, fontWeight) =>
    set((s) => ({
      boards: s.boards.map((b) =>
        b.id !== boardId ? b : {
          ...b,
          cells: b.cells.map((c) => ({ ...c, fontWeight })),
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        }
      ),
    })),

  swapCells: (boardId, src, dst) =>
    set((s) => ({
      boards: s.boards.map((b) => {
        if (b.id !== boardId) return b;
        const srcCell = b.cells.find((c) => c.row === src.row && c.col === src.col);
        const dstCell = b.cells.find((c) => c.row === dst.row && c.col === dst.col);
        const updated = b.cells.map((c) => {
          if (c.row === src.row && c.col === src.col) return { ...c, row: dst.row, col: dst.col };
          if (c.row === dst.row && c.col === dst.col) return { ...c, row: src.row, col: src.col };
          return c;
        });
        if (!srcCell && !dstCell) return b;
        if (srcCell && !dstCell) return { ...b, cells: updated, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
        return { ...b, cells: updated, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
      }),
    })),
}));

===== ./stores/soundStore.ts =====
import { create } from "zustand";

export interface SoundFile {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  filePath: string;
  durationMs: number | null;
  volume: number;
  createdAt: number;
}

export interface SoundCondition {
  giftId?: number;
  giftName?: string;
  minDiamonds?: number;
  contains?: string;
}

export interface SoundRule {
  id: string;
  eventType: string;
  condition: SoundCondition;
  soundId: string;
  enabled: boolean;
  createdAt: number;
}

export interface ActiveSound {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  startedAt: number;
}

interface SoundStore {
  files: SoundFile[];
  rules: SoundRule[];
  activeSounds: ActiveSound[];
  loading: boolean;

  setFiles: (files: SoundFile[]) => void;
  addFile: (file: SoundFile) => void;
  removeFile: (id: string) => void;
  updateFileVolume: (id: string, volume: number) => void;

  setRules: (rules: SoundRule[]) => void;
  addRule: (rule: SoundRule) => void;
  removeRule: (id: string) => void;
  toggleRule: (id: string, enabled: boolean) => void;

  addActiveSound: (sound: ActiveSound) => void;
  removeActiveSound: (id: string) => void;
  clearActiveSounds: () => void;

  setLoading: (loading: boolean) => void;
}

export const useSoundStore = create<SoundStore>((set) => ({
  files: [],
  rules: [],
  activeSounds: [],
  loading: false,

  setFiles: (files) => set({ files }),
  addFile: (file) => set((s) => ({ files: [...s.files, file] })),
  removeFile: (id) => set((s) => ({
    files: s.files.filter((f) => f.id !== id),
    rules: s.rules.filter((r) => r.soundId !== id),
  })),
  updateFileVolume: (id, volume) => set((s) => ({
    files: s.files.map((f) => f.id === id ? { ...f, volume } : f),
  })),

  setRules: (rules) => set({ rules }),
  addRule: (rule) => set((s) => ({ rules: [...s.rules, rule] })),
  removeRule: (id) => set((s) => ({ rules: s.rules.filter((r) => r.id !== id) })),
  toggleRule: (id, enabled) => set((s) => ({
    rules: s.rules.map((r) => r.id === id ? { ...r, enabled } : r),
  })),

  addActiveSound: (sound) => set((s) => ({
    activeSounds: [...s.activeSounds.slice(-9), sound], // keep last 10
  })),
  removeActiveSound: (id) => set((s) => ({
    activeSounds: s.activeSounds.filter((a) => a.id !== id),
  })),
  clearActiveSounds: () => set({ activeSounds: [] }),

  setLoading: (loading) => set({ loading }),
}));

===== ./stores/timerStore.ts =====
// 타이머 오버레이 상태 관리
import { create } from "zustand";

export type TimerMode = "countdown" | "countup";

export interface TimerState {
  mode: TimerMode;
  isRunning: boolean;
  elapsedMs: number;       // countup: 경과 시간 / countdown: 남은 시간
  targetMs: number;        // countdown 목표 시간 (ms)
  startedAt: number | null; // performance.now() 기준 시작 시각
  // 스타일
  fontSize: number;
  color: string;
  bgColor: string;
  bgOpacity: number;
  showMs: boolean;
  align: "left" | "center" | "right";
}

interface TimerStore extends TimerState {
  start: () => void;
  stop: () => void;
  reset: () => void;
  setMode: (mode: TimerMode) => void;
  setTarget: (ms: number) => void;
  tick: () => void;
  setStyle: (patch: Partial<Pick<TimerState, "fontSize" | "color" | "bgColor" | "bgOpacity" | "showMs" | "align">>) => void;
  getSnapshot: () => TimerState;
}

export const useTimerStore = create<TimerStore>((set, get) => ({
  mode: "countdown",
  isRunning: false,
  elapsedMs: 0,
  targetMs: 5 * 60 * 1000, // 기본 5분
  startedAt: null,
  fontSize: 80,
  color: "#FFFFFF",
  bgColor: "#000000",
  bgOpacity: 0,
  showMs: false,
  align: "center",

  start: () => {
    const s = get();
    if (s.isRunning) return;
    set({ isRunning: true, startedAt: performance.now() - s.elapsedMs });
  },

  stop: () => set({ isRunning: false, startedAt: null }),

  reset: () => {
    const s = get();
    set({ isRunning: false, elapsedMs: s.mode === "countdown" ? s.targetMs : 0, startedAt: null });
  },

  setMode: (mode) => {
    const s = get();
    set({ mode, isRunning: false, elapsedMs: mode === "countdown" ? s.targetMs : 0, startedAt: null });
  },

  setTarget: (ms) => {
    const s = get();
    set({ targetMs: ms, elapsedMs: s.mode === "countdown" ? ms : s.elapsedMs, isRunning: false, startedAt: null });
  },

  tick: () => {
    const s = get();
    if (!s.isRunning || s.startedAt === null) return;
    const elapsed = performance.now() - s.startedAt;
    if (s.mode === "countup") {
      set({ elapsedMs: elapsed });
    } else {
      const remaining = Math.max(0, s.targetMs - elapsed);
      if (remaining === 0) {
        set({ elapsedMs: 0, isRunning: false, startedAt: null });
      } else {
        set({ elapsedMs: remaining });
      }
    }
  },

  setStyle: (patch) => set(patch),

  getSnapshot: () => {
    const { mode, isRunning, elapsedMs, targetMs, startedAt, fontSize, color, bgColor, bgOpacity, showMs, align } = get();
    return { mode, isRunning, elapsedMs, targetMs, startedAt, fontSize, color, bgColor, bgOpacity, showMs, align };
  },
}));

export function formatTime(ms: number, showMs: boolean): string {
  const totalSec = Math.floor(ms / 1000);
  const h = Math.floor(totalSec / 3600);
  const m = Math.floor((totalSec % 3600) / 60);
  const s = totalSec % 60;
  const msStr = showMs ? "." + String(Math.floor((ms % 1000) / 10)).padStart(2, "0") : "";
  if (h > 0) return `${h}:${String(m).padStart(2, "0")}:${String(s).padStart(2, "0")}${msStr}`;
  return `${String(m).padStart(2, "0")}:${String(s).padStart(2, "0")}${msStr}`;
}

===== ./stores/translationStore.ts =====
import { create } from "zustand";
import type { TranslationProviderName } from "../providers";

export interface TranslationSubtitle {
  id: string;
  original: string;
  translations: { en?: string; ja?: string; "zh-CN"?: string; "zh-TW"?: string; fr?: string; ar?: string; th?: string };
  timestamp: number;
}

export interface TranslationConfig {
  provider: TranslationProviderName;
  showOriginal: boolean;
  langEn: boolean;
  langJa: boolean;
  langZhCN: boolean;
  langZhTW: boolean;
  langFr: boolean;
  langAr: boolean;
  langTh: boolean;
  fontSizeKo: number;
  fontSizeEn: number;
  fontSizeJa: number;
  fontSizeZhCN: number;
  fontSizeZhTW: number;
  fontSizeFr: number;
  fontSizeAr: number;
  fontSizeTh: number;
  colorKo: string;
  colorEn: string;
  colorJa: string;
  colorZhCN: string;
  colorZhTW: string;
  colorFr: string;
  colorAr: string;
  colorTh: string;
  strokeWidth: number;
  shadowBlur: number;
  shadowColor: string;
  bgOpacity: number;
  displayTimeoutMs: number;
  textAlign: "left" | "center" | "right";
  libreUrl: string;
  papagoProxyUrl: string;
}

export const DEFAULT_CONFIG: TranslationConfig = {
  provider: "google",
  showOriginal: true,
  langEn: true,
  langJa: true,
  langZhCN: true,
  langZhTW: false,
  langFr: false,
  langAr: false,
  langTh: false,
  fontSizeKo: 28,
  fontSizeEn: 24,
  fontSizeJa: 22,
  fontSizeZhCN: 22,
  fontSizeZhTW: 22,
  fontSizeFr: 24,
  fontSizeAr: 24,
  fontSizeTh: 22,
  colorKo: "#FFFFFF",
  colorEn: "#A7F3D0",
  colorJa: "#BAE6FD",
  colorZhCN: "#FDE68A",
  colorZhTW: "#FCD34D",
  colorFr: "#C4B5FD",
  colorAr: "#FCA5A5",
  colorTh: "#86EFAC",
  strokeWidth: 2,
  shadowBlur: 6,
  shadowColor: "#000000",
  bgOpacity: 50,
  displayTimeoutMs: 10000,
  textAlign: "left",
  libreUrl: "https://libretranslate.com",
  papagoProxyUrl: "",
};

interface TranslationStore {
  currentSubtitle: TranslationSubtitle | null;
  history: TranslationSubtitle[];
  config: TranslationConfig;
  configLoaded: boolean;

  setCurrentSubtitle: (s: TranslationSubtitle | null) => void;
  addToHistory: (s: TranslationSubtitle) => void;
  setConfig: (c: Partial<TranslationConfig>) => void;
  setConfigLoaded: (v: boolean) => void;
}

export const useTranslationStore = create<TranslationStore>((set) => ({
  currentSubtitle: null,
  history: [],
  config: DEFAULT_CONFIG,
  configLoaded: false,

  setCurrentSubtitle: (s) => set({ currentSubtitle: s }),
  addToHistory: (s) =>
    set((state) => ({ history: [...state.history.slice(-49), s] })),
  setConfig: (c) =>
    set((state) => ({ config: { ...state.config, ...c } })),
  setConfigLoaded: (v) => set({ configLoaded: v }),
}));

===== ./stores/ttsStore.ts =====
import { create } from "zustand";

export type TTSProvider = "webspeech" | "tiktok" | "edge";

// MVP 사용자별 개별 TTS 설정
export interface MvpUser {
  uniqueId: string;
  provider: TTSProvider | "";
  voiceName: string;
  edgeVoiceName: string;
  tiktokVoiceId: string;
  rate: number;
  pitch: number;
  volume: number;
}

export const DEFAULT_MVP_USER: Omit<MvpUser, "uniqueId"> = {
  provider: "",
  voiceName: "",
  edgeVoiceName: "ko-KR-SunHiNeural",
  tiktokVoiceId: "gspeech:ko-KR:female",
  rate: 1.0,
  pitch: 1.0,
  volume: 1.0,
};

export interface TTSConfig {
  enabled: boolean;
  provider: TTSProvider;
  // Web Speech API
  voiceName: string;
  rate: number;
  pitch: number;
  volume: number;
  // TikTok TTS
  tiktokSessionId: string;
  tiktokVoiceId: string;
  // Microsoft Edge TTS
  edgeVoiceName: string;
  // Google Speech API v2
  googleSpeechV2Key: string;
  googleSpeechV2Lang: string;
  googleSpeechV2Gender: "female" | "male";
  googleSpeechV2Speed: number;
  googleSpeechV2Pitch: number;
  // Common
  readUsername: boolean;
  eventChat: boolean;
  eventGift: boolean;
  eventFollow: boolean;
  eventMember: boolean;
  eventShare: boolean;
  eventSubscribe: boolean;
  giftMinDiamonds: number;
  maxTextLength: number;
  profanityFilter: boolean;
  // Allowed Users
  allowNormal: boolean;
  allowFollowers: boolean;
  allowSubscribers: boolean;
  allowModerators: boolean;
  allowTeamMembers: boolean;
  teamMembersMinLevel: number;
  allowTopGifters: boolean;
  topGiftersTopN: number;
  allowMvpUsers: boolean;
  // MVP 사용자별 개별 설정
  mvpUsers: MvpUser[];
}

export interface TTSQueueItem {
  id: string;
  text: string;
  eventType: string;
  timestamp: number;
  isMvp?: boolean;
  mvpUniqueId?: string; // MVP 큐에서 어떤 사용자 설정을 쓸지
}

export const TTS_CONFIG_DEFAULTS: TTSConfig = {
  enabled: true,
  provider: "edge",
  voiceName: "",
  rate: 1.0,
  pitch: 1.0,
  volume: 1.0,
  tiktokSessionId: "",
  tiktokVoiceId: "gspeech:ko-KR:female",
  edgeVoiceName: "ko-KR-SunHiNeural",
  googleSpeechV2Key: "",
  googleSpeechV2Lang: "ko-KR",
  googleSpeechV2Gender: "female",
  googleSpeechV2Speed: 0.50,
  googleSpeechV2Pitch: 0.50,
  readUsername: true,
  eventChat: true,
  eventGift: true,
  eventFollow: true,
  eventMember: false,
  eventShare: false,
  eventSubscribe: true,
  giftMinDiamonds: 0,
  maxTextLength: 100,
  profanityFilter: false,
  allowNormal: true,
  allowFollowers: true,
  allowSubscribers: true,
  allowModerators: true,
  allowTeamMembers: true,
  teamMembersMinLevel: 1,
  allowTopGifters: true,
  topGiftersTopN: 3,
  allowMvpUsers: false,
  mvpUsers: [],
};

const MAX_QUEUE_SIZE = 30;

interface TTSStore {
  config: TTSConfig;
  // 일반 큐
  queue: TTSQueueItem[];
  speaking: boolean;
  currentItem: TTSQueueItem | null;
  loaded: boolean;
  // MVP 독립 큐
  mvpQueue: TTSQueueItem[];
  mvpSpeaking: boolean;
  mvpCurrentItem: TTSQueueItem | null;

  setConfig: (patch: Partial<TTSConfig>) => void;
  enqueue: (item: TTSQueueItem) => void;
  dequeue: () => TTSQueueItem | undefined;
  clearQueue: () => void;
  setSpeaking: (speaking: boolean) => void;
  setCurrentItem: (item: TTSQueueItem | null) => void;
  setLoaded: (loaded: boolean) => void;
  enqueueMvp: (item: TTSQueueItem) => void;
  dequeueMvp: () => TTSQueueItem | undefined;
  clearMvpQueue: () => void;
  setMvpSpeaking: (speaking: boolean) => void;
  setMvpCurrentItem: (item: TTSQueueItem | null) => void;
}

export const useTTSStore = create<TTSStore>((set, get) => ({
  config: { ...TTS_CONFIG_DEFAULTS },
  queue: [],
  speaking: false,
  currentItem: null,
  loaded: false,
  mvpQueue: [],
  mvpSpeaking: false,
  mvpCurrentItem: null,

  setConfig: (patch) =>
    set((s) => ({ config: { ...s.config, ...patch } })),

  enqueue: (item) =>
    set((s) => {
      const queue = [...s.queue, item];
      return { queue: queue.slice(-MAX_QUEUE_SIZE) };
    }),

  dequeue: () => {
    const state = get();
    if (state.queue.length === 0) return undefined;
    const [first, ...rest] = state.queue;
    set({ queue: rest });
    return first;
  },

  clearQueue: () => set({ queue: [] }),
  setSpeaking: (speaking) => set({ speaking }),
  setCurrentItem: (item) => set({ currentItem: item }),
  setLoaded: (loaded) => set({ loaded }),

  enqueueMvp: (item) =>
    set((s) => {
      const mvpQueue = [...s.mvpQueue, item];
      return { mvpQueue: mvpQueue.slice(-MAX_QUEUE_SIZE) };
    }),

  dequeueMvp: () => {
    const state = get();
    if (state.mvpQueue.length === 0) return undefined;
    const [first, ...rest] = state.mvpQueue;
    set({ mvpQueue: rest });
    return first;
  },

  clearMvpQueue: () => set({ mvpQueue: [] }),
  setMvpSpeaking: (mvpSpeaking) => set({ mvpSpeaking }),
  setMvpCurrentItem: (mvpCurrentItem) => set({ mvpCurrentItem }),
}));

===== ./utils/debounce.ts =====
export function debounce<Args extends unknown[]>(
  fn: (...args: Args) => void,
  ms: number
): (...args: Args) => void {
  let timer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | undefined;
  return (...args: Args): void => {
    if (timer !== undefined) clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => { fn(...args); }, ms);
  };
}

===== ./utils/timeout.ts =====
export function withTimeout<T>(promise: Promise<T>, ms: number): Promise<T> {
  return Promise.race([
    promise,
    new Promise<never>((_, reject) =>
      setTimeout(() => reject(new Error(`Request timed out after ${ms}ms`)), ms)
    ),
  ]);
}
